name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Good evening, friend.
body:
Good evening, friend. I wanted to take a moment to update you on the state of our race here in MI-08.
But if you’re short on time, I understand. Will you chip in $3 to help us push past our July fundraising goal? The race for MI-08 is a must-hold for a Democratic House majority, and we can’t leave anything to chance.
**Here’s a good link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112011482/559132027/1362877131?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzkzOWUyMS0yMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfHw8vdZG610Q-Sl4gj9VahKOxfdOlpGWZarhdCV0sw=)**
National Republicans have already spent hundreds of thousands attacking me, and now that they’ve recruited a candidate to run against us, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
We know what’s coming next: more attack ads, more outside money, and more disinformation aimed at flipping this seat. They’ve identified MI-08 as a top-tier pickup opportunity – and they’ll do whatever it takes to flip it.
If we’re going to win back the House, we must hold seats like MI-08. This district is one of just a handful that will determine which party controls the gavel next year. And if we lose here, the path to a Democratic majority gets much steeper.
So friend, if you can, please send in a donation to keep this seat blue. Every dollar helps, but $3 from you would go a long way.
**Here’s that link again:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q3-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112011485/559132034/1362877131?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzkzOWUyMS0yMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GfHw8vdZG610Q-Sl4gj9VahKOxfdOlpGWZarhdCV0sw=)**
Thanks for being in this fight,
kmr

Kristen for Michigan
P.O. Box 854
Bay City, MI 48707
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/wIbGWuvzGU-Lj2kxieOm2g2?unsubscribedata=BF7KtvDX35LwkjzKHuAinQYZ7Sn3fQ3moRN%2Bn1kIMWwdMUAr3o7vgKlWKVApnWDgnr4OpQtVHW5T6Gjv9Izg9OzZFe6%2BtpmbNehLT3U%2BvCUdZ%2BQhqNrUz6o6n1ZO2z9u3Fo2NQHVcEhH5%2FfpljkE27JuUSqHDFlCJuf2Ww5595BUgSuhY1eWQfSTQNKmWhS16r3gSKctKEb4HBorUMpPBOKVIId6eJ8HhUewFUt%2F%2Fa8j4R13nxloUxaTY95Rmt1nBDU4qxzX%2FXExW8pC5JcrdbBARvsz93Zj6wImTf8WF6nHy3gxQpDWv5EfSRSe7WX2eFYB7b3t82LfUJosFPsi%2FcBpVTcN%2FkG2Z1FRGBlQa9RRVGWPpC0L%2Fp1f3yfZlzu7qDeAJr%2FtemlhykRYcTVIGzW2Rxw1oBmQLTa876KaYRvK080I93UsGDIRsBEnt3sW).

Our members are the driving force behind our movement to elect state Democrats. Our membership team helps inform our strategy, fund our investments, and lay the groundwork for Democratic powerbuilding.
**This year, we’ve already won 24 special elections, flipped two seats that Trump won by double digits, and invested over $750,000 into Virginia to protect our majority in the House of Delegates this fall. None of that would have been possible without the dedication of our 16,000 members.**
But with a team of _20,000+_ members, we can accomplish even more. With a well-funded movement, we can work in _more_ competitive races, reach _more_ voters, run _more_ targeted ads in close districts, and so much _more_. **That’s why we’re counting on you to own a piece of this fight and activate your membership – before it’s too late.**

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: AOC just came to campaign in NY-21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Democrats sent a socialist to attack me...
| **_AN EMERGENCY MEMO FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
With each passing day, our campaign to DEFEND President Trump’s House majority and SAVE New York from Kathy Hochul is gaining more and more momentum.
---
But the Democrats have put a target on my back.
---
**They just sent Far Left radical Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to campaign in my congressional district, attack me personally, and _LIE_ to voters about President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill!**
---
The Democrats have gotten so extreme and out of touch that they think a socialist like AOC is their party’s best chance of defeating me and winning more votes upstate.
---
_Make no mistake, this is a political GIFT that we can use to rally voters against the Democrats and their radical agenda._
---
_But you want to know what would make AOC’s stop in NY-21 really BACKFIRE for the Democrats?_
---
**A surge of contributions from thousands of grassroots Americans giving just a few dollars to help us level the playing field against the MILLIONS OF DOLLARS that Hochul, AOC, and Mamdani will spend to _BUY_ the midterms! **
---
Remember, it’s not the __amount__ you give that’s important, Friend.
---
What matters most is the __sheer_ _number__ of America First __patriots__ who step up and stand with me against AOC’s radical defund-the-police agenda at this critical moment for our state – and our country.
---
Let’s show AOC that __REAL__ New Yorkers reject her Communist insanity.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any amount to help us ensure AOC’s recent campaign stop in my district BACKFIRES against the Democrats._ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dca2fca527b94fc689c35c09ae5ca9e2&_e=OZx0Bl6kZMQCxl-9fH6VUUzUzF26H2k01Vx0pGwpMm4H3bI0fKalmWEhAeOVzt-LVIE7c5_iTcwsZRU-UQIORt_7YGBjefGcn1HkghbhsiSEtjPkVq2HU-hdkjGbHuoZhVBmRxOEhnoNQJXpiDsYcwLW_Lt4jCypy4OtJdJ2b6vAwKoL5jndaF7MtWVfWCpQArwCHqQzK-rmhTOoZHGP5oWFn2QWFGmCK2eewMlkTU7KZZZetQtjHMUnQR5Jv8VE16ybZ-GPGEgjLZNDoWFIJPUqNJFB34Ls38HVozaxVjk95MascU0iUBGWDVObyKGMaSnmIVQdC38jHcdH494ByvcLyeo5xvg3oUxUvFIZ8N186ZmCbDbfZxSEO0OEnG3E5l3lQgZAq3NMEdl0QK5tH70X1KNZxiQ2HIKQxGAMBAdbIpvIn-IrGJgl9LfNc2TWtfw83PWa-D20gSNjMAtWNLTO45M9NiSHBQiTMuyPPkgxNY4Q1YcB2yBFAuHb7uie3zRsomqSWvFn0JUEb916kTprGE2QygDmHaxHDsFGnYx4dTbMlcRS19gjad-RJfnWunxwZZeqJoQz7rAURg0rbqIZbPpQUyMVXFM1kT1_DHW-McU5H9XF8hK359pEtYM0)

clean_body: Democrats sent a socialist to attack me... | AN EMERGENCY MEMO FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK Friend, With each passing day, our campaign to DEFEND President Trump’s House majority and SAVE New York from Kathy Hochul is gaining more and more momentum. But the Democrats have put a target on my back. They just sent Far Left radical Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to campaign in my congressional district, attack me personally, and LIE to voters about President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill! The Democrats have gotten so extreme and out of touch that they think a socialist like AOC is their party’s best chance of defeating me and winning more votes upstate. Make no mistake, this is a political GIFT that we can use to rally voters against the Democrats and their radical agenda. But you want to know what would make AOC’s stop in NY-21 really BACKFIRE for the Democrats? A surge of contributions from thousands of grassroots Americans giving just a few dollars to help us level the playing field against the MILLIONS OF DOLLARS that Hochul, AOC, and Mamdani will spend to BUY the midterms! Remember, it’s not the amount you give that’s important, Friend. What matters most is the sheer number of America First patriots who step up and stand with me against AOC’s radical defund-the-police agenda at this critical moment for our state – and our country. Let’s show AOC that REAL New Yorkers reject her Communist insanity. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: DNC HQ
subject: How we're going to kick Republicans out of Congress →
body:
---
Derek, **This summer, we’re making history by organizing earlier than ever before to kick Republicans out of office in 2026.** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250723_4036_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4036_22930333_208Y0Z&akid=4036%2E22930333%2E208Y0Z) In a minute, we’re going to ask you to [**make a $3 donation to support our early organizing efforts in key House and Senate races.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250723_4036_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4036_22930333_208Y0Z&akid=4036%2E22930333%2E208Y0Z) But first, let us tell you more about the Organizing Summer program. This program is historic. **If Democrats are going to take back Congress, we need to lay the groundwork right now.** That’s why we launched Organizing Summer in partnership with the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, and the Association of State Democratic Committees. Organizing Summer is a nationwide campaign to register voters, train up our volunteer base, and host in-person and virtual events in places where people need to hear from us the most. But we can’t do this work alone. Your donation now, along with the donations of thousands of grassroots supporters just like you, helps to fund these early investments and allows us to build our strongest organizational infrastructure yet. With your help, we can elect Democrats up and down the ballot who can act as a check on Trump’s power. [**Can you give $3 today to our Organizing Everywhere Fund? If everyone reading this email used this link to give what they could today, we would be able to expand our organizing efforts in key races and kick Republicans out of Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250723_4036_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4036_22930333_208Y0Z&akid=4036%2E22930333%2E208Y0Z) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250723_4036_fr&refcode2=4036_22930333_208Y0Z&akid=4036%2E22930333%2E208Y0Z)**

name: Randy Villegas
subject: You have every right to be pissed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112011720/559134902/1981932150?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFjZmVlZDUtMjE2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePZjv-vBwKFUk_g9rs2nhZfwKD51GMiI6dmhb3djARc=)
You have every right to be pissed. Because day after day, we’re told to settle. Settle for a political system that shrugs when working families get kicked off their health care. Settle for billionaires raking in profits while our kids sit in underfunded classrooms. Settle for politicians who do what their donors tell them to do. And it’s not just Republicans – it’s Democrats too. Democrats who campaign like they’re with us, then govern like they’ve never met a working person in their lives. **I won’t settle for that. And neither should you.** I’m running for Congress because our communities deserve better than broken promises and backroom deals. We deserve leadership that answers to us – not to corporate donors or elite party insiders. _I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs._ I’m not here to be polite to those in power. I’m here to flip this seat and fight like hell for the families who’ve been ignored for too long. _And guess what?_ That scares the hell out of the establishment. Just ask Zohran Mamdani in New York. Last month he took on a smear campaign funded by billionaires and won – because he stood with the people, not the elites looking to profit off our backs. That’s what this movement is about. Now it’s our turn – and why I’m counting on your support: **[Chip in $3 to show the establishment we’re done settling. Your support will build something stronger than their money: people power!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112011727/559134909/1981932150?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFjZmVlZDUtMjE2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePZjv-vBwKFUk_g9rs2nhZfwKD51GMiI6dmhb3djARc=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112011730/559134923/1981932150?refcode=em-7.23.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFjZmVlZDUtMjE2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ePZjv-vBwKFUk_g9rs2nhZfwKD51GMiI6dmhb3djARc=)

clean_body: | = You have every right to be pissed. Because day after day, we’re told to settle. Settle for a political system that shrugs when working families get kicked off their health care. Settle for billionaires raking in profits while our kids sit in underfunded classrooms. Settle for politicians who do what their donors tell them to do. And it’s not just Republicans – it’s Democrats too. Democrats who campaign like they’re with us, then govern like they’ve never met a working person in their lives. I won’t settle for that. And neither should you. I’m running for Congress because our communities deserve better than broken promises and backroom deals. We deserve leadership that answers to us – not to corporate donors or elite party insiders. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs. I’m not here to be polite to those in power. I’m here to flip this seat and fight like hell for the families who’ve been ignored for too long. And guess what? That scares the hell out of the establishment. Just ask Zohran Mamdani in New York. Last month he took on a smear campaign funded by billionaires and won – because he stood with the people, not the elites looking to profit off our backs. That’s what this movement is about. Now it’s our turn – and why I’m counting on your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being a part of this, Randy Villegas | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. name: SIGNATURE MISSING [VPP]
subject: Re: Colbert just DESTROYED Trump >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Are you with Colbert?
| **STEPHEN COLBERT HAS A STRONG MESSAGE FOR TRUMP:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=6&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an) Stephen Colbert needs EVERY Democrat in his corner after Trump celebrated — _and possibly even CAUSED_ — the downfall of his incredible show.

[**But we just checked our records, and you still haven’t signed our letter thanking Colbert for calling out Trump! ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=7&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=8&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an)
---
This is your last chance to sign, so please don’t wait!

_The Voter Protection Project_
**—ORIGINAL LETTER ATTACHED FOR YOUR REFERENCE—**
**This is __exactly__ what Trump had in mind when he went after CBS:**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=9&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an)
_Trump is attacking any voice that holds him accountable and speaks truth to his MAGA lies!_

That’s why he’s absolutely thrilled that Stephen Colbert’s late night program has been cancelled. **He said he “absolutely loves” that Colbert got fired — _we’re APPALLED!_**

[**To thank Stephen Colbert for his decade of hard work in the face of escalating MAGA attacks, we’re sending him a letter tomorrow at 9am promptly. Rush $3 to add your name before we hit send »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=10&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an)
[**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=11&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an)
---
TO: Stephen Colbert
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. Dear Stephen Colbert,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the last 10 years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

While Fox News and other far-right outlets spew misinformation and conspiracy theories, you have been a constant, outstanding voice for our democracy.

**We know this is exactly the outcome that Trump and his MAGA cronies wished for — _and we are committed to fighting back tirelessly to protect the free press._**

While I’m going to miss seeing you on TV every night, I’m glad you’ll finally be getting the much-needed rest and recuperation you deserve.

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who will stand with your progressive values and honor your legacy, and we are so sad to see you go. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=12&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=13&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92391?t=14&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20705%2E878179%2EuXs8an)
---

subject: The U.S. Census is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need grassroots support to push back against these attacks on our census
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112012957/559164577/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViM2U2MzgzLTI5NjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gd9ns7qOELMKcL8gnVIclXcmp8BXKidppQigjxCstfU=&emci=4c53f0ee-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb3e6383-2968-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, “The census is supposed to be unbiased, apolitical data,” writes MSNBC, in an article detailing how Project 2025 plans to politicize the census. But how did we get here? Since retaking office, Trump, his administration, and far-right allies in Congress have launched attacks on our democracy on multiple fronts, including the 2030 Census — the foundation for redistricting. It can all be traced back to Project 2025, which has an entire chapter dedicated to the Census Bureau. In this far-right playbook, MAGA Republicans explicitly state, “Strong political leadership is needed to increase efficiency and align the Census Bureau’s mission with conservative principles.” So much for “unbiased” and “apolitical.” **We cannot let Republicans hijack the census for their own political gains. The NDRC is working to protect the census so we have an accurate count and fair representation.[Can you make a donation to help power this critical work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112012958/559164578/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Project2025Census_email_202050723-NDRC-Tier1-Project2025Census_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050723-NDRC-Tier1-Project2025Census_&utm_campaign=Project2025Census&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViM2U2MzgzLTI5NjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gd9ns7qOELMKcL8gnVIclXcmp8BXKidppQigjxCstfU=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Make no mistake: Project 2025 is already in action. Anti-democracy attacks on the census _this year alone_ include:
* Rescinding an order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted.
* Wiping previously publicly available data from the Census Bureau website.
* Suing to stop the 2030 Census from counting all U.S. residents.
* Proposing a citizenship question, which could undercount the population in areas with high rates of immigrants.

**It’s clear: Republicans want to use the census to unfairly shift power away from minority communities.**
The NDRC is committed to defending the census to ensure an accurate count of our population and demographics — and fair maps. [**Please make a donation to protect our democracy from GOP attempts to undermine our census.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112012965/559164585/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Project2025Census_email_202050723-NDRC-Tier1-Project2025Census_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050723-NDRC-Tier1-Project2025Census_&utm_campaign=Project2025Census&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViM2U2MzgzLTI5NjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Gd9ns7qOELMKcL8gnVIclXcmp8BXKidppQigjxCstfU=)

clean_body: We need grassroots support to push back against these attacks on our census | Peter, “The census is supposed to be unbiased, apolitical data,” writes MSNBC, in an article detailing how Project 2025 plans to politicize the census. But how did we get here? Since retaking office, Trump, his administration, and far-right allies in Congress have launched attacks on our democracy on multiple fronts, including the 2030 Census — the foundation for redistricting. It can all be traced back to Project 2025, which has an entire chapter dedicated to the Census Bureau. In this far-right playbook, MAGA Republicans explicitly state, “Strong political leadership is needed to increase efficiency and align the Census Bureau’s mission with conservative principles.” So much for “unbiased” and “apolitical.” We cannot let Republicans hijack the census for their own political gains. The NDRC is working to protect the census so we have an accurate count and fair representation.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake: Project 2025 is already in action. Anti-democracy attacks on the census this year alone include: Rescinding an order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted. Wiping previously publicly available data from the Census Bureau website. Suing to stop the 2030 Census from counting all U.S. residents. Proposing a citizenship question, which could undercount the population in areas with high rates of immigrants. It’s clear: Republicans want to use the census to unfairly shift power away from minority communities. The NDRC is committed to defending the census to ensure an accurate count of our population and demographics — and fair maps. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump is now targeting the opposition's fundraising abilities. This is serious.
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.

body:

| | Peter,
You’ve been with us. You’ve seen what we’re up against. And you know what’s at stake for Colorado.
That’s why I’m inviting you to take the next step.
The Summit Circle is Rocky Mountain Voice’s leadership group, a community of bold, committed Coloradans who aren’t just watching the fight... they’re leading it.

As a member, you’ll be part of a strategic effort to expand our reach, amplify conservative voices, and hold the Left accountable. Your support will directly fuel the work we’re doing every single day from exposing the radical agenda to equipping voters with the truth.
****

But more than that, you’ll be part of something bigger. A statewide movement to expose the truth, amplify conservative voices, and push back against the radical machine trying to remake Colorado.
**[The Summit Circle isn’t for everyone. It’s for those who want to make a real, lasting difference.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
And I believe you’re one of them, Peter.

[Join the Summit Circle >>](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
We’re building something strong, loud, and unapologetic and it’s already working. With your leadership, we can take it to the next level.
Let’s get to work.
For liberty,

clean_body: It’s Cory Booker here – senator from New Jersey. | | = Hey folks, it’s Cory Booker here — senator from New Jersey. Earlier this year, I delivered the longest recorded speech in United States Senate history because what is happening in our country today, quite simply, cannot continue. I held the floor until my voice was raspy and I was out of breath because the stakes are SKY HIGH. And recently, I had the honor to give another speech (a little shorter this time!) to the California Democratic Party convention. I came all the way to the west coast because we need to take energy from Washington DC and carry it to all the states and communities that will decide control of the Congress. And this might surprise you since it leans blue at the presidential level, but California is at the very top of that list. = = = = = = If you aren’t sure about how critical California is at this moment, just look at how hard Donald Trump is fighting to crush the spirit of the state. In response, the California Democratic Party is working to scale their organizing programs sooner than planned. These are the same organizing programs that helped usher in victories for my new Congressional colleagues Derek Tran, Dave Min, Adam Gray, and George Whitesides in 2024. These members are now fighting against the Trump Administration and for everyday Americans in Washington. Your representatives are working hard. But I want to stop Trump and his cronies in their tracks, and we simply can’t do that if we don’t control Congress. The road to the House Majority runs straight through California – which is why we need to support expanded organizing programs right now. = = Thanks for everything, Cory Booker Senator, New Jersey | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Victor Riches
subject: [Exposed] How YOUR tax dollars fund Leftist indoctrination
body:
The CRISIS in America’s schools is hiding in plain sight.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqa4c7okg7kdgnubiu5j3fdoeoa994gnjvo49oc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj1cph2bs)
Friend,

The CRISIS in America’s schools is hiding in plain sight.

Over the last 40 years, K-12 education spending has skyrocketed, but instead of helping students and teachers, schools have used those funds to **flood classrooms with activists disguised as “administrators.”**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zraq33isvdcsdf5tg89p5ljcphbf6qcg78133638_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj1cph2bs)
They’re NOT teaching our kids reading, writing, or critical thinking.

**They’re indoctrinating them with toxic, Leftist ideology... _and they’re doing it all with YOUR TAX DOLLARS._**

I’m Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. **_We’re leading the fight to stop this ideological takeover of America’s schools_.**

Our **American Freedom Network of pro bono attorneys** defeats DEI indoctrination in public schools and defends parental rights in court. YOUR help ensures these legal battles are successful. [Please make a TAX-DEDUCTIBLE donation of $35, $50, $100, or more to defend students, empower parents, and restore real education >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjhc9g1cueb3bilhj15are1ht0jbk9q2u8buhh7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj1cph2bs)

**But this fight is far from over.**

Across the country, taxpayer dollars are STILL being funneled towards indoctrination.

Every child in America deserves to be GIVEN THE TOOLS to succeed... and given a REAL EDUCATION that teaches them gratitude and patriotism.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze5oig65r9bv3jgt2n547hunqp6reugat7kv5t3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj7c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeat08s4bgi14lnn5973ccinbhkmcopu3rot2p88_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj7c1h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2b3q6b9vpdo2n2sslt5g2r68cd0ldk7njn7s628_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj7c1h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z08b5kgtachjnfn1agmv54ajga2ohd5jh1ebef80_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj7c1h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0r3dr0ai8q35h3uiukd3mct7ttprva5dkdc73k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpim8oj7c1h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,

# Thursday, July 24, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in [1847, Brigham Young led Mormon pioneers into the Salt Lake Valley](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGu4yAQheGnwR0WHkNICopt3GXbLS1ixmGyY2MBG4u3X-XqvsGtP-kc6f9zn--emPbnb7-hq2uadzwLY62Y54i5RGzZU8FyZFqwrEzHEWdQYKSyEvQcPHGbdRfcigg4dugGa8bRDEYPXXR4sdY-rgG1WsZltavWN6-8gcVbvOlHR-6zpizoQSmjh37RJtiresCAwVo_CK0wUE25fyXaa8SVW3pj7pe0dexirUcR4y8Bk4DpPM8-Uqkpt48LmGqkIoNvknb5LQKm1z9uErSAaUt5S3uRBWtllMVzlez_onx7ZmxdduE4iZnKxQqtnpsn_rquP-r1dvA_AAD__yZhgVY), declaring it their new home after months of migration. This marked the start of large-scale Mormon settlement in the American West. Readers responded enthusiastically to yesterday’s poll about which defunct national chain you’d like to see return. The poll results are listed below, but many of you submitted your own choices, and we’d like to highlight the top reader picks here: They include Blockbuster, Toys “R” Us, Marshall Field’s, Montgomery Ward, Pier 1, and “any five-and-dime store!” Thank you to everyone who participated—it was a delightful trip down retail memory lane! Later today, we’ll send you an email on behalf of [American Hartford Gold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT2P1DAYhH-N02Xlr6z3ihSHlkgUdxJQUEbeeJwY-SOyvXvaf48MB-KEqM7tM-_o0fjb0_yknXdxfdYBY7VpjngpHrUizxty2XDP2hWUPbsFxXq379vMKR96qnouZ6Odv8-yM6MFOESHkalBiIENknXbKIXSF3m6yAcjNQVdDLVHPKjjcLJMXdC5sbVRxSWjdJDssMjBqBO9cAajlGZEUhhXUz58Ty7WDdbf0w35sKTQ-XGrdS9EPBI-ET4la5HLQQdkt-i46VxtymZN3rQ84ROCdv53kvDJZqBfr86A8Kn2LdlnFNRWKCYPbUq65gVEnD_-uj3qsBPx4VrD_AfhHxRg3DUQcX71fQOjDvgPqsjtqi3ChzdkSbEiViLOtWnOr5p_69hFh127NRJxVpQ932h7n8tWvn56_NLl0ewvzntXjopIujbpnzvWd33-beQ_AgAA___i5sVb), one of our trusted partners, about a bold theory that could signal the start of a once-in-a-generation financial reset. A few of us on the team are already exploring what it could mean for our own portfolios. We're sponsored today by [Boston Brain Science](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkTGL3DAUhH-N3HmRniTLW7gIHNtd2pTi2e95rUSWhCTu8L8PdwmkDVw5MHzDzPx49a8YYkjP73jy0vfsE7-3yL1z9QfXdvBVMTRupYaN2x5DKYcHCXaUbgTjCUO8vBlo2ZmB9cCLclZrq6xRw7FYo7SZ7pPRaHFeZwnKzW6_M1o93YmGsHzQpAOjpLRG3TZjyc1yBcXkHCphJFPoud5-5pD6wXu88hvX25bPIS5H76UJ_U3AQ8CjV9x-3VrHqx1YC3ZMFz75wyvgwZqJzIwj7oCjUQbGmXAbrVzl6jTLfb4L_SgRNz45daFfWq-Y6PSt5NRy9X_D_82UvFJKgxEwIQUS-kXvOVMTMPVPSaHy1lf_3yT_BzDUhcp7iDG0yQkjnyeG-Fm6f-mptwV-BwAA__-fwapY), offering nutritional advice to help keep your mind sharp.

## Wall Street Rallies on Japan Trade Deal
[Stocks soared Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1urDAUBOCnMR3Iv-tL4eI2dJs2JTL28dpZg5F9AuLtI_IK6UYa6RtpPp_z06actteHXcFgKPMGZ8uACHWOUFuEq9rUoO01OWghp32PM6dc9VT3XM7epnzNsvMmAHAQHRimlRCKKcm6aMbFggQHUnj9EEGO1Go3CrUEqscgWJfMrVHNJaNUSTY4qbz-RxfOwGttGZEUfMJSh6-SNowQ8lUOqIMra5dNRNwbEf8JnwifzvMc3La4uyR8umnCJ6rvzAmfGhb37ldb34A9Fm-vPqcD-u_dW4Q2RFxzV43fz5Rzag9NJH2tNuXfNfzTRYfhPwEAAP__JwN5-A) after President Trump unveiled a $550 billion trade pact with Japan, lifting market sentiment ahead of a key tariff deadline. The Dow jumped 508 points, the S&P 500 hit its 12th record close of the year, and the Nasdaq topped 21,000 for the first time. The [agreement includes Japanese commitments](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp_G3rAA85MMDF28pWtHC5vrcFMMCEhcv32VvkL37zs6Ol-3-WYxYLx_2h1M29Ic4agBWoMyeyjVw1ksVqi54Ap1C5iznznlklBNuJidxXDOondmA-Aw9mCYluMomRSs94ZLzZW7XqW8yKtQdhupVgtTVCiwIFWP5k2jmgtGqRRsWIV0-kIXzsBpbVknKDhsqQyPhLF52MKZXlCGNe19ML61XLvxo-NTx6fjOIYt_SzPihFqfW86PuUUsOFaOz618twzqbA-C1TisbZUcCVSUrJgCJgiacU6IA5sIA-bbSQRXlDIAhCJjWfzGO8k4DcQbH0xLh_vY1W6E_S-Wwx_Zu1fOV-G_wYAAP__jn6MGg) to buy 100 Boeing planes, increase rice imports by 75%, and boost U.S. defense spending to $17 billion annually. Japan will also open its market to more American goods and accept 15% reciprocal tariffs. Trump described it as "perhaps the largest deal ever made.” The White House said the deal will create hundreds of thousands of U.S. jobs.
## Hershey to Raise Candy Prices as Cocoa Soars
Hershey is [set to raise prices on its chocolate candy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFygzAQBNCvgU6MJATChYo0dE6bkhHSAZeROUYnm_jvM07yB-l3dvbtx3W6eky4r-_-Bq4sNO1wcoJSIE8bZN7gmT0y8JExAC8Jj2ObtNSdkFZoM0WP6TmZOroFQENbg1O2a9tOdUbVm-u1uUCvzWI6acyszADtIGcJQ2t7dWlrdK82abVRUnZGNcF00Q5y1gqitV5VRkLEQrn5JNzLBkt60gNyE-hWJ7eVcnDVvlV6rPR4nmez0Nd8Z9yB-ZWp9JiheEyVHv9I4mXCfRVho0DJFxC_PhHpPicQEVcsLAIF8iIQFxZMPosMB-VSZxePE1NC7m1l5HrzmH7mlH99-HD6OwAA__-16oil) by a "low" double-digit percentage as cocoa costs reach record highs, driven by crop disease and poor weather in West Africa. The Pennsylvania-based candy maker says the hike will reflect rising ingredient costs, including “the [unprecedented cost of cocoa](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQhuHTmMzIv-0mcLDSio160w1RtV1ArQxGttUtbj9iZm4w8SuV6vn-PaYHUKJ9-Qsb-jbnacd3TdgalmnFUlc8C1DFehQKWOdEx7FOSijLhePKTBEonZPpop8RFeoOvXRWayutkd3q8a4tBC3xiVIEPRh1n0HbW5QiSmlcR_66JpwyUghrZB-Mje4unkpidA4kMwIjtVz6_5n2tuKczvzC0oe8dcmvrR2V6V9MjUyN8AyXoF_ylZka_zyuMuYcmRq_RZz2UBAq8i8VD2sOOUFDHmCPJ4eNIi9UaV94yCEDU2NtuZxMjxSZ_i2VHgbh3NAVH483pUT15pgRywaUPj9rP5rz5dVHAAAA__9p7YkU)”—not tariffs or trade policies—and will roll out within 90 days, just ahead of Halloween. The increase includes both higher sticker prices and changes to packaging sizes. The price hike comes just weeks before former Wendy’s CEO Kirk Tanner takes over as Hershey’s new chief on Aug. 18.
## America’s Richest Person by State
A new map shows the [wealthiest person in each U.S. state](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1utDAQAJ8GOiP_7ee7wsXX0F3alMjBy3kjA5a9B-Lto8srpB_NSPP5mB6BMm3Pj7Ci52WfNjxbRmasU8LaEl41UMNWKs3YlkylpElLDUI6oe0UA-Vrsn30C6JG06NXDowBBVb1yUujZ2XszQYL7gZwB7sY0IDuDncFqif_tkmnrZISrBpmC9Hd5JdWGJ0LqrMSI_Feh--dNk645Gs_sA7zvvbZJ-bSOvO_02Onx_M8h4PaK-Q5FOKQqfEb7PS4hlIwCk4oKs0JG4uCte2boE3ggfUSL9FE48DY6bGvPpaTcqb2z3VWPtdA-bfJfxp1eP0TAAD__xaPfVY), with data pulled from _Forbes_ as of April 2025. Elon Musk, who now calls Austin, Texas, his home, tops the list nationally with $388 billion. Jeff Bezos ($206 billion) leads in Florida, while Warren Buffett still reigns in Nebraska with $165 billion. Only Alaska, Delaware, and West Virginia don’t have a billionaire, though West Virginia’s Brad Smith is close at $900 million. See the [richest person in your state here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1utDAQAJ8GOiP_7ee7wsXX0F3alMjBy3kjA5a9B-Lto8srpB_NSPP5mB6BMm3Pj7Ci52WfNjxbRmasU8LaEl41UMNWKs3YlkylpElLDUI6oe0UA-Vrsn30C6JG06NXDowBBVb1yUujZ2XszQYL7gZwB7sY0IDuDncFqif_tkmnrZISrBpmC9Hd5JdWGJ0LqrMSI_Feh--dNk645Gs_sA7zvvbZJ-bSOvO_02Onx_M8h4PaK-Q5FOKQqfEb7PS4hlIwCk4oKs0JG4uCte2boE3ggfUSL9FE48DY6bGvPpaTcqb2z3VWPtdA-bfJfxp1eP0TAAD__xaPfVY).

On this day in , declaring it their new home after months of migration. This marked the start of large-scale Mormon settlement in the American West. Readers responded enthusiastically to yesterday’s poll about which defunct national chain you’d like to see return. The poll results are listed below, but many of you submitted your own choices, and we’d like to highlight the top reader picks here: They include Blockbuster, Toys “R” Us, Marshall Field’s, Montgomery Ward, Pier 1, and “any five-and-dime store!” Thank you to everyone who participated—it was a delightful trip down retail memory lane! We're sponsored today by , offering nutritional advice to help keep your mind sharp. | Wall Street Rallies on Japan Trade Deal after President Trump unveiled a $550 billion trade pact with Japan, lifting market sentiment ahead of a key tariff deadline. The Dow jumped 508 points, the S&P 500 hit its 12th record close of the year, and the Nasdaq topped 21,000 for the first time. The to buy 100 Boeing planes, increase rice imports by 75%, and boost U.S. defense spending to $17 billion annually. Japan will also open its market to more American goods and accept 15% reciprocal tariffs. Trump described it as "perhaps the largest deal ever made.” The White House said the deal will create hundreds of thousands of U.S. jobs. Hershey to Raise Candy Prices as Cocoa Soars Hershey is by a "low" double-digit percentage as cocoa costs reach record highs, driven by crop disease and poor weather in West Africa. The Pennsylvania-based candy maker says the hike will reflect rising ingredient costs, including “the ”—not tariffs or trade policies—and will roll out within 90 days, just ahead of Halloween. The increase includes both higher sticker prices and changes to packaging sizes. The price hike comes just weeks before former Wendy’s CEO Kirk Tanner takes over as Hershey’s new chief on Aug. 18. America’s Richest Person by State A new map shows the , with data pulled from Forbes as of April 2025. Elon Musk, who now calls Austin, Texas, his home, tops the list nationally with $388 billion. Jeff Bezos ($206 billion) leads in Florida, while Warren Buffett still reigns in Nebraska with $165 billion. Only Alaska, Delaware, and West Virginia don’t have a billionaire, though West Virginia’s Brad Smith is close at $900 million. See the . name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: One more reason to believe America’s not done yet
body:
- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s
strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The
comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t
just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless.
- We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66834&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend,

I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the
years... but never one quite like this.

Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve
never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU.

I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._
while it was happening...

But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?

I DID.

And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar
before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring
Finale at UC Riverside...

You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66834&utm_term=lrm-active]

You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the
videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...

But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:

PATRIOTS LIKE YOU HELPED LAUNCH THE MOST POWERFUL CONSERVATIVE CAMPUS
TOUR IN AMERICAN HISTORY.

It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.

AND THE AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR’S SPRING FINALE WAS IN A PLACE NO ONE
THOUGHT WE’D EVER TOUCH: CALIFORNIA.

The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where
mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas
aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._

And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.

Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the
“Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.

And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love
America...”

They ERUPTED.

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66834&utm_term=lrm-active]

It wasn’t just another great tour stop...

IT WAS A BREAKTHROUGH.

Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it
was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.

And each one was just as powerful...

This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._

And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to
dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...

The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever
before.

_But let’s back up for a moment..._

Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the
Spring, this all started months ago.

BACK IN JANUARY, WHEN WE WERE LAYING OUT THE CALENDAR... THESE WERE
THE GOALS: GO BIGGER. GO BOLDER. GO DEEPER INTO LEFTIST TERRITORY.

We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe
“Red” states...

_But the ones the Left claimed as their own._

And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like
you — that’s exactly what we did.

LET ME GIVE YOU THE BIG PICTURE:

✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops

✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students

✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising
up

✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who
are rejecting them... _wholesale._

Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person..._
finally heard one._

Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag...
_were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._

Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of
something BIGGER than they ever imagined._

There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into
this one message...

BUT JUST LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE ACCOMPLISHING:

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66834&utm_term=lrm-active]

_Patriot, this is why we fight..._

Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.

BUT FOR A GENERATION-WIDE CULTURAL RESET — PLAYING OUT IN REAL TIME,
IN REAL PLACES, IN THE HEARTS OF REAL STUDENTS.

This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.

And I hope you know: IT WOULDN’T EXIST WITHOUT PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your
generous gifts — made all of this possible.

Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these
campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America
First message the most.

YOU WEREN’T JUST WATCHING THIS TOUR... YOU WERE POWERING IT.

Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._

The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...

But this summer?

We’re preparing for something even BIGGER.

We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New
targets in Leftist territory to break through.

We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to
complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.

To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds.

AND RAISE UP THE BOLDEST, MOST UNAPOLOGETIC GENERATION OF
FREEDOM-LOVING AMERICANS SINCE THE FOUNDING OF THIS COUNTRY.

_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, friend._

Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen
what’s possible...

We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._

Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.

The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps
rolling strong.

I CAN’T SAY “THANK YOU” ENOUGH TO THE PATRIOTS LIKE YOU WHO’VE
HELPED MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE FORCE IT IS TODAY.

TOGETHER, WE’RE SAVING AMERICA... ONE STUDENT AT A TIME.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66834&utm_term=lrm-active]

P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now...

_BUT I’VE NEVER SEEN MOMENTUM LIKE THIS._

These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our
ideas.

This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.

AND THE LEFT IS TERRIFIED.

You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our
students... But it’s not working anymore.

BECAUSE YOU AND I ARE REACHING THE NEXT GENERATION — CAMPUS BY
CAMPUS, STATE BY STATE, STUDENT BY STUDENT.

AND THAT’S WHY I’M ASKING YOU TO STAND WITH US AGAIN TODAY.
BECAUSE EVERY DOLLAR YOU GIVE TODAY WILL BE MATCHED.

That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And
your impact? DOUBLED.

_So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what
we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._

Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.

Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this
country when it returns this fall...

Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to
become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...

And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of
America’s young people again.

WE’RE NOT DONE. LET’S GO DEFEAT THE LEFT ONCE AND FOR ALL. MAKE
YOUR GIFT TO TURNING POINT USA TODAY AND HAVE YOUR IMPACT IMMEDIATELY
DOUBLED.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/14af5fe6-5de7-4bdf-b92e-089c6fd358b4?source_code=MAWCO66834&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA &
DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf. [] Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU. I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... shift... while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? I DID. And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too. [] You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of “USA!” from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: PATRIOTS LIKE YOU HELPED LAUNCH THE MOST POWERFUL CONSERVATIVE CAMPUS TOUR IN AMERICAN HISTORY. It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. AND THE AMERICAN COMEBACK TOUR’S SPRING FINALE WAS IN A PLACE NO ONE THOUGHT WE’D EVER TOUCH: CALIFORNIA. The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — they’re punishable offenses. And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED. [] It wasn’t just another great tour stop... IT WAS A BREAKTHROUGH. Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. It was a line in the sand. And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before. But let’s back up for a moment... Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago. BACK IN JANUARY, WHEN WE WERE LAYING OUT THE CALENDAR... THESE WERE THE GOALS: GO BIGGER. GO BOLDER. GO DEEPER INTO LEFTIST TERRITORY. We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... But the ones the Left claimed as their own. And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did. LET ME GIVE YOU THE BIG PICTURE: ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... wholesale. Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... finally heard one. Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country. Students who were told they were alone... realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined. There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message... BUT JUST LOOK AT WHAT WE'RE ACCOMPLISHING: [] Patriot, this is why we fight... Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students. BUT FOR A GENERATION-WIDE CULTURAL RESET — PLAYING OUT IN REAL TIME, IN REAL PLACES, IN THE HEARTS OF REAL STUDENTS. This is why the American Comeback Tour matters. And I hope you know: IT WOULDN’T EXIST WITHOUT PATRIOTS LIKE YOU. Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible. Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most. YOU WEREN’T JUST WATCHING THIS TOUR... YOU WERE POWERING IT. Now, let me be totally honest: We’re not done. Not even close. The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring... But this summer? We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through. We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour. To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. AND RAISE UP THE BOLDEST, MOST UNAPOLOGETIC GENERATION OF FREEDOM-LOVING AMERICANS SINCE THE FOUNDING OF THIS COUNTRY. I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, friend. Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible... We can’t back down. Not now. Not ever. Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING. The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong. I CAN’T SAY “THANK YOU” ENOUGH TO THE PATRIOTS LIKE YOU WHO’VE HELPED MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE FORCE IT IS TODAY. TOGETHER, WE’RE SAVING AMERICA... ONE STUDENT AT A TIME. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA [] P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now... BUT I’VE NEVER SEEN MOMENTUM LIKE THIS. These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas. This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL. AND THE LEFT IS TERRIFIED. You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore. BECAUSE YOU AND I ARE REACHING THE NEXT GENERATION — CAMPUS BY CAMPUS, STATE BY STATE, STUDENT BY STUDENT. AND THAT’S WHY I’M ASKING YOU TO STAND WITH US AGAIN TODAY. BECAUSE EVERY DOLLAR YOU GIVE TODAY WILL BE MATCHED. That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall... Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next. Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement... And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. WE’RE NOT DONE. LET’S GO DEFEAT THE LEFT ONCE AND FOR ALL. MAKE YOUR GIFT TO TURNING POINT USA TODAY AND HAVE YOUR IMPACT IMMEDIATELY DOUBLED. [] SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA & DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

## Lawmakers Discuss Flood Relief, Advance THC Bill
Texas lawmakers [discussed flood relief](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpTAMhZ8mdEGJ-S9SbEM3226JTOJcIgJBiXWZefsV9xWm-yRLn885_76WLwwxnK-_eJDhb5-Wk-4SiZny4lPmNYZSbDo5o2U8OOOe0wIKOqkGCe3iMMSfpa2cWZWbdEVGD13TdO046moztmu7DrBHrZSDlUalrXdjPw099s77KphHpgZotVZajzWAmpwf-0Z3akIg0SpygVOueSOmbyw-_qQ35dqmo4pmY76KaP4ImAXM933Xe0F-jgLmp42A-UoxcLAPPt8EzGp4uBEwf5Qy4n3gTrnIlV7hlJnegW6ZvLTIWDinawtW-piSK5I3ZLmHGMlJZBkJC0vdPOIqG3fdIcZQ-kG06nVgiJ-o_LuB3wb-BwAA__-rzpAS) and preparedness at the Capitol yesterday, as [dozens of bills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGutCAUBOCn0Q4DiIoFxd_Y7d_e0iAcVrJHMXCy7L79ze4r3GaaSb5J5ue23mzEeN7_2wMMvUJaT6gFgQjyGlKmDWMpLp2UrSN7ULaPnFbJ5cD4xKRavY34XlXrzcb9LFowYhr6flBai3Y3Gkbu1OS0smFWwg1OhHlyvVZhGwX0bTQfjE9SCcGF0J2UfPZBj70Y-GwlNIqDj5RyRzsQvGwJ-E5PyJ1LR4tmJ7pK0_9r5NLIpdba3dOTwO2fvpELfOLKcNkM_oRSGrl8GYa2HvYBubAQEVhBqCwFtkXE0mbjrxoRYxmnRvH7YSN-F-lvPz2N_A0AAP__Huh-dA) have been filed to address issues pertaining to the devastating disaster earlier this month. The number missing in Kerr County is now two after a woman’s body was [found in Kerrville](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7bgGQwuKFZaucs2q9WW1rMBBw02EbxJ4r8fJcX8wLT3Skf3nv-X-YIxxWP7g7u39Ax5PvyjJk_kyxxyoSXFWtd8UMGVcKeCHyXPwEG1XLcgZ4cxnbNsnF24G0XjrdCq75U0RjRXGwaDnKtFDkoNozdam3XgIiiFq8bgm2hfMK5BCsGFMB0AH10wQy8UHxE8k9y7SLl0dPXkn1hDOvPdl27Ne5PslehWWf-LwcRgwmV9Pei2_KoZTP_-MpiW7M52j7XGY2sfecejDfnzcC18p29yi4F8YTBVyuVk_RQd638L6MeRawNNse72iCnFOmgm-bZjTO8Z9DN5dwtfAQAA__9UkIMH). A Senate committee on Tuesday advanced legislation to ban THC-infused hemp products, resisting Gov. Abbott’s call to impose strict regulations on the industry. "_We'll regulate it by banning it. Because we already tried regulating it_ ," [said Sen. Bob Hall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOiPbQIDCxTV0ufZKtHjXwTpjI3sTkrc_Eeme4C93R_NpZv7clzv44OPjN-xk-O3SEuksgZgpLy5lXoMvxabIGSzDzhn-5rRoqXshB6G7BcGHz9LVaFaJk6rJqKFv274bR1VvBpyccCWLLfYgaVLqJrHXbnDYTc6utTcXTA66U0oqNTZaywndeGtVLyfQVHWS0HPKDW_E9Ibiwie9KDc27XUwG_NRqvZXpedKz-d5NnYtV4tLr_T8tVR6vl7_T1EoApN4JaYiOIkVouDNiiMnfFouAnaP4pEOUbZ0YjqjgIjCR3wWzh9hU7SU4wWss8Hj9CH4chuqTj528OGbjX-26MvofwEAAP__aMiPCQ) (R-Edgewood). Abbott agreed that the products should be banned for Texans under 21 while insisting they should be [accessible to adults](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOiN7DRgXLq5J9197JVrwAlYMjuxNSN7-RF7hb0ejbzTfv5_xB0MMx_oXd3L8XtJ40FkiMVMel5R5iqGUOR2ccWbcOeM9pxEkdEIaAe3oMcTP2NbeTdJbVZNTptO6a4dB1ZuzupcT9pP3pPS86GFuURs_GCsRetvVwV0waaBVSio1NADS-mXoteqkRaCqleQDp9zwRkxvLEv8pBflZk57Hd3G_CiV_lPBrYLbeZ7NdeEkul-FCm5rplXgNCVmUYiLSE8Wr1BCOsSXJ3ibRab1GZGvEJQEY2ydnX-cIcZQelO1ct0xxO8o_07Vy8H_AAAA__-CjH77). House lawmakers are reportedly more open to Abbott’s position. On Tuesday, Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick released a list of [16 priority bills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_OozAQxJ_GdEb2Yv4VLq6hy7VXImOWZBVjI3svJG__ibzC185oRjO_f7f55ihQvP91O1p-b2mOeJaAzJjnLWVeApXiU-TsPLuds3vmNIOCVqpegplXR-Ezm2q1i1pHXaHVfds0rRkGXT0sdn4ZFq18iwCooe8NQtc142KM2TZVkb3KVA9Ga6X1UAOocd2GrtGtGh2gMApX4pRrfiDj25UtfNILc-3TXgX7YD6KaP4ImARM53nWz7eLlylgut4ImL4xeaRATP4SAst7esnDcSb_lC7G9D96LFJ38siUMvFHFoyOUS4UQpFbyrIc6MkFWbAUSlHAVGW7HieFQKXrhVH33VH4DuPf4XxZ-AkAAP__OOuMaA) addressing Abbott's 18 special session agenda items.
## Contract Awarded for Fort Bliss Detention Center
The Department of Defense has awarded a Virginia company an initial contract of $232 million to build and operate a 5,000-bed detention center at the U.S. Army's Fort Bliss in El Paso. When finished in September 2027, it will be the [largest detention center](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGy4yAMQE-DOzIgwNgFxTZ0f9stPcTIMbPYZED_O7n9DrnCdiqk9-bpz9fyFVJO5-N3ONDRayvLiVfLSIR12Uqle06treWkGlYKB9Xwt5YFBBguLAe9xJDye9FDdHcRZzmgk9YoZfQ0yWF3SiDIaLYQIygY7yPqLZpZz6sFqwIOyXWYsKClFFJONwAxx20alTRiDoBMC4yJSr3RjoSv0Lb8Lj9Yb2s5hux2omdj6hcDz8Bf13XD_AytUDqw9R0GvlGpbwa-xzHw6TjSowZK5WTgu5-BF7bPioHv3fwTzqnwvTTiOdQHNuJpRR6R8Oy3fMWTsPKIz1Lpg-P7952nk393zWSUGrWx4oMeqovPK-Wc2miZFo8jpPxpoP_7_I-DfwEAAP__M9SX-Q) for illegal immigrants in the U.S. In March, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth authorized ICE to use the base to house illegal immigrants. Acquisition Logistics of Virginia was one of 13 companies to submit bids for the project, which is [estimated to cost $1.26 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdEa2MeAtXGwRikg3KVOiAQ9gxT8re3a59-0jVskTpJ7Rd853fn3MH-CDT_sPiGjpc8tzwrMGJMIyb7nQEnyta05UYCWIVOB3ybMSqudi5ErPDnz4mnXj7CLcTTZo5dh3Xa-Nkc1h5di5de1WCQZAaLnK3oxghmVxYLpNNt5eMDEqLaWQ0rRKiZvbzNDJXtxAIdMCnadcWjqQ8BPqFr7yC0u75tgEexA9KuvuTE1MTed5trGm68bUhIk_K1PTJcXUlOnAwtRE5RkfHE4ornLJ1cAXH4LPif8z5ZT58vTB8cXvO1biPka_F0jEHRImen9jIizc_02Bwu93-V1_-_lqinWP84LWYWRa7BF8eBem_5v5ZdWfAAAA__9iApPo). The Trump administration is currently on track to deport [more than 300,000 illegal immigrants](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAUhE9jOpD_sKFwkYZu06ZEBtvLU2yM7JeFvX1ErpBupBnNaL6vx_ywEGF_ftrkDV4hz7s_a_SIvswhF1wi1LrmHYtd0SYs9rvkmVPet1S3XM7OQnzPsnFmoW5kjTdM90L0chhYsxkRtAqLdFqrkdlxWAYlgtKslypI1osGzF1GNZeMUcaGjnM6ujAowXo6Wu6JpN4B5tLh5tFftob4zi9fujWnJpoN8ahEfBA-ET6d59mtS71f3D7h0y0Jn2D1rfNHLmgR8l5bLD_paCtcbco7bnemKcYdJ8QIVWki6TNZiH8z-D84L8N_AwAA__8jtXm6) this year, which is the most since 2012 but less than its goal of 1 million a year. ## Texas Cities with Best Quality of Life
Austin, Houston, Dallas, and McAllen are among the top 25 cities in the U.S. offering a [high quality of life](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU8DHcgeDDaFizR0mzYlGrBZRjGY2JNluX20e4V0v3h6X3pft_GGFGi_f-LmLT-XOO7-zMEz-zQuMfEUKOc57pxwZtw44XeKIwhoK6ErUKNDCteoSmcn4XpZeit12zStMkaWqzUCQDiDs1J66pq-a5wGhWLyba87I0uyL5nQoKQUUpoaQPRuMV0jW9Ej-EIJ74hjqnn17J-Yl3DFh0_1HLcy2JX5yEXzUcBQwHCeZ71dGXfcOe4UX1ABQ6DFZ76CL2DAxDS_19tW_fxiIL6quFQvrJqJyecKhDZCSlUf61Em646TQqDc6UKJ-4YU3v_8v2oPC38BAAD__w0oga8), according to a newly released ranking by _U.S. News & World Report_. The study examined factors such as climate, affordability, entertainment, and green spaces. With a burgeoning tech sector and a plethora of live music options, Austin is No. 13 on the list. Its air quality is in the top 5% of U.S. metros, and it offers [nearly 20,000 acres](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9y8yAQBPCnQZ00cEISLii-Rp2_NqXmBIfNBAkHTv7z9hln8gbpf7M7ux_n5Ywxxf3yHzey_Ax52elREzFTWUIuvKZYq8s7F3SMGxf8LHkBCUMrpxb04jGm16Ibb1fpT6ohq6ah7wdtjGqudhp9MEEbVD6sDv0EBG5yOCqvpTauifYdJifQSkmlTAcgTz6YsVeDPCGQ0JJ85Fw6vhLTE2tIr3yn0rm8NclemW9V9P8EzAJmPCrHvXNH4qPQhre3EjC_ZwmYC2FqqTIyCZhXqtx-HZgiv9oUA7VHbX9lU6y_PWJKsY6T0PKyYUw_lfy3o-4WvgMAAP__Pgx_GA) of outdoor recreational space. At No. 15, Houston boasts over 10,000 restaurants, including Tex-Mex, Vietnamese, barbecue, and Louisiana-Creole cuisine. It’s in the top 20% of cities in affordability, with a median home value of $276,828. It’s also [No. 5 in access to health care](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u6yAQhJ8Gd0SwxrFdUNyGLrc9pbWGdYKCjQWbv7c_cl7hdCvtaL6Z-blMF4wpbtf_uJLl95KnjV41ETOVacmF5xRr9Xnjgp5x5YL3kidQ0EnVSzBTwJg-k2mCnVUYdUNW913bdmYYdHOzcCY1GzIaDY5kgvJDp3WYwaNHjaaJ9jBTPRitldbDCUCNYRnOre7UiEDCKAqRcznxjZjeWJf0yU8qJ5_XJtkb815F-0-AE-DqTp7LY03ZYzq6HCoBjt8CHD4qx02AOx4C3EEW4FR_3K0At-RHkV-G9JEjVVlwu0tc83aVnHcJnZypstwTeqqSs0zxSU2xYX_FlGI998Ko64oxfePx30Z9WvgNAAD__4kFjDc). Likewise, Dallas, No. 20, is in the top 5% of cities for health care access, and its median home value of $337,445 is lower than similarly sized cities. At No. 23, McAllen boasts year-round sunshine and the ninth-lowest cost of living. See the full list [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvS3CAQhE8jZahgJPQICJwo-506VI1g2KU8WmSYfd3etbZv4LS7q6v7-_G1fWHidLt8x4OcvGLebvSsTCJUtpiL7Jxq9fkmBb3gIQV_lryBBqv0pGDYAiZ-b0Mb3K7DYlpyZrJ9b4d5Nu3VjVZDwJF8tGOY_bhbH_QSYfS9txNBm9ynTE8wGKONmTsAvYQ4j72xekGgZtAUkuTSyZWEXlgjv_ODSufz0bK7ipy16b81sDawFkKmKijU3evnyyf1T1d_jQZWLJI8U21glXyqnaqok9FTVZIVpwepmIv6dUdO8lY5Kk6R2uLC-UzMqY5TM-jLgYn_rJD_Y_dw8DsAAP__zm6GOw).

subject: Average Mainer Needs to Earn $60k Annually to Afford a 2-Bedroom Apartment, Study Shows
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Average Mainer Needs to Earn $60k Annually to Afford a 2-Bedroom Apartment, Study Shows (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=3ac0afeb57&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jul 24, 2025 06:50 am
Mainers need to make over $45,000 annually on average to afford a one-bedroom apartment in the state, and they need nearly $60,000 if they want to live in a two-bedroom apartment, according to a recent survey. This translates to a so-called housing wage of $22.41 per hour for a one-bedroom apartment and $28.42 for a [...]

name: Defend Our Courts Team
subject: They’re coming for the courts — one judge at a time.
body:
This isn’t small potatoes — it’s a strategic wave of judicial purges, mapped, trained, and fully funded by right-wing groups ahead of the crucial upcoming elections.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001piEeke9iFKgzOs5rIUC3uSMuoxBUtaEbhouQzZEtKUTd7px3gtn8BUVYIZJHnx0q0t0_21VDUrnxSCHFyip4NpXfH9UdNsQLYgU9g5e-Wx1YxRIwb4PwfiUyDLQcVY4J9NrTGd5b-epUnYLCGRT475DARaPkDnA0k8DLsS25lkY8adQMMQAKkV2Ia-umpOYTNOxklhYN-r4WAZQq_RBVHbLhBUc6WcQp0XRGwhVEhyk=&c=R20eZxrsthG-8dsrSl8rYOMhqr1jQFr4EZrGZ7krxO5hUJqMSzUaNg==&ch=e8mLj4HKPpF2EShWBs478266MZn1g0i8JpuYVUWxiatAEfDN9gUmfw==)

| Peter,
You've seen MAGA's strategy: They don't try to win everything at once. They pick off judges -- one vote at a time.
Now, Pennsylvania's Supreme Court Race is ground zero in the fight for the future of our democracy.
This isn't small potatoes -- it's a strategic wave of judicial purges, mapped, trained, and fully funded by right-wing groups ahead of the crucial upcoming elections.
We need you to sound the alarm, mobilize local Democratic voters voters, and defend our seats with everything we've got.
[Can we count on your support today? Your donation fills the billboards, funds the mailers, and launches the ads needed to protect our courts.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001piEeke9iFKgzOs5rIUC3uSMuoxBUtaEbhouQzZEtKUTd7px3gtn8BUVYIZJHnx0q0t0_21VDUrnxSCHFyip4NpXfH9UdNsQLYgU9g5e-Wx1YxRIwb4PwfiUyDLQcVY4J9NrTGd5b-epUnYLCGRT475DARaPkDnA0k8DLsS25lkY8adQMMQAKkV2Ia-umpOYTNOxklhYN-r4WAZQq_RBVHViv-YjaNnIcVvkCfWaakmI=&c=R20eZxrsthG-8dsrSl8rYOMhqr1jQFr4EZrGZ7krxO5hUJqMSzUaNg==&ch=e8mLj4HKPpF2EShWBs478266MZn1g0i8JpuYVUWxiatAEfDN9gUmfw==)

Dear Fellow Investor, Elon Musk isn't preparing for peace. And with the US joining the Israel-Iran war, no one should be. Musk recently bought 10,000 advanced AI chips - and is reportedly looking to spend $1 billion more. It's no coincidence that this comes as U.S. generals warn of a two-front war scenario: China and the Middle East. Now there's a lesser-known AI company that makes one of the most in-demand chips on the market... And they're not just 2.4x more powerful than NVIDIA's - they could be essential to Musk's AI empire, the Pentagon, and NASA. **[Get the name of the stock here>>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1964430/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmVoaW5kdGhlbWFya2V0cy1idG0uY29tL0xKWExGNC9IN0pKNzgv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjQ/LbmNsdlI0U2VHOQ/qP2NyZWF0aXZlX2lkPTM3MDM/gaIIX4g/s5u1f73d6c1)** All the best, Simmy Adelman, Publisher **_Behind the Markets_**

name: Julia Kortrey, Evergreen
subject: Demand accountability from the culprit blocking cheaper energy
body:
PJM will be raising energy prices again next summer. Act now >>
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3808608/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| **🔔 _UPDATE_ : **_PJM Interconnection released the results of its latest auction on Tuesday, and it’s bad for consumers who live across the Mid-Atlantic.

Despite repeated warnings from governors, advocates, and industry leaders, PJM just doubled down on expensive, unreliable fossil fuels by raising its clearing price by a record-breaking _**_22 percent_** _—another indication of its ongoing failure to clear the backlog of clean energy projects and adequately plan the grid for the future.

Ratepayers like you can’t afford to keep paying record-high prices because of PJM’s mismanagement. _[**_Will you take a minute right now to send a message to your lawmakers asking them to hold PJM accountable for blocking clean, cheap energy?_**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3808609/87SdQ4wZ)

* * *
|
---
| Have you noticed your electric bills are significantly higher than usual this summer, friend?

You can thank **PJM Interconnection** , the largest grid operator in the U.S., serving 65 million people across 13 states.

Instead of prioritizing clean energy that is faster to build and 50 percent cheaper than gas, they’re keeping thousands of clean energy projects in limbo and greenlighting old, dirty energy sources like gas and coal.

PJM regularly holds “energy auctions” to determine which types of energy sources will power our homes, and another auction is coming up **this Tuesday.**

All eyes are going to be on PJM, watching to see if they finally take action to put clean, affordable energy sources on the grid, or if they’ll stick with business as usual.

**This month, families are paying _up to 30 percent more_ on their electric bills. We shouldn’t stand for another rate hike. **[**Will you write to your lawmakers right now and ask them to hold PJM accountable?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3808610/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3808611/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| As the people that run our grid, you’d think that PJM’s job would be to keep our energy reliable and affordable, right?

Well, it turns out their board and 1,000+ voting members are mostly fossil fuel CEOs and energy traders who make more money for themselves when PJM shuts out competition from cheaper clean energy.

So, instead of investing in cheap, clean energy like wind and solar, which would lower our bills and make our air cleaner to breathe, **PJM keeps doubling down on dirty fossil fuels—all while doubling the salaries of their own executives.**

Governors in New Jersey, Maryland, and Pennsylvania have already publicly called PJM out as the main reason utility bills have soared, but your legislators need to know that you support cleaner, more affordable energy, too. [**Tell them it’s time to hold PJM accountable and make electricity affordable again.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3808612/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3808611/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for raising your voice, |
---
| | |
---
### Julia Kortrey
Deputy State Policy Director
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Big Beautiful Bill News
subject: Do you approve of the Big Beautiful Bill?
body:
Beautiful Bill = Big Win for America

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zobftfotdhadcrj20qnrd18hb2v94mbtk52djo5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpjm2or6cph2bs)
Friend,

This is our very FIRST **[End-of-Month deadline](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuskcjd96lmj2s9ivvt3s3vu797v8hh9p92hesgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpjm2or6cph2bs)** since the Big Beautiful Bill passed--and we need to know:

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.
