body:
They’re turning to the Obama Machine...

Friend,

The Democrat Party is completely falling apart.

Their approval rating currently sits at a record low, and over the last few months, multiple high-ranking officials QUIT rather than try to turn things around.

But while the Democrats use Obama to raise MILLIONS to try and BUY the midterms, they continue to underestimate the most powerful force in politics...

Remember, our strength isn't the __amount__ our supporters give, but rather the __sheer number__ of patriots who step up to help DEFEND America from Obama and the Democrats.

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: 6-3! Defunding Planned Parenthood is now a reality
body:
Great news as champions for life today!

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z62eoc09u45j3sj8u2rmhfh1trknro6li09k7r30_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpjmapb6chh2bs)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo2jqm72teho1lm658qkimsvs6j6rsm67tekrbj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpjmapb6chh2bs) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zslrm5312r0kcuaaladm8tolkd2kc12inc0vu8oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpjmapb6chh2bs) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel ****

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News

clean_body: Great news as champions for life today! | | | Dear Champion of Life, Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood! The decision in Medina v. Planned Parenthood reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid. This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead. Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda. No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end. And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion. Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed states to defund Planned Parenthood. Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. But to do that we need your help, today. as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state. In Christ, Julia Payne Koon Legal Counsel **** Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

---

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt, alongside Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, **[clashed with CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/a3355e41-9b4e-4214-b18a-cbaea04b1b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when she accused Gabbard of releasing her Russia Collusion bombshell this week merely to boost her standing with President Donald Trump.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a3355e41-9b4e-4214-b18a-cbaea04b1b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a3355e41-9b4e-4214-b18a-cbaea04b1b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What do you say to people who believe that you're only releasing these documents now to improve your standing with the president after he said that your intelligence assessments were wrong?" Collins asked Gabbard of the **[bombshell report she released earlier this week,](https://substack.com/redirect/a3355e41-9b4e-4214-b18a-cbaea04b1b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** alleging that former President Barack Obama manufactured the Russia Collusion hoax to derail Trump's 2016 campaign.
Gabbard corrected the misleading phrasing of Collin's question before turning the podium over to Leavitt, who stepped up ready to brawl.
**["Who is saying this,](https://substack.com/redirect/a3355e41-9b4e-4214-b18a-cbaea04b1b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that she released this to try to boost her standing with the president?!" Leavitt demanded. "Who is saying that? The only people suggesting that the DNI would release evidence to boost her standing with the president are the people in this room who constantly try to sew distrust and chaos in the president's cabinet! And it's not working!!"
Watch the heated moment unravel here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a3355e41-9b4e-4214-b18a-cbaea04b1b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---|---|---
The Governor of Florida just created a new opportunity for you. One that could put you ahead for the first time in years.I know this sounds unbelievable, but the details prove everything.
Because on May 27th, Governor DeSantis just signed HB 999 making gold and silver legal tender in Florida, following Missouri. Then on June 29th, Texas followed suit, legalizing Gold as money.
Starting next year, Starting July 2026, Texans, Missourians, and Floridians can pay state taxes with gold coins. They can buy groceries with silver. Even use PayPal for precious metals transactions.
But here's the opportunity, if you're bold enough: When gold restrictions were lifted in '74, smart Americans who got positioned early saw 179% gains by 1980.
That's like getting 18.6% returns a year, for six years straight. And in the past 12 months alone, Goldman Sachs reports that its _**["Nearly doubled the returns of the S&P 500 Index."](https://substack.com/redirect/f1e72087-fcf9-42e1-b2ee-672b15f8ec64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
Now this new event could trigger one of its biggest moves yet.
As much as 50% or more in the coming years. But the clock's ticking.

[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/2588ba46-e271-485a-8edf-19dbc05fead1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Thug accused of throwing cinder block at ICE during riots finally arrested at border
Elpidio Reyna, a 39-year-old Compton man **[wanted by the FBI for throwing concrete blocks at federal agents](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8612d1-ef37-4865-a31c-ca3bf4890240?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during anti-ICE riots, was arrested Wednesday at the US-Mexico border after being placed on the FBI's wanted list following the violent June 8 incident in Paramount, Los Angeles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/036dfdde-7858-4bbb-a6a5-1d79416a97dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Reyna was arrested by the same Border Patrol officer whose vehicle he had damaged during the attack** , with US Attorney Bill Essayli noting the "brave law enforcement officer who could have been killed" in the "dangerous and reckless attack" got to make the arrest personally.
* **After initially fleeing to Mexico to evade capture, Reyna was detained by Mexican authorities in Sinaloa state** earlier this month but later agreed to surrender to the FBI, leading to his custody at the San Ysidro Port of Entry on felony charges of assault on a federal officer.
* **The arrest serves as a warning to other anti-law enforcement attackers** , with officials emphasizing that masks and helmets won't protect violent rioters, as Attorney General Pam Bondi stated "You can run, but you can not hide. If you attack a law enforcement officer, we'll find you."

* * *
# Sen. Blackburn warns woke schools not to try to hide DEI programs behind coded language
Senator Marsha Blackburn **[warned three Tennessee universities to eliminate DEI programs](https://substack.com/redirect/c161900c-adb4-41c1-ba21-2c831b890c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** or risk losing federal funding, sending letters to Belmont University, University of Tennessee-Knoxville, and Vanderbilt University after hidden camera recordings revealed they were disguising DEI initiatives behind sanitized language.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b58d78e6-58fa-46c9-afb0-3679f0664686?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **[Undercover videos caught university employees admitting their institutions renamed DEI programs to avoid scrutiny](https://substack.com/redirect/a0a70bd5-b1f4-46f4-9a93-65e9c214fe7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , with UT wrapping initiatives under "Access & Engagement," Vanderbilt using the "Center for Student Wellbeing," and Belmont not only continuing DEI but also enrolling illegal aliens despite ICE raids.
* **Blackburn argued that "renaming woke DEI programs to circumvent compliance" degrades education quality** and violates universities' responsibility as federal funding recipients to align with President Trump's executive order and focus on providing quality education to students.
* **The Trump administration has taken a combative stance against "woke" initiatives on college campuses** , threatening or yanking taxpayer funding from top-tier schools over DEI programs, antisemitism, and other issues, with Harvard already losing more than $2 billion in frozen funding.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Sixteen years ago today, the federal minimum wage was raised to $7.25
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
And it’s remained the same ever since.
#
$7.25 — that’s the federal minimum wage right now, Peter.
**The federal minimum wage was raised to $7.25 on July 24, 2009 — exactly SIXTEEN years ago TODAY — and it’s remained the same ever since.** According to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, _$7.25 in 2025 has the buying power of less than $5 in 2009._
In those sixteen years, we’ve all seen the cost of living skyrocket. Housing costs are higher. Groceries are more expensive. Healthcare costs are through the roof. And yet millions of workers are still being paid wages that don’t even cover the basics.
**Let’s be clear:_If they wanted to, Congress could raise the minimum wage._** But year after year, corporate-backed politicians have blocked every attempt to deliver real raises for working Americans. They have no idea what it’s like to live paycheck-to-paycheck — and they have no sympathy for anyone who does.
With your help, we can root these power-hungry politicians out of Congress and elect leaders who will actually stand up for families like yours by working to increase the minimum wage and lower costs across the board. So what do you say, Peter?
**[Will you help us elect candidates who will stand up for working families by chipping in $10 or whatever you can today? We’re building an entirely grassroots movement, without a cent from corporate PACs or billionaire mega-donors, to take back power for everyday Americans — and we won’t be able to do it without your support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92559?refcode=em20250724-9162&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9162%2E614464%2Euch0aZ)**

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Do you fully understand everything going on with the Constitutional Amendment to overturn Citizens United? Please read every word of this email. - Citizens United has and allowed for 15 years! - MAGA billionaire Elon Musk spent a cumulative $330 million to get Donald Trump BACK into the White House. - Amazing Democrats like are RACING to protect our Democracy and pass a Constitutional Amendment to DESTROY Citizens United. - So we're to hit our goal and pass this Constitutional Amendment. - If we can raise $5O,OOO by MIDNIGHT, we'll take a major step - | | | | | | | If we fall short of our goal, the Constitutional Amendment will be TRASHED. We know. It is ambitious. We're going ALL IN to get this done. That's why we need YOU to step up RIGHT AWAY! | | | | | | Overturning this terrible decision is the reason we exist. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Did you see this news, Peter? They're not raising that kind of money to protect your Second Amendment rights. They 're raising it to crush Ken Paxton and keep the anti-gun establishment in power. Why? Because Ken Paxton is everything they hate. ✅ As Attorney General, he filed more than 20 lawsuits to protect gun rights, including efforts to stop unconstitutional federal gun control. ✅ He stood up to the Biden administration, challenging ATF overreach and fighting back against red flag laws. ✅ And while weak Republicans like Cornyn cut deals with Democrats to ram through Biden's gun control agenda, Paxton has never wavered. | | Gun owners trust Ken Paxton--because he's proven he'll fight for us. John Cornyn has betrayed us by co-authoring Biden 's gun control bill--the very law that opened the floodgates for Red Flag gun confiscation laws nationwide and put countless veterans and law-abiding citizens at risk. That's why the establishment is dumping millions into this race. They know if Ken Paxton gets to the Senate, the gun control gravy train comes to a screeching halt. But here's the issue: GOA Victory Fund doesn't have $11 million in the bank. We have to count on 2A patriots like YOU , who can support us with a ** GOA isn't funded by dark money billionaires; we're funded by patriots who want to join us in fighting for their rights! | | | | | | | | This is our moment to defeat the swamp and send a clear message: Gun rights are NOT for sale.** Let's get it done. In liberty, John Velleco Executive Vice President GOA Victory Fund | | | | | Paid for by GOA Victory Fund. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | 8001 Forbes Pl. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Inside the Epstein Cover-Up – Pam Bondi Can't Hide Anymore
body:
The deeper I dig into Pam Bondi's handling of the Epstein files, the more layers of deception I uncover, and it reminds me so much of the battles I've fought as an investigative reporter exposing deep state cover-ups.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/BN4WGSDBCHOYyFqRdBoIcw)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Vv5GvNTU0KoEUjEvyRXAWQ/BN4WGSDBCHOYyFqRdBoIcw)
[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Vv5GvNTU0KoEUjEvyRXAWQ/BN4WGSDBCHOYyFqRdBoIcw) Dear Patriot,

The deeper I dig into Pam Bondi's handling of the Epstein files, the more layers of deception I uncover, and it reminds me so much of the battles I've fought as an investigative reporter exposing deep state cover-ups.

As a journalist who's influenced key decisions through my reporting, I know how these things work - promises made, hype built, and then nothing but excuses.

**If you're feeling the frustration too,[**chip in here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Vv5GvNTU0KoEUjEvyRXAWQ/BN4WGSDBCHOYyFqRdBoIcw) to support my ongoing exposes.**

Bondi boldly promised a comprehensive client list and explosive videos that would bring down the powerful figures involved in Epstein's network.

She positioned herself as the champion of justice, ready to deliver on day one.

Yet, her recent DOJ memo contradicts everything, claiming no such list exists, no evidence of murder in Epstein's death, and essentially closing the book on further investigations.

This mirrors her failures in Florida, where as Attorney General, she allowed Epstein's predatory activities to continue unchecked, leaving victims without recourse.

**This pattern demands exposure - [**donate now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Vv5GvNTU0KoEUjEvyRXAWQ/BN4WGSDBCHOYyFqRdBoIcw) to help me bring these facts to light.**

Whistleblowers and insiders are reporting heated confrontations at the White House over leaks related to this fiasco, with Bondi pointing fingers at everyone but herself.

It's creating a toxic environment that's black-pilling our supporters, making them question if real change is possible, which plays right into the hands of radicals plotting against us.

The threats are real: from immigration-related trafficking networks that echo Epstein's horrors to Qatar-funded influencers sowing discord in our ranks.

**Arm yourself with knowledge and join the fight - [**chip in today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Vv5GvNTU0KoEUjEvyRXAWQ/BN4WGSDBCHOYyFqRdBoIcw) for more insider stories.**

Your support not only keeps me in the arena but gives you valuable insights to share, strengthening our community against these betrayals.

I've pressured the administration for firings before, and with you, we can do it again and demand accountability.

Stay vigilant,
Laura Loomer

Whistleblowers and insiders are reporting heated confrontations at the White House over leaks related to this fiasco, with Bondi pointing fingers at everyone but herself. It's creating a toxic environment that's black-pilling our supporters, making them question if real change is possible, which plays right into the hands of radicals plotting against us. The threats are real: from immigration-related trafficking networks that echo Epstein's horrors to Qatar-funded influencers sowing discord in our ranks. Arm yourself with knowledge and join the fight - for more insider stories. Your support not only keeps me in the arena but gives you valuable insights to share, strengthening our community against these betrayals. I've pressured the administration for firings before, and with you, we can do it again and demand accountability. | | |
# [Don't let Republicans rename beloved Kennedy Center opera house after Melania Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T617d715d-5da8-44d5-8e67-b26a80ac6ac1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e4aff8b-eb33-4727-93c3-c80264c12825/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The Kennedy Center opera house is one of the most beloved and important performance spaces in the nation -- and [Republicans are pushing to rename it after Melania Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd79b3d-f081-406c-944d-7ec97d23c442/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). For real. She's been there a grand total of 1 time, and was roundly booed by the other attendees. It's absurd, but Republicans have already pushed it through the Appropriations committee, and are preparing for a full House vote. **[Don't let this happen. Push back hard, spread the word, and add your name: "Don't let Republicans rename beloved Kennedy Center opera house after Melania Trump"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f3d1c0c-9268-4009-b0a1-c4256e7cc3fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

# [BREAKING: Trump's Personal Lawyer Is Meeting with Ghislaine Maxwell in Prison TODAY](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169140208&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MTQwMjA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTMzNjcwNTksImV4cCI6MTc1NTk1OTA1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.w7I_mMTk_3oY2WlNYCkmPritw2ojMyrd7_R5Qe66lh8)
### Todd Blanche, a top DOJ official and longtime Trump fixer, may be floating a pardon to keep Maxwell quiet about Trump's ties to Jeffrey Epstein.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jul 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169140208&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5MTQwMjA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzM2NzA1OSwiZXhwIjoxNzU1OTU5MDU5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IesiUZaPj-tQ-dD_fLgaVv3bBfYn3SArM_yMgiZcKlY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/breaking-trumps-personal-lawyer-is?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche is reportedly meeting with Ghislaine Maxwell in a Florida prison today. If you're not familiar, Blanche is Donald Trump's personal lawyer--the same guy who's helped him escape accountability for his crimes time and again. Trump quietly installed him at the DOJ to cover his tracks, just like he did with Pam Bondi.
Why is Blanche visiting Maxwell? Because they're worried. Worried she has dirt on Trump--dirt connected to crimes he may have committed alongside his doodle buddy Jeffrey Epstein. I strongly suspect Blanche is floating the idea of a pardon to Maxwell to keep her quiet and ensure she shields Trump when she's inevitably called to testify before Congress.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7ytbDIQJKhi13rQHtbgzKPD7lhHHXh2g9fWOwTcz83Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169140208)
And when she does testify, I believe she'll do more than protect Trump--she'll hand Republicans the talking points they need to bury this story. This may be the most damaging scandal of Trump's political career. I can't think of another controversy that's lingered this long or cut this deep. His approval is dropping. His base is fracturing. And why? Because he's failed to do the one thing he kept promising: expose the truth about Epstein.
That's why it's critical for Democrats and activists--people like you and me--to demand full transparency. We need the complete Epstein list and the unredacted flight logs. No more secrecy. No more delays. No more distractions with his cankles and AI generated videos of former presidents being arrested.
And hey, maybe--_maybe_ --this is the one time Trump is telling the truth. I doubt it. But if he is, there should be zero resistance to releasing the facts. We need to know exactly who's on that list. Which celebrities? Which politicians? Which business leaders? If Trump's on it? Fine, let's hold him accountable. If Democrats, donors, or Hollywood allies are on it? Good--I want them held accountable too.
What drives me crazy is how little accountability exists in our government. As I wrote on Monday, Trump's entire presidency has been a protection racket for the rich and powerful. He gutted Medicaid to give the wealthy tax breaks. He weakened the federal government's ability to go after financial criminals. And now, he's blocking the release of the Epstein files--not just to protect himself, but likely to shield his cronies, cabinet members, and donors.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7ytbDIQJKhi13rQHtbgzKPD7lhHHXh2g9fWOwTcz83Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169140208)
Trump and his allies will keep playing games. Call for prosecuting Obama. Say they're going to imprison Adam Schiff. Attack Rosie O'Donnell on social media. It's all noise--meant to change the subject and reel his supporters back in. But we have to keep our eyes on the real fight.
We must demand a full release of the Epstein files and flight logs--with only the victims' identifying information redacted. Nothing more. We deserve to know the extent of Trump's relationship with Epstein. And we deserve to know who else was involved--no matter their party, fame, or fortune.
This is not a partisan issue. If Trump's implicated, so be it. If Bill Clinton is, so be it. I don't care who it is--I care that we know. Because if people preyed on children and used their power to escape justice, they _must_ be held accountable.
No more blind eyes. No more excuses. This is a moment where everyone--left, right, and center--needs to stand up and demand truth. This isn't about political points. It's about justice.
The grand jury fight is another distraction, too. They want you to think the judge is the problem. He's not. The real problem is the Trump machine trying to deflect, deny, and distract at every turn to coverup for their boss.
Don't fall for it.
Stay focused.
This scandal doesn't end until we have the full Epstein list, the full unredacted flight logs, and justice for the victims. Nothing less.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7ytbDIQJKhi13rQHtbgzKPD7lhHHXh2g9fWOwTcz83Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169140208)

He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Please don’t wait to read this!
body:
We have received some more great news on the honest elections front! The Trump Justice Department just announced it has filed a “statement of interest” in our lawsuit to force the clean-up of Illinois’ election rolls as federal law requires...and this news comes just weeks after the Department announced it had filed a similar “statement of interest” in our voter-rolls lawsuit against Oregon!

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**_We have received some more great news on the honest elections front_!**
The Trump Justice Department just announced it has filed a "statement of interest" in our lawsuit to force the clean-up of **Illinois '** election rolls as federal law requires...and this news comes just weeks after the Department announced it had filed a similar "statement of interest" in our voter-rolls lawsuit against **Oregon**!
However, these "statements of interest" don't change the fact that these two lawsuits continue to be prosecuted by Judicial Watch...we will still be doing all the heavy lifting in court _and_ carrying all the litigation costs!
**[That’s why I urge you to help us fight for honest elections with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75482&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75482&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We rely on patriotic Americans like you to support all our election integrity work, including our lawsuits challenging three states' efforts to "extend" Election Day (our Election Day lawsuit against **Illinois** will be heard by the U.S. Supreme Court in its upcoming fall term).

That's not all!

* **We 're taking on woke racism in the courts**. After shutting down taxpayer funded schemes advanced by leftists that purposely excluded whites in **California** and **North Carolina** , we are now in court challenging a race-based "reparations" policy in **Evanston, Illinois** that may well set a key legal precedent for us to challenge more "reparations" programs across America.
* **We have just added Sean O 'Donnell, a former Inspector General at the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency and former acting Inspector General at the U.S. Department of Defense, to our litigation team**. His experience as an Inspector General is a perfect fit for Judicial Watch and should make corrupt government officials nervous!

[We need you to join with us now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75482&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5) to help us keep leading the national fight to keep our _elections honest_ , and advance all our other investigations and litigation dedicated to preserving the rule of law and combating public corruption.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75482&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

_No one else fights for you and for the rule of law as effectively as Judicial Watch_ ...and we fight these battles where they count, in the legal system and the courts.

Thank you for reading my message. I deeply hope you will [stand with us again in our shared fight against corruption](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75482&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5).

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75482&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

name: Trump Threat Watch via Our Revolution
subject: Trump + Establishment Dems vs Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Donald Trump KNOWS that progressive champions like Zohran Mamdani pose the
greatest risk to his politics of hate, greed, and division. He’s lashing
out, threatening a federal takeover of NYC if Mamdani wins – and he’s not
stopping there:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32986?source=email-20250724&t=1017&akid=9075%2E5885482%2EzeOED4 ]Headline: Calls to strip Zohran Mamdani's citizenship spark alarm about
Trump weaponizing denaturalization

Trump’s brazen threats are completely outrageous and should send a chill
down all our spines. But instead of rallying behind Mamdani, the
Democratic establishment is cozying up to their billionaire donors and
corporate-backed candidates — and refusing to back Mamdani.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32986?source=email-20250724&t=1018&akid=9075%2E5885482%2EzeOED4 ]We CANNOT let this stand. Tell the Democratic establishment it's time
to publicly support Zohran Mamdani for NYC Mayor NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32986?source=email-20250724&t=1019&akid=9075%2E5885482%2EzeOED4 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump and his billionaire allies see Mamdani as a direct threat precisely
because Mamdani will stand up to Wall Street and fight back against
corporate capture of our democracy. Progressives like Mamdani are
genuinely dangerous to Trump’s oligarchy.

But instead of rushing to support Mamdani as the future of the party,
Democratic insiders and old-guard powerbrokers are hesitating – and even
working to undermine him. A New York Democrat in the House just went so
far to say he was a ‘threat’ to her constituents!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32986?source=email-20250724&t=1020&akid=9075%2E5885482%2EzeOED4 ]Headline: 'Mamdani is a threat to my constituents,' says New York House
Democrat

We need Party leaders to stand WITH the Democratic nominee and stand
AGAINST Trump and his cronies in Congress who want to strip Mamdani of
citizenship. This is why thousands of Our Revolution supporters in New
York and across the nation are taking action, demanding Democrats back
Mamdani. We’ve delivered our voices to key Democrats and won’t stop making
noise – now is the moment to keep up the pressure.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32986?source=email-20250724&t=1021&akid=9075%2E5885482%2EzeOED4 ]Click here to tell Democratic Party leaders loud and clear: publicly
back Zohran Mamdani now and stand with the grassroots base – not Trump and
his billionaire oligarchs.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32986?source=email-20250724&t=1022&akid=9075%2E5885482%2EzeOED4 ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

The Our Revolution Team

These are my sons, and like every parent, I want them to grow up in a world that values fairness, freedom, and opportunity . I want them to know that hard work can still open doors, that kindness still matters, and that their voices will be heard.
But the truth is: that future is at risk.

subject: New Rule Drops Soon — Could Your IRA Be at Risk?
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihq7m7jtofrfw8dagxy97b54y7w9pchygsbp3imdm8qp70pjnohz89u76s42msz3s3u6xjzga2h34e3879w8x10yuzhj1&__stmp=szwria&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
# A New Banking Rule Could Reshape Retirement — Here's What You Need to Know
**New Rule Took Effect July 2025** My Dear Friend, Starting this July, a game-changing regulation is poised to reshape the financial landscape — and the biggest banks are already capitalizing on it. This rule reclassifies a powerful, time-tested asset — allowing financial giants to treat it as cash on their balance sheets. That’s right: big banks are shifting trust _away_ from stocks, bonds, and even the U.S. dollar... and turning _toward_ something much older and more stable. As economist Peter Schiff put it:
> “It’s now the only form of money trusted by the banking system. That tells you everything you need to know about the future of the dollar.”
So what does this mean for your IRA, 401(k), or other retirement accounts? It means that while institutions quietly secure their positions, everyday Americans could be left exposed — especially if their savings are still sitting in vulnerable, paper-based assets. **But there’s good news:**
There’s a little-known IRS-approved strategy that allows you to transfer funds from your current retirement account into **physical gold** — all **tax-free and penalty-free**. We’ve prepared a **FREE Presidential Gold Guide** that walks you through exactly how this works and how you can act before the rule fully takes effect. **[Click here to get your Complimentary Presidential Gold Guide from Monetary Gold](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szwria&__onlt=h)** This shift is already underway... and once the rule becomes active, we expect even more volatility across traditional markets. Don't get caught flat-footed. Take control of your retirement strategy while you still can. Warm regards,
**The Monetary Gold Team** **P.S.** Every moment counts. As this regulation rolls out, smart money is already flowing into gold. Get ahead of the curve — claim your complimentary guide now and explore how physical gold can help secure your retirement. **[Get Your Complimentary Guide Now »](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szwria&__onlt=h)**
---

subject: MAGA goes after ActBlue to shield Trump from Epstein truth
body:
According to a Fox News “scoop,” MAGA Republicans have subpoenaed ActBlue execs, reviving baseless claims of “fraud” that the DOJ has already spent months investigating.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045139/559237932/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=&emci=dd685dc9-9b68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb7a43da-9d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
After years of claiming the Epstein files would expose Democrats, the truth came out — and it pointed right back at Donald Trump.
Now he and his allies are panicking, scrambling to change the subject, and making it up as they go.
**The latest target? ActBlue — the small-dollar platform that powers Democratic campaigns, progressive movements, and this very newsroom.**
According to a Fox News “scoop,” MAGA Republicans have subpoenaed ActBlue execs, reviving baseless claims of “fraud” that the DOJ has already spent months investigating.
**Let’s be clear: ActBlue has done nothing wrong. This is political theater. It’s a distraction.** But it’s also a serious escalation — and we need your help to fight back before these lies take hold and take down one of the most important tools progressives have.
[**If you’re ready to push back against Trump’s desperate attacks — and stand up for ActBlue and every institution under MAGA assault — chip in $25 now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045140/559237933/-1581427288?refcode=20250724_AB_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=)
****[Chip in to fight back](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045141/559237934/-1581427288?refcode=20250724_AB_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=)****
Here’s the scary part:
For months, Trump has been winning his war to silence the media and our institutions.
CBS settled. ABC caved. The Washington Post pulled its endorsement. Top universities and law firms are backing down. And Trump is getting exactly what he wants: control.
**But not this time.**
Trump spent years promising that the Epstein files would destroy his enemies. Instead, they exposed _him_. And with his lie collapsing, his allies are going after anyone who might hold him accountable — from Barack Obama, to Harvard, to ActBlue.
**This isn’t strategy. It’s instinct. It’s fear.**
And now that Trump has tasted what it’s like to make the media fold, there’s no telling how far he’ll go to take down ActBlue — and silence the grassroots movement that’s fighting back to defeat MAGA.
**That’s why COURIER exists. We don’t fold. We don’t flinch. We tell the truth — especially when it’s inconvenient. Especially when it’s dangerous.**
[**If you believe in fearless journalism that stands up for the right to organize, speak freely, and expose MAGA power grabs before they happen — chip in now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045142/559237935/-1581427288?refcode=20250724_AB_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=)
****[Chip in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045143/559237936/-1581427288?refcode=20250724_AB_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=)****
In Solidarity,
The COURIER Team
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
[**Become a member! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045144/559237937/1028889122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=&emci=dd685dc9-9b68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb7a43da-9d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14016711)
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045145/559237938/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=&emci=dd685dc9-9b68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb7a43da-9d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112045146/559237939/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI3YTQzZGEtOWQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HfDc6S3MYyuEEqSKek436zBeKpIWAUwOaBaK8chFmQ=&emci=dd685dc9-9b68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb7a43da-9d68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=XaVMZPMHmYji3pnJWyhogpyeAl4gKQIDspubAAmtRujzwHN0Y9CFw6BuFHtpiwR9JGW1oUo5o6e8e5nj2%2BSAeq1PDo09w3vtYHSPQBRTSvoJul7QCr2pHMaO6VbPEv%2F24afQS1SHGW1D0DEC9yYBBTsyeM1BizcOn35JK1DRAcHS0y%2BPWrMWiy2oTUNIrfw3RCYSnxtWFLtbspReoC%2Fbclss7mRK1mQI5B3jfkujyb%2Bq5RuqO7nLMoCqAxooqITZk8ltIylrgspzxDLxN8jEeb0%2FJO%2Fg6f4ji%2F4sJh%2BXQQU20%2Fsi9%2B3RWIYQuMItSgLFlZ1hb6W648Xq4uaL6t5NILtUdQbge2sb3%2BK%2BklfwgC0JaRJ3QA7h%2F9EnRAEaUKnTZ8O%2Fv750VLp7liYR29VKjl%2BsZkNsUJymrSxYuOFeAIslFC4G7FThjj0GkfhNf%2Fnj)**

name: Anika Page
subject: Big Ideas. Bold Reforms. One Unmissable Lunch.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/hannanevent-12849525?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend, You’re invited to a rare and fascinating conversation with **Lord Daniel Hannan** —a brilliant conservative thinker and a staunch supporter of American Exceptionalism. Join us on **Wednesday, September 24th at 11:30 AM** at **River Hills Country Club** in Jackson for a keynote address you won’t forget: **“The Anglosphere Alternative: How the U.S. Can Lead the World Without Having to Pay for Everything.”** Lord Daniel is flying in from across the Atlantic with a message tailor-made for Americans who believe in leadership without endless spending, freedom without compromise, and global strength without overreach. Whether you’re passionate about America’s role on the world stage or simply love a good dose of political clarity, this is an event you don’t want to miss.

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Pushing back against the Trump Texas takeover / Rechazando la toma de control de Texas por parte de Trump
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
All eyes on Texas Congressional redistricting
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Redistricting%202025.jpg]
What we're seeing is a Trump takeover of Texas. [https://www.msnbc.com/rachel-maddow-show/maddowblog/5-reasons-care-texas-trump-inspired-redistricting-scheme-rcna220026] Governor Abbott's special session started Monday, but instead of focusing on flood recovery, the increased cost of living, or other real needs of Texans, he’s pushing Trump’s authoritarian agenda that redraws Congressional districts to lock in power for himself and his MAGA loyalists.
It's never been more clear that Abbott is letting Trump control Texas. We need leaders who put Texans first, not those who play political games.
Already, our GOP-controlled state legislature has set regional hearings for congressional redistricting in the coming days, as they look to shove through gerrymandered maps. Join TOP and Texas For All coalition partners at the following rallies and hearings, as we push back against this shameless power grab.
Houston: Saturday, July 26 , at the University of Houston Student Center
* 9:30 a.m. rally: RSVP here. [https://www.mobilize.us/txaflcio/event/817184/]

* 11 a.m. hearing: Sign up to testify [https://ce3cacc8.streaklinks.com/CgsuCCem5n1oC28l-ARtZ8Iy/https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mobilize.us%2Fmovetexas%2Fevent%2F817035%2F]

Arlington: Monday, July 28 , at the University of Texas at Arlington
* 3:30pm rally: RSVP here [https://www.mobilize.us/txaflcio/event/817527/] .

* 5 p.m. hearing: Sign up to testify [https://ce3cacc8.streaklinks.com/CgsuCCeUVPBnpYP1AQaMg7_J/https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mobilize.us%2Fmovetexas%2Fevent%2F817036%2F]

For more information on how you can have your voice heard and fight back with us, email David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Ramping up efforts to secure more housing funds in Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20disaster%20recovery%20funds%20protest%20June%202025.JPG]
We're keeping up pressure, building power, and making progress.
This past Tuesday, TOP and local housing allies spoke out again at Houston City Council [https://www.khou.com/article/news/politics/city-council-vote-recovery-derecho-hurricane-beryl/285-f2c42d8f-3757-4c90-80d5-f10ac5191bec] to call for an increase in the allocation for housing in the City’s Community Development Block Grant - Disaster Recovery (CDBG-DR) funds.
We once again made clear that Mayor Whitmire’s $50 million allocation is not enough. Tens of thousands of Houston families are still living with damage from Hurricane Beryl and the 2024 Derecho, with several facing leaking roofs, structural hazards, and mold. For many, the next severe storm could bring even more destruction — because repairs and weatherization haven’t happened.
Working together, TOP and allies urged the Whitmire administration to allocate funding for housing in its initial disaster recovery plan, where an abysmal $0 in funding was dedicated to housing at the start. Stay tuned, as a pivotal vote on this funding package will take place next week!
For more information on this organizing effort, contact Damaris at dgonzalez@organizetexas.org [dgonzalez@organizetexas.org] .
Sharing the stage with DFW labor allies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/03%20-%20TOPEF%20KNON%20Film%20Festival.jpg]
We once again extend our appreciation to our friends at KNON 89.3 FM [https://www.knon.org/] for inviting TOP Education Fund to sponsor and be part of the program for their 5th Annual Film Festival [https://www.dallasobserver.com/arts/knon-returns-for-5th-annual-free-film-festival-in-oak-cliff-22690606] on Sunday, July 20, at the historic Texas Theatre in Dallas.
One of the highlights of the film festival was the screening of the powerful documentary UNION [https://www.unionthefilm.com/] , which captures the tenacious grassroots effort of former Amazon workers in New York City in 2021 to form the Amazon Labor Union.
Dallas TOP staff Eshay Hutchinson and Chris Sanders joined TOP board member and Dallas labor champion Bonnie Mathias on stage for a panel discussion after the screening.
As the Trump administration seeks to weaken worker protections and the ability to unionize, especially through Project 2025, TOP remains steadfast in our commitment toward workers rights and our partnership with labor allies across Texas.
For more information about the event, contact David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Stay up-to-date during the Texas special legislative session
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20Capitol%20Austin%20building.jpg]
A new special session is now underway, and we know there'll be no shortage of political fireworks coming from our state capitol. Needing a quick refresher on how special sessions operate? Use this article as a resource. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/07/18/texas-legislative-special-session-guide-2025/] Also, follow TOP's Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas/] , Bluesky [https://bsky.app/profile/txorgproject.bsky.social] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/texasorganizingproject/] , and TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@organizetexas] accounts for informative updates as they relate to our organizing work.
Español
Todas las miradas puestas en la redistribución de distritos del Congreso en Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Redistricting%202025.jpg]
Lo que estamos atestiguando es una toma de control de Texas por parte de Trump. [https://www.msnbc.com/rachel-maddow-show/maddowblog/5-reasons-care-texas-trump-inspired-redistricting-scheme-rcna220026] La sesión especial del gobernador Abbott comenzó el lunes, pero en lugar de centrarse en la recuperación de las inundaciones, el aumento del costo de vida y otras necesidades reales de los tejanos, está impulsando la agenda autoritaria de Trump, que redefine los distritos electorales del Congreso para afianzar el poder para él y sus partidarios de MAGA.
Nunca ha sido más evidente que Abbott está permitiendo que Trump controle Texas. Necesitamos líderes que prioricen a los tejanos, no a quienes se dedican a la política.
Nuestra legislatura estatal, controlada por el Partido Republicano, ya ha programado audiencias regionales para la redistribución de distritos electorales del Congreso en los próximos días, mientras buscan aprobar mapas manipulados.
Únase a los socios de la coalición TOP y Texas For All en los siguientes mítines y audiencias, mientras luchamos contra esta descarada apropiación de poder.
Houston: Sábado 26 de julio en el Centro de Estudiantes de la Universidad de Houston
* Mitín a las 9:30 am: Confirme su asistencia aquí. [https://www.mobilize.us/txaflcio/event/817184/]

* Audiencia de las 11 am: Inscríbete para testificar. [https://www.mobilize.us/movetexas/event/817035/]

Arlington: Lunes 28 de julio en la Universidad de Texas en Arlington
* Mitin de las 3:30 pm: Confirma tu asistencia aquí. [https://www.mobilize.us/txaflcio/event/817527/]

* Audiencia de las 5 pm: Inscríbete para testificar. [https://www.mobilize.us/movetexas/event/817036/]

Para más información sobre cómo puedes hacer oír tu voz y colaborar con nosotros, escribe a David a dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Intensificando esfuerzos para asegurar más fondos de vivienda en Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20disaster%20recovery%20funds%20protest%20June%202025.JPG]
Mantenemos la presión, fortalecemos nuestro poder y avanzamos.
El martes pasado, TOP y sus aliados locales en materia de vivienda se manifestaron nuevamente ante el Ayuntamiento de Houston [https://www.khou.com/article/news/politics/city-council-vote-recovery-derecho-hurricane-beryl/285-f2c42d8f-3757-4c90-80d5-f10ac5191bec] para solicitar un aumento en la asignación de vivienda de los fondos de la Subvención en Bloque para el Desarrollo Comunitario - Recuperación ante Desastres (CDBG-DR) de la ciudad.
Una vez más, dejamos claro que la asignación de $50 millones de la alcaldesa Whitmire no es suficiente. Decenas de miles de familias de Houston aún viven con los daños causados por el huracán Beryl y el huracán Derecho de 2024, y varias enfrentan goteras, riesgos estructurales y moho. Para muchas, la próxima tormenta severa podría traer aún más destrucción, ya que no se han realizado las reparaciones ni la climatización.
Trabajando juntos, TOP y sus aliados instaron a la administración de Whitmire a asignar fondos para vivienda en su plan inicial de recuperación ante desastres, donde inicialmente se destinó una suma desastrosa de $0. ¡Estén atentos, ya que la próxima semana se llevará a cabo una votación crucial sobre este paquete de financiación!
Para obtener más información sobre este esfuerzo organizativo, comuníquese con Damaris en dgonzalez@organizetexas.org [dgonzalez@organizetexas.org] .
Compartiendo el escenario con los aliados laborales de DFW
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/03%20-%20TOPEF%20KNON%20Film%20Festival.jpg]
Agradecemos nuevamente a nuestros amigos de KNON 89.3 FM [https://www.knon.org/] por invitar a TOP Education Fund a patrocinar y formar parte de la programación de su 5o Festival Anual de Cine [https://www.dallasobserver.com/arts/knon-returns-for-5th-annual-free-film-festival-in-oak-cliff-22690606] , que se celebró el domingo 20 de julio en el histórico Texas Theatre de Dallas.
Uno de los momentos más destacados del festival fue la proyección del impactante documental UNION [https://www.unionthefilm.com/] , que captura el tenaz esfuerzo de base de los extrabajadores de Amazon en la ciudad de Nueva York en 2021 para formar el Sindicato de Trabajadores de Amazon.
Eshay Hutchinson y Chris Sanders, miembros del equipo de TOP en Dallas, se unieron en el escenario a Bonnie Mathias, miembro de la junta directiva de TOP y defensora laboral de Dallas, para una mesa redonda después de la proyección.
Mientras la administración Trump busca debilitar las protecciones laborales y la capacidad de sindicalización, especialmente a través del Proyecto 2025, TOP se mantiene firme en su compromiso con los derechos de los trabajadores y en su colaboración con aliados sindicales en todo Texas.
Para obtener más información sobre el evento, contacte a David en dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Manténgase actualizado durante la sesión legislativa especial de Texas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Texas%20Capitol%20Austin%20building.jpg]
Ya está en marcha una nueva sesión especial, y sabemos que no faltarán los fuegos artificiales políticos provenientes de nuestro capitolio estatal. ¿Necesita un repaso rápido de cómo funcionan las sesiones especiales? Utilice este artículo como recurso. [https://www.texastribune.org/2025/07/18/texas-legislative-special-session-guide-2025/] Además, siga las cuentas de TOP en Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/OrganizeTexas/] , Bluesky [https://bsky.app/profile/txorgproject.bsky.social] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/texasorganizingproject/] y TikTok [https://www.tiktok.com/@organizetexas] para obtener actualizaciones informativas sobre nuestra labor organizativa.

clean_body: Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español] All eyes on Texas Congressional redistricting [] What we're seeing is a Trump takeover of Texas. [] Governor Abbott's special session started Monday, but instead of focusing on flood recovery, the increased cost of living, or other real needs of Texans, he’s pushing Trump’s authoritarian agenda that redraws Congressional districts to lock in power for himself and his MAGA loyalists. It's never been more clear that Abbott is letting Trump control Texas. We need leaders who put Texans first, not those who play political games. Already, our GOP-controlled state legislature has set regional hearings for congressional redistricting in the coming days, as they look to shove through gerrymandered maps. Join TOP and Texas For All coalition partners at the following rallies and hearings, as we push back against this shameless power grab. Houston: Saturday, July 26 , at the University of Houston Student Center 9:30 a.m. rally: RSVP here. [] 11 a.m. hearing: Sign up to testify [] Arlington: Monday, July 28 , at the University of Texas at Arlington 3:30pm rally: RSVP here [] . 5 p.m. hearing: Sign up to testify [] For more information on how you can have your voice heard and fight back with us, email David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] . Ramping up efforts to secure more housing funds in Houston [] We're keeping up pressure, building power, and making progress. This past Tuesday, TOP and local housing allies spoke out again at Houston City Council [] to call for an increase in the allocation for housing in the City’s Community Development Block Grant - Disaster Recovery (CDBG-DR) funds. We once again made clear that Mayor Whitmire’s $50 million allocation is not enough. Tens of thousands of Houston families are still living with damage from Hurricane Beryl and the 2024 Derecho, with several facing leaking roofs, structural hazards, and mold. For many, the next severe storm could bring even more destruction — because repairs and weatherization haven’t happened. Working together, TOP and allies urged the Whitmire administration to allocate funding for housing in its initial disaster recovery plan, where an abysmal $0 in funding was dedicated to housing at the start. Stay tuned, as a pivotal vote on this funding package will take place next week! For more information on this organizing effort, contact Damaris at dgonzalez@organizetexas.org [dgonzalez@organizetexas.org] . Sharing the stage with DFW labor allies [] We once again extend our appreciation to our friends at KNON 89.3 FM [] for inviting TOP Education Fund to sponsor and be part of the program for their 5th Annual Film Festival [] on Sunday, July 20, at the historic Texas Theatre in Dallas. One of the highlights of the film festival was the screening of the powerful documentary UNION [] , which captures the tenacious grassroots effort of former Amazon workers in New York City in 2021 to form the Amazon Labor Union. Dallas TOP staff Eshay Hutchinson and Chris Sanders joined TOP board member and Dallas labor champion Bonnie Mathias on stage for a panel discussion after the screening. As the Trump administration seeks to weaken worker protections and the ability to unionize, especially through Project 2025, TOP remains steadfast in our commitment toward workers rights and our partnership with labor allies across Texas. For more information about the event, contact David at dvillalobos@organizetexas.org [dvillalobos@organizetexas.org] . TOP Tip: Stay up-to-date during the Texas special legislative session [] A new special session is now underway, and we know there'll be no shortage of political fireworks coming from our state capitol. Needing a quick refresher on how special sessions operate? Use this article as a resource. [] Also, follow TOP's Facebook [] , Bluesky [] , Instagram [] , and TikTok [] accounts for informative updates as they relate to our organizing work. Español Todas las miradas puestas en la redistribución de distritos del Congreso en Texas [] Lo que estamos atestiguando es una toma de control de Texas por parte de Trump. [] La sesión especial del gobernador Abbott comenzó el lunes, pero en lugar de centrarse en la recuperación de las inundaciones, el aumento del costo de vida y otras necesidades reales de los tejanos, está impulsando la agenda autoritaria de Trump, que redefine los distritos electorales del Congreso para afianzar el poder para él y sus partidarios de MAGA. Nunca ha sido más evidente que Abbott está permitiendo que Trump controle Texas. Necesitamos líderes que prioricen a los tejanos, no a quienes se dedican a la política. Nuestra legislatura estatal, controlada por el Partido Republicano, ya ha programado audiencias regionales para la redistribución de distritos electorales del Congreso en los próximos días, mientras buscan aprobar mapas manipulados. Únase a los socios de la coalición TOP y Texas For All en los siguientes mítines y audiencias, mientras luchamos contra esta descarada apropiación de poder. name: Care in Action Advocacy Team
subject: Add your name: Tell MLB Teams to Keep ICE out of Their Stadiums
body:
ICE’s next target? Sports stadiums. And together we can stop it.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046185/559241274/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046190/559241306/1652452333?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
As Trump’s cruel attacks on immigrants ramp up, domestic workers are among the most vulnerable, **terrified that the simple act of going to work, picking up groceries, or attending a sporting event could mean never making it home to their families.**
Nowhere feels safe. **But then one sports team drew a line in the sand, showing the rest of the country how we can protect each other from these attempts to terrorize our communities.**
Last month, ICE agents tried to access Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles to hunt down and detain immigrants. But **the team stood tall and exercised their Constitutional rights, refusing ICE warrantless entry** and rejecting Trump's attempt to use our government as a weapon against our neighbors.
**Now we need EVERY Major League Baseball (MLB) team across the country to do the same.**
[**Add your name: Tell all 28 other MLB teams to publicly REJECT ICE from using their stadiums to abduct and detain immigrants.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046197/559241315/1652452333?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[Add Your Name](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046202/559241331/1652452333?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
As Trump unleashes the military within our borders, directly threatening our families and communities, the ONLY way we can protect each other is to unite and speak with one powerful voice.
When confronted with ICE’s request, The Dodgers took a stand for our neighbors, affirming the belief that we are only as safe as our communities. **But their act of unity and resistance means nothing if other teams let ICE in lawlessly.**
The Dodgers stood up for our families – now we need every MLB team to show the same solidarity with immigration communities.
[**Add your name now to tell all other MLB teams to publicly reject ICE from using your stadiums to abduct and detain immigrants.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046205/559241368/1652452333?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[Add Your Name](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046208/559241376/1652452333?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
People across our country are more united than any pundit or elected leader would have you believe. Together, we can make sure MLB stadiums continue to be a gathering place for our communities—not hunting grounds for ICE.
Thank you for taking action and standing with domestic workers and immigrants everywhere.
Thank you,
The Care in Action Team
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046213/559241390/-1554439957?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046220/559241431/326371895?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112046229/559241444/955979663?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=partner_ndwa&ms=mlb-ice-swap-july25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RlYjhkYS05ZTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3f0xgWPiD6n2gME7_lmCtW-FI6Ps7jWcmakSnoOeqk=&emci=c258507e-f967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=83deb8da-9e68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)

clean_body: ICE’s next target? Sports stadiums. And together we can stop it. As Trump’s cruel attacks on immigrants ramp up, domestic workers are among the most vulnerable, terrified that the simple act of going to work, picking up groceries, or attending a sporting event could mean never making it home to their families. Nowhere feels safe. But then one sports team drew a line in the sand, showing the rest of the country how we can protect each other from these attempts to terrorize our communities. Last month, ICE agents tried to access Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles to hunt down and detain immigrants. But the team stood tall and exercised their Constitutional rights, refusing ICE warrantless entry and rejecting Trump's attempt to use our government as a weapon against our neighbors. Now we need EVERY Major League Baseball (MLB) team across the country to do the same. As Trump unleashes the military within our borders, directly threatening our families and communities, the ONLY way we can protect each other is to unite and speak with one powerful voice. When confronted with ICE’s request, The Dodgers took a stand for our neighbors, affirming the belief that we are only as safe as our communities. But their act of unity and resistance means nothing if other teams let ICE in lawlessly. The Dodgers stood up for our families – now we need every MLB team to show the same solidarity with immigration communities. People across our country are more united than any pundit or elected leader would have you believe. Together, we can make sure MLB stadiums continue to be a gathering place for our communities—not hunting grounds for ICE. Thank you for taking action and standing with domestic workers and immigrants everywhere. Thank you, The Care in Action Team

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again](https://default.salsalabs.org/T043962a6-7e95-4578-bb2f-0610b7dc9ad6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f5459de-f684-4c91-916b-2bf735bbd8e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There are about a million reasons why Pam Bondi has proven herself to be possibly the worst attorney general in our nation's history. She has weaponized the department of justice to go after political opponents. She has pursued wildly inappropriate cases, blindly accepting absurd allegations Trump crapped out of his demented mind. And now it appears she may be pushing Trump's most absurd idea yet -- treason charges against former President Obama. **[Enough of this crap. It's time to fire her, disbar her, and make sure she never practices law again. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T112ff107-7d2b-48c2-99fa-afb44c13355e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The job of the attorney general is to act as the nation's top legal official, to advise the president on legal matters, and when necessary, to push back on harebrained ideas that violate the law. But Bondi has not been defending the law, she has been aiding and abetting Trump's dismantling of it. And there is no way in hell she should continue to have any authorization whatsoever to practice it. **[Add your name: Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d033f39-347e-4d55-a7fb-03dc91886e13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
