name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Are these statements extinct?
body:
Peter, Remember when common sense was...common? I think I do, but it’s getting fuzzy. Common sense statements like... Theft should be punished. Men are men, women are women.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, Remember when common sense was...common? I think I do, but it’s getting fuzzy. Common sense statements like...
* Theft should be punished.
* Men are men, women are women.
* School is for reading, writing, and arithmetic.
* The money I earned belongs to me.
* Government is of the people, _by_ the people, and _for_ the people.
* If you burn down storefronts and throw rocks at police, you get arrested even if you call it a “protest.”
* Elected officials should follow the law and not fraudulently enrich themselves while serving We The People.
* Throwing money at a problem doesn’t solve it.

I mean we wouldn’t have even thought these had to be said, back in the good ole days of common sense. The thing is, the majority of people believe these statements. What happened is that academia, media, and entertainment got taken over by crazy people who had abandoned common sense and started repeating nonsense over and over again until the rest of us woke up and said, “what is happening?!” We started acknowledging that common sense was still common, but everyone with the cultural megaphones didn’t have it. And it was time to shout back and start holding them accountable. That’s what the Common Sense Club is for. It’s the place where the Common Sense Majority wakes up, finds each other, and starts taking back the airspace from the loonies. If you resonate with this, pitch in to help us bring common sense back to the forefront. _You can do it securely[here](https://xtz223.keap-link002.com/v2/click/3d606373bcb03735964cf70782e5fa1f/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC1LK8NbRIRoHaLOsa0DLensso6Shf-97QNPBV1nnvcZ3rkDIwniJIcYrnwLghA8sCiVUUi81MRCvrbBdDIOxx4Uii5rq2sD8f1ruAee42gejjzg1qBD9rvFMk2262OWbFNHGmHdjb88s2gy6z2rzSLJoOt-irFUvGqcu4KYbY3PRrlyrfhgC8efmU0V-77UZalpUCFVOJBFfRpabJqh1H6uSTA6lTAGKf_8IcX2LeweB9lmZA==). We’re grateful for your support. _ But I would also love to hear from you. What common sense idea seems to have disappeared that YOU want to shout from the rooftops? **Reply to this email and let me know.** We might feature yours in a future email. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---
President
Common Sense Club
---
|
---
Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

Friend – While Americans are crushed by inflation, higher interest rates, and rising living costs, the Federal Reserve is busy turning its headquarters into a **$2.5 billion marble palace.** This isn’t just about “ _renovations._ ” It’s about arrogance. It’s about an institution that believes it’s untouchable. **The same Fed that manipulates our economy in the dark now wants rooftop terraces and premium stone finishes on[ _YOUR dime_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0dcc634d947b445180cbcec72bff70d3&_e=JBN5rrY-I6jvvImpnO-lJNvQL1rdBzwnbCNS2c5-bDLl-PD31ram9ljNBJ_SvFAWRmzkkcGDLNuA0Px9ab3tGSOWx2z1dgh4BimHI8AcBNiby0S25nSIEwY1M9GAuVjUkXm2GTDXpvuY96JaZD-oSAxyiKOQdqkQPpxmPnCGcdaYS-3SC6o3_Me6nySmzSPYMD0g8Tqja5rIoJ7-ZUNUOfel8t1gsCBPIsB0-lEcWNXfe4ByCB2MKDyHg6Aj3T2Q7m-4UyvCM9NBvSSc5a7oLoITLItZOiBeKxcngDLOkqjJzF6Ml5YJg1D0ff7GBwIVlkVGZazOybp5OZKXsDZVWNdnxCjzaShfQtvYNL56UsCDSlNXe8G4pFrX1oObpt3ustzE8zz-OE7bOCWMulPsYswvE5814aNNXrp1ByWbgXbCcse7ps0FdgbASR6F6yYf63wlGoiya_5owKTLg36saUz7YqsGgE1KwYbPZb9f7tvWFOwvVYTAYXWGyTkn0UMf2Y0QZII8y_K9TQQAQvW_BNKlbauCOEgib6blohuLrto5Qy9d4OxjFRuObOekiOSJMGhavyxXx5v0G4-_EoePaOr8SKxtweTqATzjDJ6iT3Mb1dz81d9WDM4XOgFy9Vod3SgaWcqp4soNN2XCpkCZ6sCNDbIbOtwjGmk_tEJbr1Wp4vyI90kiKptgLFvGt5pp).** President Trump called it a fireable offense. subject: Every day support for ditching it grows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=E+Ajn3sUXA8cxWwRJRJGpmHnfUS4eO/q0LCv51yETo5RPHNF0qCvHJ8GzWOMTUvVeU7WrbRScSQLMghdlbnbgnyTwffQo3Ud1Ek2Mzvphl4=]
The Hill: Buttigieg doubles down on scrapping Electoral College: ‘It’s undemocratic’ [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2?am=25.00&contactdata=E+Ajn3sUXA8cxWwRJRJGpmHnfUS4eO/q0LCv51yETo5RPHNF0qCvHJ8GzWOMTUvVeU7WrbRScSQLMghdlbnbgnyTwffQo3Ud1Ek2Mzvphl4=]
Friend - leaders like Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Robert Reich are leading the charge to ditch the Electoral College and switch to a national popular vote system. Why?
➜ The Electoral College is the reason Trump won in 2016, despite losing the popular vote by millions
➜ Joe Biden nearly lost the presidency in 2020, even though he won the popular vote by a historic margin
➜ Every day, new leaders join our movement, which means we can abolish the Electoral College and give us a true democracy
We’re so close to getting rid of the Electoral College, but we need to bring in more pro-popular vote supporters across the country to cross the finish line. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us ditch the Electoral College? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

We keep talking about this because it's true: 16 states plus DC have already indicated that they're willing to scrap this electoral scheme and move to a national popular vote.
It's clear that our democracy needs reform to be protected. But we're only going to be able to forge the country we deserve if we stand up for our rights, push back against the gerrymandering and voter suppression, and finally make a national popular vote a reality. Too much is at stake for us to give up now.
Help put us over the top in the states we need to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/8dYLXPuc9ki9MWu8ArkS9w2]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=E+Ajn3sUXA8cxWwRJRJGpmHnfUS4eO/q0LCv51yETo5RPHNF0qCvHJ8GzWOMTUvVeU7WrbRScSQLMghdlbnbgnyTwffQo3Ud1Ek2Mzvphl4=]

name: Team Keith
subject: This puts Minnesota communities at risk
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Preparing for natural disasters ahead of time doesn’t just save money and property—it saves lives.

After Hurricane Katrina, Congress passed a law directing FEMA to fund lifesaving disaster mitigation projects like flood walls, fortified bridges and roadways, and resilient utility systems. Since then, the bipartisan Building Resilient Infrastructure and Communities (BRIC) program has helped communities prepare for disasters before they strike.

But now, the Trump administration is shutting down this vital program. This decision is foolish, cruel, and unlawful.

In response Keith Ellison joined 20 other attorneys general to sue the Trump administration. Together, they’re fighting to restore critical funding to communities across the country, including dozens right here in Minnesota.

To show Trump and his MAGA allies that you’re backing Keith and his work to protect us from floods, wildfires, and other natural disasters, please chip in to support our campaign.

Our records indicate that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and get a full refund from the state.

Will you make a fully refundable $75 donation right now to help Keith push back against Trump’s outrageous cuts?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250724ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250724ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250724ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I'm proud to support Ghazala Hashmi for Virginia Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi]
Folks,
You know me as a U.S. Senator — but many of you were also on my team back when I was serving Virginia as its 70th Governor and 38th Lieutenant Governor.
As this November’s elections draw nearer, I’m reflecting on what it takes to lead a Commonwealth as diverse and dynamic as ours — and how incredible our slate of statewide Democratic candidates are.
I learned so much during my time in Richmond serving in our state leadership — and it’s because of what I learned that I am so proud to be a strong endorser of Ghazala Hashmi for Virginia's next Lieutenant Governor.
I hope you’ll support her, too. It’s going to be a long road to victory in November, so today, I’m asking you to split a donation of $20 or more to her campaign and my Common Ground PAC. We have a major opportunity to flip our Commonwealth from red to blue, and we need all hands on deck to make sure it happens. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=30]
The stakes this year are exceptionally high. While Donald Trump takes a bulldozer to our democratic ideals and rigs the economy in favor of the ultra-wealthy, we’re relying on leaders at the state level more than ever before to stand up and fight back.
Ghazala Hashmi will be a formidable champion in the fight against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda here in Virginia.
If you’re as fired up as I am to help Ghazala win this race and build a brighter future for Virginia, please join me in splitting a donation of $20 or more right away. Together, we can make history and win this race for the people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hashmi?amount=25]
Thank you,
Tim
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. Friend,
**This November, Virginia has a choice:** embrace common-sense conservative leadership or risk becoming the next California or New York.
That’s why we’re launching the **Virginia GOP Victory Campaign** – a united, statewide effort powered by **Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears,** **Lt. Gov. nominee John Reid, Attorney General Jason Miyares, Republican leaders across the Commonwealth, and the Republican Party of Virginia**.
Our Republican ticket is working together like never before to deliver real results – from the Governor’s Mansion to the House of Delegates. This is a historic, all-hands effort to win up and down the ballot.
We’ve already ordered 8,000 more yard signs, expanded our field program, and teamed up with national partners to amplify our reach. But to build on this momentum, we need your help.
**Will you make a generous VICTORY CONTRIBUTION today to support our entire Republican ticket?**

name: Ileana Paules Bronet
subject: RE: “unwed.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Sorry, we actually forgot that was a term people used in 2025...? | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112049436/559250216/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724UnwedC_N_JZ_NO_10_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MjU4YjBkLWEzNjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lw_LA9Is2x0ahGX0_AloWLx565MA_QjQS6g0xBGTjMM=)
---
Peter, discrimination is now legal in at least one American state.

A 35-year-old woman in Tennessee was **denied prenatal care** by her physician because she was “unwed.” According to the _Nashville Banner_ , a physician turned her away because they “didn't feel comfortable treating her” and cited “differing values.”

Although this type of discrimination is illegal across most of America, Tennessee recently passed the Medical Ethics Defense Act. This law grants medical professionals the right to deny healthcare to patients based on their religious, moral, or ethical beliefs. There are no protections for people in rural areas with limited options for healthcare, there are no requirements to refer patients elsewhere, and there’s no legal recourse.

**83% of the lawmakers in Tennessee are _male_.**

We are horrified by this story. We will not sit back as male politicians pass laws that limit women’s bodily autonomy, healthcare, and safety.

[**We cannot accept this reality for our fellow women. We’re working to elect PRO-WOMEN women – especially in red states like Tennessee. Help support our candidates by donating $25 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112049442/559250223/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724UnwedC_N_JZ_NO_10_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MjU4YjBkLWEzNjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lw_LA9Is2x0ahGX0_AloWLx565MA_QjQS6g0xBGTjMM=)

This is the first reported case of a woman being denied prenatal care for being unmarried in the state of Tennessee – but it will likely continue to happen more frequently.

The states with the _least amount of women_ in state government almost all have abortion bans and other laws that limit women’s access to healthcare. Tennessee is one of those states. While 3.5 million women live in Tennessee, _women make up only 17% of the state’s government._

The legislator who sponsored this bill, Representative Bryan Terry, said he believed the law would help Tennessee recruit and retain physicians (???!!). In reality, the state has actually seen a _decline_ in OB-GYNs across the state since Tennessee’s total abortion ban went into effect. Tennessee has the highest maternal mortality rate in the country and ranks among the worst for infant mortality.

[**At Her Bold Move, we believe this is a _solvable_ problem. We’re working to chip away at the male supermajorities in state governments across America by electing more women to the halls of power. We believe women lawmakers will be our best defense against dangerous and sexist policies. Rush $25 to support our work and help us elect more women ASAP. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112049446/559250230/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724UnwedC_N_JZ_NO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MjU4YjBkLWEzNjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lw_LA9Is2x0ahGX0_AloWLx565MA_QjQS6g0xBGTjMM=)

For ALL women,

Ileana Paules Bronet
Her Bold Move
---

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112049452/559250235/2022509128?refcode=EM_F_250724UnwedC_N_JZ_NO_10_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MjU4YjBkLWEzNjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lw_LA9Is2x0ahGX0_AloWLx565MA_QjQS6g0xBGTjMM=)

body:
If there’s one thing you should take away from reading this email, it’s this: In order for state Democrats to win in elections this November, in 2026, and beyond – we have to work together. | | |

We’re writing to ask you if there is anything at all that we can say to convince you to chip in your first $5 to Senator Warner’s reelection campaign.

Will you give us a chance to try?

What if we told you that next year’s elections are some of the most consequential we’ve seen in years?

What if we told you that the best way to put a check on Trump’s dangerous corruption is by taking back the Senate for Democrats?

**What if we told you that Democrats will never win a U.S. Senate majority if we lose Virginia?**

And what if we told you that as the leading voice in Washington speaking out against the Trump administration, one of Trump’s billionaire allies could drop a $50 or $100 million super PAC against Mark? [_**Would that be enough for you to give your first $5 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112050490/559252981/-894574837?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Say_250724_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU4YWIzNS1hNTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cGwuzdr9U8kEr_oKvMsbN8bpJaudW4CBTnFsUdt5D3k=) Look, Derek, you might think that we have plenty of time before Election Day, but frankly, that’s not the case. If we don’t secure the early resources we need to win _now_ , we may be outspent by Trump, the GOP, and their billionaire allies bent on defeating Senator Warner. [_**So we’re asking: will you chip in to help us overcome the GOP’s attacks, hold this seat for Democrats, and flip the Senate blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112050491/559252982/-894574837?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Say_250724_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU4YWIzNS1hNTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cGwuzdr9U8kEr_oKvMsbN8bpJaudW4CBTnFsUdt5D3k=) # [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)

friend — With so much on the line under Trump's extreme rule, it’s critical that progressives stand united and ready to fight back from the grassroots to the halls of Congress.
That’s why we have just one ask of you today: **[Can you take 60 seconds to add your name and personally endorse Ilhan Omar as she runs for reelection to Congress?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-personal-endorse/?source=em250724-1-180&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-personal-endorse/?source=em250724-1-180&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)**
We support Ilhan because she isn’t just any politician.
She’s an experienced organizer who puts forward bold ideas to lift up the working class in our country and guarantee the quality healthcare, housing, and education that everyone deserves.
She’s one of the few members of Congress who has consistently stood against America’s involvement in the genocide in Gaza and other needless wars.
She’s also one of the few members of Congress who can’t be bought — Ilhan rejects the billionaires and corporate Super PACs who put pressure on politicians to do their bidding in Washington.
And most importantly in our times, she isn’t the kind of Democrat who thinks we should play dead while Trump tears down our country. She is committed to building a movement of a majority of Americans who oppose Trump’s attacks on immigrants, gutting of social services, and threats to our democracy.
So please: **[Add your name today to the list of folks who personally endorse Ilhan Omar. Ilhan is running for reelection to continue leading the fight, and it’s our job to show she has an entire movement behind her.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-personal-endorse/?source=em250724-1-180&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)
**[ENDORSE ILHAN OMAR](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-july25-personal-endorse/?source=em250724-1-180&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)**. Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1731_791427_TEXALt&akid=1731%2E791427%2ETEXALt)**.

| **ADA 35 YEARS CELEBRATION** Saturday, July 26 marks the 35th anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act, a landmark civil rights law that protects the rights of people with disabilities.

On this anniversary, we celebrate the progress made and recommit to advancing equal opportunity, accessibility, and inclusion for all.
---
| | **DANTE VA FLOOD RELIEF** Following the horrific flooding in Dante, Virginia, the St. Paul Fire Department is now accepting donations to support relief efforts All funds collected will go toward providing supplies for residents of Dante and the surrounding areas affected by the flood. If there are remaining funds after supply needs are met, they will be used to help restore community spaces.

# MEET THE CANDIDATES!
---
|
---
| |
---
| **LESLIE MEHTA FOR HD-73** Support Leslie Mehta's Campaign for Delegate! For Leslie, advocating for others is ingrained in her DNA and woven through her lived experience. Over her twenty-year law career, she has worked tirelessly to protect the rights of ALL Virginians. Leslie is determined to find real solutions to help our families thrive, and is proud to have been appointed by both Democratic and Republican governors to serve our Commonwealth. Leslie is running for Virginia's 73rd House District in Chesterfield to be a champion for all of our families.
---
|
---
[ **Donate** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112051700/559256746/-1370173068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGU3MWUzZS1hNzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpxU9jiNbuCLhANMShtzztjbnX0YVQziVHd5sNY5_7I=)
---
| |

| **KIMBERLY POPE ADAMS FOR HD-82** Kimberly is a lifelong Virginian who loves calling Dinwiddie home. She’s an Accountant and Auditor who wants to bring accountability to the House of Delegates. Growing up in the “Five Forks” area of Hopewell, Kimberly has a deep-rooted connection to the traditions and culture of the Tri-Cities. Her deep love for the area she grew up in is the cornerstone of why she’s running to serve the new 82nd District. The District of Petersburg, Dinwiddie, Prince George, and Surry deserves a Delegate to fight for all. Kimberly is a mother whose community has seen hardships that were preventable. She’s ready to be a voice for a District that has long been ignored by Richmond.
---
|
---
[ **Donate** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112051706/559256748/-1030033918?refcode=mobile_menu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGU3MWUzZS1hNzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpxU9jiNbuCLhANMShtzztjbnX0YVQziVHd5sNY5_7I=)
---
| |
---
| **ELIZABETH GUZMAN FOR HD-22** Social worker Elizabeth Guzman was the first Latina immigrant to serve in the Virginia General Assembly. Now, she's running to to return to the House of Delegates by flipping the TOSS-UP 22nd District, a must-win seat to expand the 1-seat Democratic majority. Elizabeth came to America as a young single mother with $300 in her pocket. She worked three minimum wage jobs to afford a one-bedroom apartment and eventually worked her way through Northern Virginia Community College and earned two master’s degrees. She has spent her career in local government and human services which includes protecting children from neglect and abuse.
---
|

**Calling Out Reckless Healthcare Cuts**
---
On Tuesday, Del. Rasoul joined candidates Lily Franklin and Donna Littleplage to discuss the federal cuts to vital programs in Virginia. We need leadership that will defend Virginia, not bow to the "king" in DC. This November we have the opportunity to protect our communities from reckless policies that tear apart our health systems, schools, and public media. Here in SWVA hundreds of thousands are being impacted by federal cuts and hospitals will shut down.
---

On July 31 at 10 am, celebrate culture and empower community at the Grand Opening of Melrose Plaza. The Melrose Plaza is a family-friendly destination that pays tribute to Northwest Roanoke’s rich heritage and culture. The Melrose Avenue facility will provide access to healthy, affordable food, family health services, education advancement, career opportunities, financial services, and other resources.

Rasoul will join NETWORK NOVA on their weekly podcast, The Friday Power Lunch, along with guests from the Virginia Coalition for Immigrant Rights and candidates for the House of Delegates. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112051714/559256782/676558078?fbclid=IwY2xjawLuGYdleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETEyaVI4Q1R5UmQyVmNONkFtAR5A1ItHak8oontCF-P1N8lvbmmStxscIPM2lsbJdSJpFPepK14_Yh-9u3aoxw_aem_jktK-5djbSInoCG_vJf4Xg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGU3MWUzZS1hNzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpxU9jiNbuCLhANMShtzztjbnX0YVQziVHd5sNY5_7I=&emci=94edc73d-6167-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=50e71e3e-a768-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18273010)

**Interfaith Justice Revival****-****July 28**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH | | | | | | ADA 35 YEARS CELEBRATION Saturday, July 26 marks the 35th anniversary of the Americans with Disabilities Act, a landmark civil rights law that protects the rights of people with disabilities. On this anniversary, we celebrate the progress made and recommit to advancing equal opportunity, accessibility, and inclusion for all. | | DANTE VA FLOOD RELIEF Following the horrific flooding in Dante, Virginia, the St. Paul Fire Department is now accepting donations to support relief efforts All funds collected will go toward providing supplies for residents of Dante and the surrounding areas affected by the flood. If there are remaining funds after supply needs are met, they will be used to help restore community spaces. | | | | 2025 ELECTION | Don't get complacent, come out and canvass! There will be an informative discussion on how you can get involved in the campaign, and an opportunity to knock doors. Whether you're new to volunteering or an experienced activist, there are plenty of ways to help Sam win this election! Melrose Library is located at 2502 Melrose Ave NW, Roanoke, VA 24017. \[%7B%22extradata%22%3A%22%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22unknown%22%2C%22surface%22%3A%22usertimeline%22%7D%2C%7B%22extradata%22%3A%22%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22surface%22%2C%22surface%22%3A%22permalink%22%7D%2C%7B%22extradata%22%3A%22%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22yourupcomingeventsunit%22%2C%22surface%22%3A%22bookmark%22%7D\]%2C%22refnotiftype%22%3Anull%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGU3MWUzZS1hNzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpxU9jiNbuCLhANMShtzztjbnX0YVQziVHd5sNY57I=&emci=94edc73d-6167-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=50e71e3e-a768-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18273010 Please join the campaigns of Lily Franklin and Abigail Spanberger to knock on doors in Roanoke County! They're starting early to prove that they mean business and that they're in it to win it! First time canvassing? Don't worry, they'll provide all the training and cheerleading you need. Thank you so much for all of your help and support. Let's win this thing! | | | MEET THE CANDIDATES! | | | | LESLIE MEHTA FOR HD-73 Support Leslie Mehta's Campaign for Delegate! For Leslie, advocating for others is ingrained in her DNA and woven through her lived experience. Over her twenty-year law career, she has worked tirelessly to protect the rights of ALL Virginians. Leslie is determined to find real solutions to help our families thrive, and is proud to have been appointed by both Democratic and Republican governors to serve our Commonwealth. Leslie is running for Virginia's 73rd House District in Chesterfield to be a champion for all of our families. | = | | | KIMBERLY POPE ADAMS FOR HD-82 Kimberly is a lifelong Virginian who loves calling Dinwiddie home. She’s an Accountant and Auditor who wants to bring accountability to the House of Delegates. Growing up in the “Five Forks” area of Hopewell, Kimberly has a deep-rooted connection to the traditions and culture of the Tri-Cities. Her deep love for the area she grew up in is the cornerstone of why she’s running to serve the new 82nd District. The District of Petersburg, Dinwiddie, Prince George, and Surry deserves a Delegate to fight for all. Kimberly is a mother whose community has seen hardships that were preventable. She’s ready to be a voice for a District that has long been ignored by Richmond. | = | | | ELIZABETH GUZMAN FOR HD-22 Social worker Elizabeth Guzman was the first Latina immigrant to serve in the Virginia General Assembly. Now, she's running to to return to the House of Delegates by flipping the TOSS-UP 22nd District, a must-win seat to expand the 1-seat Democratic majority. Elizabeth came to America as a young single mother with $300 in her pocket. She worked three minimum wage jobs to afford a one-bedroom apartment and eventually worked her way through Northern Virginia Community College and earned two master’s degrees. She has spent her career in local government and human services which includes protecting children from neglect and abuse. | = | | | IN OUR COMMUNITY | | | Calling Out Reckless Healthcare Cuts On Tuesday, Del. Rasoul joined candidates Lily Franklin and Donna Littleplage to discuss the federal cuts to vital programs in Virginia. We need leadership that will defend Virginia, not bow to the "king" in DC. This November we have the opportunity to protect our communities from reckless policies that tear apart our health systems, schools, and public media. Here in SWVA hundreds of thousands are being impacted by federal cuts and hospitals will shut down. . | Melrose Plaza Grand Opening - July 31 On July 31 at 10 am, celebrate culture and empower community at the Grand Opening of Melrose Plaza. The Melrose Plaza is a family-friendly destination that pays tribute to Northwest Roanoke’s rich heritage and culture. The Melrose Avenue facility will provide access to healthy, affordable food, family health services, education advancement, career opportunities, financial services, and other resources. | | NETWORK NOVA With Del. Rasoul \- July 25 Tomorrow at noon Del. Rasoul will join NETWORK NOVA on their weekly podcast, The Friday Power Lunch, along with guests from the Virginia Coalition for Immigrant Rights and candidates for the House of Delegates. Tomorrow's podcast will include discussions on how to defend Democratic ideals with courage, conscientiousness, perseverance, resilience and passion. | Grandin Chillage**\- July 25 Grandin Chillage is tomorrow from 6-9 pm in Grandin Village. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: AOC just came to campaign in NY-21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Democrats sent a socialist to attack me...
| **_AN EMERGENCY MEMO FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Peter,
---
With each passing day, our campaign to DEFEND President Trump’s House majority and SAVE New York from Kathy Hochul is gaining more and more momentum.
---
But the Democrats have put a target on my back.
---
**They just sent Far Left radical Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to campaign in my congressional district, attack me personally, and _LIE_ to voters about President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill!**
---
The Democrats have gotten so extreme and out of touch that they think a socialist like AOC is their party’s best chance of defeating me and winning more votes upstate.
---
_Make no mistake, this is a political GIFT that we can use to rally voters against the Democrats and their radical agenda._
---
_But you want to know what would make AOC’s stop in NY-21 really BACKFIRE for the Democrats?_
---
**A surge of contributions from thousands of grassroots Americans giving just a few dollars to help us level the playing field against the MILLIONS OF DOLLARS that Hochul, AOC, and Mamdani will spend to _BUY_ the midterms! **
---
Remember, it’s not the __amount__ you give that’s important, Peter.
---
What matters most is the __sheer_ _number__ of America First __patriots__ who step up and stand with me against AOC’s radical defund-the-police agenda at this critical moment for our state – and our country.
---

clean_body: Democrats sent a socialist to attack me... | AN EMERGENCY MEMO FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK Peter, With each passing day, our campaign to DEFEND President Trump’s House majority and SAVE New York from Kathy Hochul is gaining more and more momentum. But the Democrats have put a target on my back. They just sent Far Left radical Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to campaign in my congressional district, attack me personally, and LIE to voters about President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill! The Democrats have gotten so extreme and out of touch that they think a socialist like AOC is their party’s best chance of defeating me and winning more votes upstate. Make no mistake, this is a political GIFT that we can use to rally voters against the Democrats and their radical agenda. But you want to know what would make AOC’s stop in NY-21 really BACKFIRE for the Democrats? A surge of contributions from thousands of grassroots Americans giving just a few dollars to help us level the playing field against the MILLIONS OF DOLLARS that Hochul, AOC, and Mamdani will spend to BUY the midterms! Remember, it’s not the amount you give that’s important, Peter. What matters most is the sheer number of America First patriots who step up and stand with me against AOC’s radical defund-the-police agenda at this critical moment for our state – and our country. Let’s show AOC that REAL New Yorkers reject her Communist insanity. Thank you, Rep. name: Eli
subject: I need to keep my boots on the ground, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane for Congress
body:
I get it - you’re tired of politicians...

I understand, Friend.
I know you're tired of politicians emailing you asking for money, and I don't blame you. With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts.
But let me tell you, **this is different.**
My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments.
I'm not afraid to take a stand: _I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination._
Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - **a whopping $50 MILLION war chest** to take me down in 2026.
But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. **_[That's why I'm asking you, with all humility, to chip in a few bucks before my critical fundraising deadline.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqhno2fsh44iulops4ct73ect3froprucms9k6i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpgeeoj1cph2bs)_**
I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands.
**__**[DONATE NOW >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdfinem5q8i991f9a71codi0oi54nerh7u4gaobo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpgeeoj1cph2bs)
God bless you.\- Eli Crane

With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts. But let me tell you, this is different. My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments. I'm not afraid to take a stand: I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination. Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - a whopping $50 MILLION war chest to take me down in 2026. But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands. body:
Republicans’ disastrous “Big Beautiful Bill” will lead to upwards of 40,000 people in CA-12 to lose their health care. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112053233/559261103/658807468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhNDA0NWMtYTg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tGJrVzq9rZaezTuUHI1ktvj4djxxilDXRcKe90541KA=&emci=61ef6f6f-1268-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ea4045c-a868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22554739) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112053235/559261105/-92377995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhNDA0NWMtYTg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tGJrVzq9rZaezTuUHI1ktvj4djxxilDXRcKe90541KA=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112053236/559261106/-1535407989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhNDA0NWMtYTg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tGJrVzq9rZaezTuUHI1ktvj4djxxilDXRcKe90541KA=)
---
| | Friend, I won’t mince words: **Republicans’ disastrous “Big Beautiful Bill” will lead to upwards of 40,000 people in CA-12 losing their health care.** We know that the disinformation circulating about this bill is spiraling. That is by design; the authors of this bill (the same people who drafted Project 2025) filled it with over 1,000 pages of intricate changes to allow this disinformation to fly. But guess what – _my office and I read every page._ But the bill is clear: President Trump and the GOP are giving tax breaks to the wealthiest among us to the tune of trillions of dollars. The only way to come up with that huge tax break for millionaires is by attacking the social safety net. Friend, I’m one of the few members of Congress who’s lived what so many Americans are living right now. When I was a very young single mother who lived in low-income housing, I relied on WIC and SNAP in my late teens... _**That’s why real proximity and a seat at the policy-making table matter — because without leaders who fully understand what it means to be working class, we’ll keep seeing policies harm the very programs families and working people rely on to survive.**_ [**Help me prepare for 2026 so I can continue being a voice for those who are shut out from the halls of power, so I can use my lived experience to fight for the people of CA-12 and beyond. Chip in whatever you can to support this movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112053238/559261108/1626305413?refcode=E14283-20250723-BigCruelDisaster-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhNDA0NWMtYTg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tGJrVzq9rZaezTuUHI1ktvj4djxxilDXRcKe90541KA=) This budget is one of the most dangerous bills in United States history. It cuts more than $1 trillion from health care alone, from Medicaid to the Affordable Care Act. And what are they doing with the money they’re taking away from the American people? They’re increasing the budget for the Department of Homeland Security and ICE by billions of dollars so they can continue terrorizing immigrant families, including many of whom __**are**__ American citizens taken into custody just for the language they speak or their last name. This bill is about cruelty, it’s about terror, and it’s about taking money from struggling people and funneling it to those who truly do not need it. [**This is precisely why we need more single mothers, more working people, and more diverse voices in Congress. Help keep me there to continue fighting for all of us by chipping in whatever you can to my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112053240/559261116/1626305413?refcode=E14283-20250723-BigCruelDisaster-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhNDA0NWMtYTg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tGJrVzq9rZaezTuUHI1ktvj4djxxilDXRcKe90541KA=) Thank you so much for all your support, Lateefah Simon PS: Hear more about my stance on the Big Ugly Disaster on the [**Law and Disorder show on KPFA.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112053241/559261123/-1282711709?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhNDA0NWMtYTg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tGJrVzq9rZaezTuUHI1ktvj4djxxilDXRcKe90541KA=&emci=61ef6f6f-1268-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1ea4045c-a868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22554739)

clean_body: Republicans’ disastrous “Big Beautiful Bill” will lead to upwards of 40,000 people in CA-12 to lose their health care. | = = | | Friend, I won’t mince words: Republicans’ disastrous “Big Beautiful Bill” will lead to upwards of 40,000 people in CA-12 losing their health care. We know that the disinformation circulating about this bill is spiraling. That is by design; the authors of this bill (the same people who drafted Project 2025) filled it with over 1,000 pages of intricate changes to allow this disinformation to fly. But guess what – my office and I read every page. But the bill is clear: President Trump and the GOP are giving tax breaks to the wealthiest among us to the tune of trillions of dollars. The only way to come up with that huge tax break for millionaires is by attacking the social safety net. Friend, I’m one of the few members of Congress who’s lived what so many Americans are living right now. When I was a very young single mother who lived in low-income housing, I relied on WIC and SNAP in my late teens... That’s why real proximity and a seat at the policy-making table matter — because without leaders who fully understand what it means to be working class, we’ll keep seeing policies harm the very programs families and working people rely on to survive. = This budget is one of the most dangerous bills in United States history. It cuts more than $1 trillion from health care alone, from Medicaid to the Affordable Care Act. And what are they doing with the money they’re taking away from the American people? They’re increasing the budget for the Department of Homeland Security and ICE by billions of dollars so they can continue terrorizing immigrant families, including many of whom are American citizens taken into custody just for the language they speak or their last name. This bill is about cruelty, it’s about terror, and it’s about taking money from struggling people and funneling it to those who truly do not need it. = Thank you so much for all your support, Lateefah Simon PS: Hear more about my stance on the Big Ugly Disaster on the | * | | ---|---|--- Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com = = Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials |

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6d854acaa92b42418fcdb0337c4818ad&_e=XyO4mrgdGIB_6vLMUWb0ndFHcNVaPoRjd2uqAZ6PnJ8MBChJwBfaYMzToo9HuGPhk02nDQxuR02vsc_Pg52fW89_AefMl7U-IhARB7ckc3UaH3yGo9_nQhwCGA4IFZMGNUHBAdSnJDfhmXtRFNRfNj3eg_pw34f-RxyupMFEtHZrcMVzhOma_Uep3vak7Wo_747sJg-cU0D0jOaHXzxHyc0IwUhvvSIrg_m5pnqAp-CwmdhnEdzTkR28-KPwdnXN-r9t2RWhNVL6pmbRaSw_7caCxQ7pfNI8TUER_-ZZRUde7LtdYLQqvyUhChnqynNg1tHhhWebm5PQV0tlvSfqk1AZoy0f546eefwIqYyDXcpobLJVepdGeTZnsVimEloqlV6EGfqMNyIsesuEohdviGYe8uWV8J5_Fis8GYxWfBUg9z2_PgZFfGlpN9kQhODYGYsCSpq9Y41F3orJejyh4P2Sw_b3x6GwFklvZdbVmRkIHPvvZb77wo2pwA4K2gUmD0WvwZ9mZPOOtKhuOc2yro0uiWJ3FuMNjr8ZTBgzudJvaB4jIU82yG-ODBZ15INe4LFx2OxO7ZDoDLrdUZsPZ2UEUEVhbYMxmglS93juTTCSw0EVfPlA7FrYf4_ZshL64fv1SdrB-iFJBclzpzV4wJiZh7q-E0Y-O9kc2tY4WMR8cdOatVwB8VJCHNZziPhckemQBWPBmcH8HsDU_ughdXRA4uV19P4lgRN8Y8UWeSLFIgSHNaoJR-GZJTvWwsuHLMkN-AclAMRpwEHXC0ppbNomdXG6tr3RiTLtevOCd90%3D)

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. clean_body: I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Veterans Detained. Sherman Silent.
body:
ICE raids are terrorizing our neighbors — including veterans.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=b6b86aa8ed&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=19aa48e56a&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| **Peter,** I’m asking for your help today. ICE is no longer just targeting undocumented families — **they’re detaining U.S. citizens, including veterans who served this country.** **Just weeks ago, George Retes, a local Army veteran and father of two, was arrested during an ICE raid.** Despite having proof of citizenship, he was brutalized and held for three days without charges or answers. This is happening right here in California, right now.**Brad Sherman has been silent. No outrage. No leadership.** When our neighbors are treated like criminals, silence is complicity. I’m running to change that. I will fight to end these raids and protect everyone in CD-32.[**We need your support to build a campaign that fights back. Can you contribute $27, $54, or $100 today?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=0cd871a47b&e=5a6ee82cdb)**The Trump administration has turned ICE into a secret police force** , terrorizing families, breaking apart communities, and even targeting those who risked their lives for this country. This is a betrayal of everything veterans like George stand for.**If I’m elected, I will be a tireless advocate for justice and dignity. I will never vote to fund ICE or their cruel tactics.** But to make that happen, we need a strong campaign fueled by people who demand real change.Please stand with me now. [**Your donation of $27, $54, or $100 will help us push back against ICE’s rampage and send a message that the 32nd District will not be intimidated.** ](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=dfcfebd179&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Committed to justice,****Chris Ahuja** **Democratic Candidate for Congress, CD-32**

name: Eli
subject: I need to keep my boots on the ground, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane for Congress
body:
I get it - you’re tired of politicians...

I understand, Friend.
I know you're tired of politicians emailing you asking for money, and I don't blame you. With inflation still being reeled in, every dollar counts.
But let me tell you, **this is different.**
My name is Eli Crane, and I'm a pro-Trump Navy SEAL Conservative warrior from Arizona. I've been on the front lines, fighting for our country in 5 war-time deployments.
I'm not afraid to take a stand: _I've always proudly championed Trump's America First agenda, I'm for a secure border, I'm for election integrity, and I'm for protecting our kids from woke indoctrination._
Democrats hate me, and the Establishment Republicans aren't too fond of me either. That's why they're throwing everything they've got at me - **a whopping $50 MILLION war chest** to take me down in 2026.
But I'm not backing down. I'm a Navy SEAL, and we don't give up. **_[That's why I'm asking you, with all humility, to chip in a few bucks before my critical fundraising deadline.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu5ul5hli7ljdq635v9ki7aan5tp2al4melkigi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpge1p32chh2bs)_**
I know times are still tough, and if you can't afford to give, I understand. But I'm counting on patriots like you to help me take on the Establishment and the radical Left. My candidacy is in your hands.
**__**[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt5ujgcgn7rcskdr4had3i6nq1dgeuntq4p9hr3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6cpge1p32chh2bs)
God bless you.\- Eli Crane

name: Rosemary Boeglin (via Democrats.org)
subject: An introduction:
body:
What I do and why it matters.
---
Hi Derek, My name is Rosemary Boeglin, the DNC’s Communications Director. I wanted to send you a quick note today to explain a little bit about what I do here at the DNC and why this work matters — especially right now. In this role, I spend my day working with an incredibly talented team of writers, press secretaries, communications strategists, media monitors, bookers, and more to find the best ways to communicate Democrats’ strength, values, and accomplishments — while also holding Trump and his allies accountable. Here are just a few things my team has done this year to highlight the work of Democrats nationwide while holding the Trump administration accountable:
* We’ve held more than 130 People’s Town Halls in all 50 states. Democrats are showing up for voters where Republicans aren’t.
* We launched [TrumpTax.com](https://ak.democrats.org/go/16422?t=1&akid=4065%2E22930333%2E1lO-CI), highlighting how Trump’s policies will raise costs for working families.
* We’ve established the War Room, our rapid response operation to innovate how Democrats communicate and hold the Trump administration accountable.
* We launched our first-ever live daily messaging broadcast program, the Daily Blueprint, to help viewers stay informed and share how they can get involved in the fight.
* And so much more!

**The truth is that breaking through all of the noise and chaos of the Trump administration isn’t easy. It requires a team of incredibly talented staff and a massive amount of resources. That’s where you come in: Our work to amplify and spread the message of the Democratic Party is only possible with the support of grassroots supporters like you.** $3 might not seem like a lot in the grand scheme of things, but it’s contributions from Democrats across the country that allow us to get our message out so we can continue to elect folks who are actually dedicated to fighting for working families, not billionaires. [**If this kind of work matters to you, I’m asking you to contribute $3 to the DNC so we can continue to amplify our vision and elect Democrats nationwide >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250724_4044_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4065_22930333_1lO-CI&akid=4065%2E22930333%2E1lO-CI) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250724_4044_fr&refcode2=4065_22930333_1lO-CI&akid=4065%2E22930333%2E1lO-CI)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They Want Me Silent—But I’m Fighting for Trump’s America. Will You Stand With Me?
body:
The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21701663/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcHN6djlFRVFNNA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjQ/LbmNsZ2tCU1FuNw/qP2hpZHM9bmNwTEJTZ3d5aVF6TkVscw/gaIJeJA/s2na2f7bd1a)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21701663/VaHR0cHM6Ly9sb29tZXJlZC5yZXZ2LmNvL2xsLXN0YW5kLWFnYWluLW1iLW9tLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjQ/LbmNsZ2tCU1FuNw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGwtc3RhbmQtYWdhaW4mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMDYwX3dyMQ/gaIJeJA/sei0826e2be)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21701663/VaHR0cHM6Ly9sb29tZXJlZC5yZXZ2LmNvL2xsLXN0YW5kLWFnYWluLW1iLW9tLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjQ/LbmNsZ2tCU1FuNw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGwtc3RhbmQtYWdhaW4mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMDYwX3dyMQ/gaIJeJA/sei0826e2be) Dear Patriot,

My name is Laura Loomer, and I’m not your typical journalist. I don’t sit in a cushy newsroom parroting talking points for the elite. I’m out there, in the trenches, exposing the corruption, betrayal, and deep-state sabotage that threatens everything President Trump has fought for—and everything we believe in. I’m a fighter, a patriot, and a relentless truth-teller. But right now, I’m writing to you [**because I can’t keep this fight alive without your help**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21701663/VaHR0cHM6Ly9sb29tZXJlZC5yZXZ2LmNvL2xsLXN0YW5kLWFnYWluLW1iLW9tLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjQ/LbmNsZ2tCU1FuNw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGwtc3RhbmQtYWdhaW4mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMDYwX3dyMQ/gaIJeJA/sei0826e2be).

Let me tell you why I do this. I’ve seen the lies, the cover-ups, and the cowardice firsthand. The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don’t care who’s in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that’s eating away at our country. And what I’ve found in recent weeks? **It’s enough to make your blood boil.**

**The Stories They Don’t Want You to Hear**

* **Summits of the Americas Turned Into a Woke Disaster**
Picture this: a gathering meant to strengthen America’s position in the world, hijacked by Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings. These traitors are turning the Summits of the Americas into a pro-China, woke circus. I went down there myself, tracked their moves, and uncovered how they’re undermining Trump’s America First policies to cozy up to Communist China. They thought they could get away with it—but I’m making sure the world knows their names and their shame.

* **An Obama Loyalist Sabotaging Trump’s Iran Strategy**
Then there’s Nathanael Swanson. This guy’s an Obama-era relic, still slinking around the State Department’s Iran negotiation team like a snake in the grass. Trump took a hard line against Iran—sanctions, strength, no compromise. But Swanson? He’s working behind the scenes to unravel it all, putting our national security on the line. I’ve spent sleepless nights piecing together the paper trail of all Biden holdovers who remain inside the Trump admin, and I’m not stopping until they are all out of there for good.

* **Dan Goldman and the Democrat Cover-Up Machine**
Ever heard of Rep. Dan Goldman? He’s a slick operator shielding violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while orchestrating lawfare against Trump. I caught wind of this when I started digging into McIver’s trail of chaos—Goldman’s been running interference, protecting his own while the Democrats try to bury Trump under legal attacks. I’ve got the receipts, and I’m exposing their game one bombshell at a time.

* **Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence**
Two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist. Two lives snuffed out, and what did Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib do? Nothing. Not a word of condemnation. They’re silent because they’re complicit, enabling Jew hatred and Islamic terrorism while pretending to care about justice. I’ve been on the ground, talking to sources, documenting every disgusting detail. They can’t hide from me—and I won’t let them.

* **A DEI Judge Blocking Trump’s Vision**
And then there’s Judge Myong J. Joun, a Biden appointee whose family rakes in cash from DEI consulting. This guy had the nerve to block Trump’s order to dismantle the Department of Education—a move that would’ve freed our kids from woke indoctrination. I dug into his family’s financial ties, and it’s clear: this isn’t justice, it’s a paycheck. I’m fighting to get that story out there, because our children deserve better.

**Why I Need You**

These aren’t just stories—they’re battles. Every day, I’m taking on the deep state, the media, and the woke mob. They hate me for it. They’ve tried to censor me, smear me, shut me down. But I don’t flinch. I don’t back off. Because this isn’t about me—**it’s about you, your family, and the future of America**. It’s about protecting Trump’s America First agenda from the cowards and traitors trying to tear it apart.

Here’s the raw truth: I don’t have corporate sponsors or billionaire sugar daddies bankrolling me. I’m funded by people like you—patriots who see what’s at stake and refuse to let the swamp win. [**Every dollar you donate keeps me in the fight**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21701663/VaHR0cHM6Ly9sb29tZXJlZC5yZXZ2LmNvL2xsLXN0YW5kLWFnYWluLW1iLW9tLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjQ/LbmNsZ2tCU1FuNw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9bGwtc3RhbmQtYWdhaW4mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMDYwX3dyMQ/gaIJeJA/sei0826e2be). It pays for my plane tickets to chase leads, my late-night research, the equipment I need to break these stories. [**Without you, I’m grounded. clean_body: The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. | | | | Dear Patriot, My name is Laura Loomer, and I’m not your typical journalist. I don’t sit in a cushy newsroom parroting talking points for the elite. I’m out there, in the trenches, exposing the corruption, betrayal, and deep-state sabotage that threatens everything President Trump has fought for—and everything we believe in. I’m a fighter, a patriot, and a relentless truth-teller. But right now, I’m writing to you . Let me tell you why I do this. I’ve seen the lies, the cover-ups, and the cowardice firsthand. The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don’t care who’s in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that’s eating away at our country. And what I’ve found in recent weeks? It’s enough to make your blood boil. The Stories They Don’t Want You to Hear Summits of the Americas Turned Into a Woke Disaster Picture this: a gathering meant to strengthen America’s position in the world, hijacked by Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings. These traitors are turning the Summits of the Americas into a pro-China, woke circus. I went down there myself, tracked their moves, and uncovered how they’re undermining Trump’s America First policies to cozy up to Communist China. They thought they could get away with it—but I’m making sure the world knows their names and their shame. An Obama Loyalist Sabotaging Trump’s Iran Strategy Then there’s Nathanael Swanson. This guy’s an Obama-era relic, still slinking around the State Department’s Iran negotiation team like a snake in the grass. Trump took a hard line against Iran—sanctions, strength, no compromise. But Swanson? He’s working behind the scenes to unravel it all, putting our national security on the line. I’ve spent sleepless nights piecing together the paper trail of all Biden holdovers who remain inside the Trump admin, and I’m not stopping until they are all out of there for good. Dan Goldman and the Democrat Cover-Up Machine Ever heard of Rep. Dan Goldman? He’s a slick operator shielding violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while orchestrating lawfare against Trump. I caught wind of this when I started digging into McIver’s trail of chaos—Goldman’s been running interference, protecting his own while the Democrats try to bury Trump under legal attacks. I’ve got the receipts, and I’m exposing their game one bombshell at a time. Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence Two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist. Two lives snuffed out, and what did Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib do? Nothing. Not a word of condemnation. They’re silent because they’re complicit, enabling Jew hatred and Islamic terrorism while pretending to care about justice. I’ve been on the ground, talking to sources, documenting every disgusting detail. They can’t hide from me—and I won’t let them. A DEI Judge Blocking Trump’s Vision And then there’s Judge Myong J. Joun, a Biden appointee whose family rakes in cash from DEI consulting. This guy had the nerve to block Trump’s order to dismantle the Department of Education—a move that would’ve freed our kids from woke indoctrination. I dug into his family’s financial ties, and it’s clear: this isn’t justice, it’s a paycheck. I’m fighting to get that story out there, because our children deserve better. Why I Need You These aren’t just stories—they’re battles. Every day, I’m taking on the deep state, the media, and the woke mob. They hate me for it. They’ve tried to censor me, smear me, shut me down. But I don’t flinch. I don’t back off. Because this isn’t about me—it’s about you, your family, and the future of America. It’s about protecting Trump’s America First agenda from the cowards and traitors trying to tear it apart. Here’s the raw truth: I don’t have corporate sponsors or billionaire sugar daddies bankrolling me. I’m funded by people like you—patriots who see what’s at stake and refuse to let the swamp win. . It pays for my plane tickets to chase leads, my late-night research, the equipment I need to break these stories. Stand With Me—Right Now Your donation isn’t just money—it’s fuel for the fire I’m lighting under these corrupt elites. It’s a fist in the air against the liars and sellouts. It’s a promise that we won’t let them silence us. I’m not giving up. I’ve got more leads, more stories, more battles ahead. . With you by my side, we can expose every single one of these rats and defend the America we love. With Vigilance, Laura Loomer

| | Peter, I grew up attending a Boys and Girls club in my blue-collar neighborhood of McKeesport. Both my parents had to work hard to put food on the table. While my mom worked hard at the salon, my dad drove buses for Pittsburgh Regional Transit. **As a family, we relied on community programs like Boys and Girls clubs to provide a safe place for me to be a kid.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112055577/559268774/160205011?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_072425_BGC_30DO30MO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZlZDRiMy1hYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tnHR-gn-RyBqAGW-esshfEYXeRLg3Y2p2sn1nc1Hk0=) It's a big part of why I'm so committed to investing in before and after-school programming in the Commonwealth. I know firsthand the impact it can make, so I'm proud of the historic investments our administration has made to help champion the next generation's success. **I've come a long way since I was a kid at the Boys and Girls club, but I know I wouldn't be here today without the support I received from my community.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112055578/559268775/160205011?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_072425_BGC_30DO30MO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZlZDRiMy1hYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tnHR-gn-RyBqAGW-esshfEYXeRLg3Y2p2sn1nc1Hk0=) We must protect these kinds of investments, especially in the face of a federal administration that turns its back on our kids at every chance it gets. From cutting funding for schools and teachers to removing access to food assistance and healthcare, we can't slow down in the fight for our kids. [**As your Lieutenant Governor, I'll always work to keep our streets safe and create ladders of opportunity for our young people. Will you do me the honor of chipping in to my re-election campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112055579/559268776/160205011?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_072425_BGC_30DO30MO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZlZDRiMy1hYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tnHR-gn-RyBqAGW-esshfEYXeRLg3Y2p2sn1nc1Hk0=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.
