clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, I grew up attending a Boys and Girls club in my blue-collar neighborhood of McKeesport. Both my parents had to work hard to put food on the table. While my mom worked hard at the salon, my dad drove buses for Pittsburgh Regional Transit. As a family, we relied on community programs like Boys and Girls clubs to provide a safe place for me to be a kid. = It's a big part of why I'm so committed to investing in before and after-school programming in the Commonwealth. I know firsthand the impact it can make, so I'm proud of the historic investments our administration has made to help champion the next generation's success. I've come a long way since I was a kid at the Boys and Girls club, but I know I wouldn't be here today without the support I received from my community. = We must protect these kinds of investments, especially in the face of a federal administration that turns its back on our kids at every chance it gets. From cutting funding for schools and teachers to removing access to food assistance and healthcare, we can't slow down in the fight for our kids. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We are in this together, Peter. Thank you for your support. Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. It's no secret that I've been one of President Trump's strongest supporters.

I've been one of the leading voices of the conservative agenda, helping President Trump sign the 'Big, Beautiful Bill' into law.

_I will always stand up to protect the unborn._

_I will always work to keep our country and borders secure._

_I will continue to work with our president to rebuild our military and serve the men and women who serve our country with honor._

**I'm the conservative the Left desperately wants out of their way.**

Big money liberal groups are already lining my Democrat opponent's campaign with millions.

Fellow American, I'll continue to fight, but I need to know you're by my side. Will you please endorse my re-election campaign today? Your endorsement sends a strong, clear message that conservatives are standing with me and are ready for the 2026 mid-terms.

Thank you,
Lindsey Graham

clean_body: I’ll continue to fight, but I need to know you’re by my side. | Fellow American, I've been honored to receive the full support from some of our country's strongest leaders. From President Donald Trump to U.S. Senator Tim Scott and countless others, conservatives in South Carolina and beyond are rallying their support around my re-election campaign. I'm incredibly grateful for their support. But, Fellow American, I'm missing a very important supporter from my list: YOU! It's no secret that I've been one of President Trump's strongest supporters. I've been one of the leading voices of the conservative agenda, helping President Trump sign the 'Big, Beautiful Bill' into law. I will always stand up to protect the unborn. I will always work to keep our country and borders secure. I will continue to work with our president to rebuild our military and serve the men and women who serve our country with honor. I'm the conservative the Left desperately wants out of their way. Big money liberal groups are already lining my Democrat opponent's campaign with millions. Fellow American, I'll continue to fight, but I need to know you're by my side. Will you please endorse my re-election campaign today? Your endorsement sends a strong, clear message that conservatives are standing with me and are ready for the 2026 mid-terms. Thank you, Lindsey Graham | In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

Peter, our public schools aren’t perfect – but they helped get me to where I am today. Growing up in the midst of the Civil Rights movement meant that I experienced my fair share of discrimination and inequities as a young Black woman. Despite those challenges, I was able to find support from teachers, friends, and faculty who believed in me.

**Now, I’m committed to making our public schools the best they can be for everyone, regardless of their race, religion, or where they live.**

But instead of working to improve our public schools, Donald Trump and the GOP want to throw it all away — starting with funding cuts just like this one. Decades of progress we’ve made to get here are on the line. [Will you sign my petition to show your support? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112055844/559269588/386748273?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_072425_EDUFunding_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzcxMTZmZC1hYjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XB5w8maCGszX7sWHjWkj0SpvMOA2TIz_YBFOHyBcljc=&emci=1405703b-3663-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=777116fd-ab68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=799895)

Thank you,

Valerie Foushee

Despite those challenges, I was able to find support from teachers, friends, and faculty who believed in me. Now, I’m committed to making our public schools the best they can be for everyone, regardless of their race, religion, or where they live. But instead of working to improve our public schools, Donald Trump and the GOP want to throw it all away — starting with funding cuts just like this one. Decades of progress we’ve made to get here are on the line. Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Trump’s name is in the Epstein files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
We have a right to know whether the people with the keys to our democracy have engaged in illegal and illicit behavior. | |
---
Peter, This week, Speaker Mike Johnson sent the House home early in order to avoid a vote to release the Epstein files. But even he can’t cover up this much corruption. **Yesterday, the Wall Street Journal reported that the Department of Justice told Trump his name was all over the documents:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-hnP2UUCrJtoeQA2AIzNRJFNH5Lc9aRYdx-XhQiYGf4ZmsxsdT0EjtAkPmfg-Iy8gq1IX5FhJeDce3svcIAsRgec-tzkvPuq8xFmJDJ3cMLnB8s28RRHMiS_LsAmyvTNjgc2Qmzd54piSKkaTitrGD-dJkfs-YuQX1FBJr1xrOWoWK1UG8gdbfoTu3ddvQlD58rk5g5P51oRQYoaH-LyLIul_rgkrBLALeCqWZ3LVWNrAPAMrHe19X4fvJh-k0e39MfyX-wS9J6sqShKRdjYmx50DYVJBskqScVCVlrm9il7N23bDAzKBvhQiTb7PFvFwXD3estlGw8C29swFIVM8XHmtrHUfq7UgKla3ujrCdJylvYUuurUEJHuH7J6rkF1DLynrRxn1wBlkdHVeQfgP64QLn8hOOqN7uPpd0YpVyDK9Z_yA9bUoQeRuCtN2m60hCH80YxWnIOC0mkjkz3kvXaQqmmQHsdlIKMmyaPKKh67b8zfZ1lAuRteNFp-HsX5g/4ig/_ue3OMyKT7e6fGZzHNf6EQ/h0/h001.KtSi8xOp6Pvn99PHcp8_pM9z8Mzb3pzYfCz8E3vnE-s) [**Mike Johnson can’t sit on this forever. A bipartisan group of House members are working to force a floor vote on the Epstein Files using a “discharge petition.” It takes 218 signatures to work. Tell your member of Congress to sign the discharge petition!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-hnP2UUCrJtoeQA2AIzNRJFNH5Lc9aRYdx-XhQiYGf4ZmsxsdT0EjtAkPmfg-Iy8gq1IX5FhJeDce3svcIAsRgec-tzkvPuq8xFmJDJ3cMLnB8s28RRHMiS_LsAmyvTNjgc2Qmzd54piSKkaTitrGD-dJkfs-YuQX1FBJr1xrOWoWK1UG8gdbfoTu3ddvQlD58rk5g5P51oRQYoaH-LyLIul_rgkrBLALeCqWZ3LVWNufO5O9mJcBonNnybbhT6QtbGgCK4_CyGZOY3O5-Y1c-IGoaUCXHl-jCZn999Y_E3GwSEjsxdrx_ayIgroXbLSnJVvZv3ed0pr-bN4g26r768T7inRIlzo21E81G7gpYYUhiviwip4jIIpNyOYQpip7GL01mPJygzQUk2pQdQF2MPkNiPD-FtVlf2WA1KSlyJsMbwMDF37Hgcth4k5Dl4QJtvf1U4pXBumfROnWjIUVcbvbZJAe-UZxWSD8pSa2eEpNpy2FrSLOd4rm0SmojBEE/4ig/_ue3OMyKT7e6fGZzHNf6EQ/h1/h001.vnsg-SSSC89hH_ve0COURQ5J-rdMWN0BpBGl9YJT8MY) **We need to know if our leaders are beholden to shady billionaires—and if they’re pulling the levers of power to hide their corruption.** We’ve spent the last several years tracking the MAGA corruption at the Supreme Court, so we’re all too familiar with the corruptive influence of shady billionaires on our democracy. **Justice Clarence Thomas** took undisclosed gifts from billionaire Harlan Crow. **Justice Samuel Alito** has been photographed on lavish trips with private equity billionaire Paul Singer. **Justice Neil Gorsuch’s** career has long been linked to billionaire benefactor Philip Anschutz. Enough is enough. Justice Clarence Thomas took undisclosed gifts from billionaire Harlan Crow. Justice Samuel Alito has been photographed on lavish trips with private equity billionaire Paul Singer. subject: CNN claims...
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/B0UWMgZOfDUjDa0ZzZUmX4o70stGAP5RfBNJ67AIolg9hFzJ9f32QeOBkgWbrWvh5yAgOzTvedph828AIhApXlPbu-Zay0kqE0pFbpppgzCCpUS2RGt7e0GtUVaGqipbd5bn0Z4cQJmp6Fkm3UC2Qk1gJRff9HuFoNiHmEQifDN2jT89dwqFo0_E/Y4jmHmGr-XefsF1xxNuTRAbdqQvVZqUC/11)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/bkX5y9X6Z1xcdt3XCM07zIDbjLqPxm05g1E8lgw44ejF50NGLbuiLe0Bg8iWEi6PZdR79scSdvVklUggrMgRgvs7jhb2FP8wUSBbeK0QUv8P0JqxK8r2lG-o3iExbn4gPVnkH0kmUYDRsR8B_GE0-RP4Uw83Ub6boHZx0TetknejaX27moC1gqYLssII6MoTuPUGOWdqpazRlAWoSBaasfQRtI06a8NS2m3TJxiZ9EmpwpGJdWPO9K7SEcWq_QvyK5DSdLW6vTOj7BWF73r_Zz4CiobusLNqqK0wskcqKIWGGtbS-E-6Vq7vLt3Lz9QNj-C-kj0wb6AwiMrHjWaf5wkbW-3xTNnEwaV0ZtvwJ1iO8E_o2u87_VOStO25eGKXPe7Sg6peXx914wCOkMrDakWLi1UgipQJ7erxfzAdQ96PKcw3iDVLgqj3-gS8PIP1cePbIIA2NblBpEFC33_X3WbPjd2ZrlrDY1ieFownosDNge8DEocG-cetO4gBDtnp7EhTI64PUjZJZ5UutW9ct561n-l3FocWibjPvW7kYArfDxG_sRaY5SFFe_n8lmfJpYO22hlix5FFccroTR9Xr8WpgU0iAxbkyJmhBU_5MzBbwJt19VxEvhPgfn9Bmlospp9ZEg8BG3bwUL135b6y4VWXX8oy5JOx1iTYm3yrJ2c2W6p64q6LSRGMy_hS8XsMRSDHSHXS3FnqAdBzYIR2OhJILGOOvYWHEKWWJtBgKSpNzZcN4ylEAWlOOOaUey2fdgTCwxUATtquPm75Orr6/i1x-p7eHNDr1N4-UKvpuRv0J0Fa5XZGl/11) Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis."

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/MFfVcCAIl09eEicOljaLhqwrKopt-yh97y2vMCRzoM3ALl-agGMZcdmhnJdo7y0R6U94S-DxyROrS9oT95D9jcF-kNWDuUEkWOZ0V44p1CwhaIbqVsVQvVbkW3PKCtfFahOQFJlBcuNfrNzYA9GYBqIsMKMqXoEXMe9sAg7Xy_NjWId4HsirZKIRo_iIDr2o-swSEXfOcot86pXtymwBp2oLqDJrpVB-PaYw8Xtn5vGfira5KYefRo4CbrNfKrL3JxOvB5dA_HmTvFifPje_wUqJNEkj1PPrsH3KarG9RMDt_6OjYDiQ2EMEIY_hfpiXrJ6PS19TdpCJHYAreUnf8bcAcgPzyuZd-AphHNv9VYnpkYUEVntqLiPoKQICBcZJlVnm8dBw4Gedbfk9r89iySD6CuNwkE-XvR8bgZcj1t6Sr3yXjZvPB4MFaDTDsDaBFVZyave_Rh5_05f0w3E-S0czpWwpajnhKuD15e77RuBQz0omQ3bIaiF_Zye2RVxR1TSO3mbkOOu09HsfcwhOpjvHalgTbCdryIJazBNXUc-evPbz1CGmtKFpAj9RCLe9IvKGkmlGVZzL9iecGJbEzAWW8ZsIKwt8bnFd2RCCVqWYV1gWoz3NV1wK-cXCqZHWY_Xq-r9ySTn0ldLouQeB9otx74s8UYzhcj5KNFDCcWOxXPiF-j1cBzyvvmNftXikAzgxWOwz0Ae80xJVc266vCMHlFwz0Lk_dVw7SEuQCO9LIZ5tOZSTLEecWT5jCLYLtquz1q6bgomeeJRCmRC6/VJNkXFmUL_CRY75OhTw-rFv72Qd2Ua5w/11) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Jq8tntc7T9R92Itn15o6iSAJiJQk5fo3ADXPeR40Ve8rav5-AQmUmSts9qJxiVYU6YKPXlt7Vrdho3Ihl6Iz4C9V8O1KiA7z1rMmps_wsC66TKMtF7lrHRn4CZLmIJwD-xrurDbcC5YhgmrkH5PxhCluddrbIaduivmV9UHu5W9sKRKPEtNErBsaVhQrpk0-xM5loqqenQ1ir7FVFw_8RMPHfvWTYwLsNl2aH3wAQScr1ZddTcyrElnm9d332jghquoTubWJgzK-O35oJgbsOMcLuJ8UMD_ljte3QmCtLWv137uYVYIl2pewp1Sx2jSN4gPneEV4yh1-HQC9heHza9m4d8O4_LedCh999mV9KCZf7dBL_zPElM7vJxkAJPji3rq4gah_W7TTkTrVEgKJlDFJBFBdMRLCSln8ywcwkS8U3Sw3wVjbkPzNnbcSyrpoejvoLORmqT_i1ZqbkvQCJltzKu21zlAdMdvEW8qD7odjdKLr9J2eh8iu2nC6SyGWjNCPMDfARoc4_2zZR59b_nqkvqy7E0Ie70WJfqfZbMc8GAxtNhVfIyxpDyWJ9__dpPFI7C5VDfuJRqPjbz8UpE_LIf612Wwr7sdbh8YXtyvpdnTCuacHyKz1jbwLJvzP90659Ad_RrasN1d16KwPuqa8W6F_IjzgC_AletABL7KqWdmWL7jRzrCDmvF_PLVrzKxmRfiZpG2aGtmTV5lmld1lKIc_3-CWbDmlksC_ICUjeeVvgoL0W9MCKN0gNCXuhkXmfNenujpcPP9FHp5m/_UQx_z5hf0TLY9q2UEa7qWJLzV6CRrss/11)

Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/5c6eATbaHXkCgb0rvegUKfzHhmskqiJTxzdyznGEJt2ecYPrc2tQixsgr4gFp8pwo2V_iTslcEk8h2Shshe3hQ6tDnHcuBw4vC2KsTctUk8YU2qj23tc8C-WfGmuVKVhpvXJtL7MlxQPNqZj0-uYRwpnViRwi0SOa-WIMmy7VFQ5lzT-aazUps7_iGSevZgbQ8P2BO0TaFI9B-eIqQQ0dKBZN9edYjpRIA/BqTpzXwUfDpu-HC6MYxJul_kjwgwVQkO/11)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/B0UWMgZOfDUjDa0ZzZUmX4o70stGAP5RfBNJ67AIolg9hFzJ9f32QeOBkgWbrWvh5yAgOzTvedph828AIhApXlPbu-Zay0kqE0pFbpppgzCCpUS2RGt7e0GtUVaGqipbd5bn0Z4cQJmp6Fkm3UC2Qk1gJRff9HuFoNiHmEQifDN2jT89dwqFo0_E/Y4jmHmGr-XefsF1xxNuTRAbdqQvVZqUC/11).

When I first launched this campaign, it was your energy that made me sure we were on the path to something special. And that same energy, that excitement across Western Wisconsin to bring real, homegrown, community-first representation to Congress has allowed us to head into this moment with some of the biggest momentum of any campaign in the country.
**But we can’t stop now.** Even as Derrick Van Orden continues to embarrass this district with his erratic behavior, he is one of the most well-funded incumbents in the country – thanks to far-right special interests backing his campaign – and it will take every last ounce of what we have to overcome that power.
I’m running for Congress to bring real representation for farmers, nurses, small business owners, and the folks who make this district work. But defeating someone like Van Orden takes grassroots power, and that’s where you come in.

clean_body: | = | | = When I first launched this campaign, it was your energy that made me sure we were on the path to something special. And that same energy, that excitement across Western Wisconsin to bring real, homegrown, community-first representation to Congress has allowed us to head into this moment with some of the biggest momentum of any campaign in the country. But we can’t stop now. Even as Derrick Van Orden continues to embarrass this district with his erratic behavior, he is one of the most well-funded incumbents in the country – thanks to far-right special interests backing his campaign – and it will take every last ounce of what we have to overcome that power. I’m running for Congress to bring real representation for farmers, nurses, small business owners, and the folks who make this district work. name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- July 24
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors, I have been in office less than seven months now, and I am excited to share with you the progress we are making on behalf of Marylanders, even in the face of this callous Administration. As you know, prior to being elected United States Senator for Maryland, I was County Executive for Prince George's County, Maryland. In that role, it was my job to get things done on behalf of the communities I served regardless of the national economic or political climate. That's why, despite a global pandemic, I got moving, building 10 new schools in three years, with eight more coming out of the ground. I built a cancer center, a mental health and addictions care facility, grew jobs and opportunities, and more. That mission continues to drive me here in the Senate -- to deliver tangible benefits to Marylanders, whom I have the profound privilege of representing.
**Fighting for You in the Senate** Since January I have: * Co-led **2** bills signed into law * Sponsored **6** bills * Cosponsored **106** bills * Introduced **23** amendments The **GENIUS Act** and the **Small Business Tax Fairness and Compliance Simplification Act** are the two bills I cosponsored that have since been signed into law. GENIUS: After cosponsoring the original bill, I negotiated the final version of the GENIUS Act, which created a federal regulatory framework for digital assets. This is critical legislation for a number of reasons. I don't want Maryland families to live on the margins - I want all of you to be able to build wealth, and live beyond your wildest dreams. Far too often, when there is an emerging market, we wait too long to regulate that market, make it safe for consumers, and accessible for those who should have the chance to access its benefits. I cosponsored this legislation, because I firmly believe it is crucial we develop regulations and consumer protections that foster innovation in the U.S., including for stablecoins. It's clear that more and more Americans view the broader digital asset market as a genuine opportunity to build wealth, create jobs, and more. I don't believe it is the government's place to advise the public on what and how to invest, but it is our duty to make sure every marketplace has protections and guardrails. This is merely a first step. I look forward to working on further legislation in this space so we can generate more opportunities for Americans to engage in this emerging market should they so choose. **Small Business Tax Fairness and Compliance Simplification Act:** This legislation allows beauty industry small businesses, such as hair stylists, barbers, and nail technicians, to qualify for the Section 45(B) federal tax credit and provides a safe harbor for these businesses to establish procedures for tipped employees to better report their wages without attracting additional tax liability. The beauty industry is the second largest tip-based sector but is excluded from the Section 45(B) federal tip tax credit. Currently, the tax credit is only available for the restaurant industry and not the beauty industry. Providing beauty industry small businesses with access to the Section 45(B) credit allows them to hire more employees and decrease their federal tax burden. Small businesses are the backbone of Maryland, the backbone of our country, and this legislation allows Maryland's small businesses in the beauty industry to flourish.
**** In addition to these two bills I've gotten signed into law, I continue to work hard to draft and pass other pieces of legislation to help Marylanders. For example, my Access to Small Business Investor Capital Act would make it easier for business development companies to invest in small - and medium - sized Maryland businesses. Below are some other highlights from my last several months in office. **Jordan McNair Athlete Heat Fatality Prevention Act** Senator Chris Van Hollen and I introduced the Jordan McNair Student Athlete Heat Fatality Prevention Act in the Senate. U.S. Congressman Kweisi Mfume (Md.-07) introduced the companion legislation in the United States House of Representatives. This legislation will serve as a lifeline for student athletes and requires college and high school athletic programs to implement heat illness emergency action plans (EAPs) in consultation with local emergency responders, including the operation and use of cold-water immersion equipment. This legislation honors Jordan McNair, who was a freshman on the University of Maryland football team when he collapsed during practice on May 29, 2018 due to heatstroke. Roughly 90 minutes passed before McNair arrived at a nearby hospital in critical condition. He was then airlifted to the University of Maryland Medical Center Shock Trauma Center to receive an emergency liver transplant, but tragically died 2 weeks later. An investigation conducted immediately after Jordan McNair's death showed the athletic staff did not take aggressive measures to lower his body temperature. It is long past time that we pass the?_Jordan McNair Student Athlete Heat Fatality Prevention Act_ and finally ensure student athletes are protected, and college athletic programs implement heat illness emergency action plans and coordinate with local emergency responders. Jordan McNair would be 26 today. We must honor his memory by getting this legislation passed. You can read the full bill [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15480.10607160.5548128.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2025%2f07%2fJordan-McNair.pdf&redir_log=608155016272523).
**In the Community** My office loved mentoring Annicha for Girls Inc.'s Take Our Daughters to Congress Day. Annicha is a Marylander from Washington County, and I was so glad to speak with her and hear her interests. Our future is looking good in the hands of Annicha and all the girls of Girls Inc. I had a productive discussion with Calvert County educators hearing not only about their successes but also their real concerns about how federal funding losses will impact their students. Education is the great equalizer, and I'll always stand up for our students and their teachers. It was good to meet with IBEW Local 26! Maryland's economic success depends on robust federal support, protected labor standards, and expanded access to apprenticeship and training programs that create good-paying jobs. I will always be a champion for labor rights. I met with Cameron Grove seniors, all of whom expressed anger at this callous Administration and its obsession with harming working people. I told them what I tell every Marylander - I'm in this fight for you. Honored to join the National Black Prosecutors Foundation Conference to serve as their keynote speaker. Being a domestic violence prosecutor and later State's Attorney were some of the most fulfilling experiences of my life. Thank you to the NBPA and its members - the keepers of justice in an unjust society. **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15480.10607160.5548128.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

Friend,
I am thrilled to announce that I have been endorsed by Elect Black Women PAC!
Elect Black Women PAC is a national organization dedicated to uplifting and empowering Black women leaders who are ready to make real change and I’m honored to have earned their support in this race for Texas’ 18th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0724_ebwe [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0724_ebwe]
This endorsement comes at a critical time. Greg Abbott and Trump are working hard to redraw districts to silence the voices of Black and Brown communities across Texas including right here in Houston.
We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. We must fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0724_ebwe&refcode2=dfc2eb9e-af68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]
I look forward to rolling up my sleeves and getting to work alongside you to make that happen.
If you’d like to join this movement, you can sign up to volunteer here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gGBiXHgNike1vLlv3r92fw2] or make a contribution here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0724_ebwe&refcode2=dfc2eb9e-af68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b] before our end of the month deadline.
Thank you for standing with me.
Amanda K. Edwards

name: Final email
subject: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully Patriot - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one shot! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing a CRUCIAL Mid-Month Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Fellow Patriot. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Fellow Patriot. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears | | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: PA Dems
subject: The fight for our court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

This November, three democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court face retention.

If just two lose their seats, **_Republicans take the majority_**. And once they have the bench, they’ll use it. To ban abortion. To bulldoze voting rights. To gerrymander our maps beyond recognition. To tear up our Constitution and turn Pennsylvania into a MAGA playground.

This is **_NOT_** theoretical. They’ve been laying the groundwork for years. They are eying this court the same way they have gone after _Ohio, Florida, Texas_ — using billionaires and bullshit to flood elections and buy outcomes.

They are hoping voters won’t notice what’s at stake. But we see it clearly. And we’re not backing down. [But all of that takes resources. If we’re going to hold the line, we need help from folks who know how high the stakes really are.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112058405/559278474/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250724_FR_SCOTUS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzUwMDhhNS1iMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqICpa2C6aI5fDwUf21_AAk0jsiNoRtGe3nvhFiBS50=) | | [Chip in right now to help us defend the court →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112058406/559278479/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250724_FR_SCOTUS_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzUwMDhhNS1iMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqICpa2C6aI5fDwUf21_AAk0jsiNoRtGe3nvhFiBS50=)
---
Because if MAGA wins this court, they won’t stop at the gavel. They’ll go for everything.

And we’re just not gonna let them.

clean_body: | | Peter, This November, three democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court face retention. If just two lose their seats, Republicans take the majority. And once they have the bench, they’ll use it. To ban abortion. To bulldoze voting rights. To gerrymander our maps beyond recognition. To tear up our Constitution and turn Pennsylvania into a MAGA playground. This is NOT theoretical. They’ve been laying the groundwork for years. They are eying this court the same way they have gone after Ohio, Florida, Texas — using billionaires and bullshit to flood elections and buy outcomes. They are hoping voters won’t notice what’s at stake. But we see it clearly. And we’re not backing down. = | | = Because if MAGA wins this court, they won’t stop at the gavel. They’ll go for everything. And we’re just not gonna let them. — PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and **! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. name: Team Tina Newsletters
subject: Fresh delivery, newsletter incoming! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
| | Hi Peter, Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter — here’s what I’ve been up to this month! I know life can be busy, and your inbox can fill up with political emails, so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks!
— TK
---
* * *
**Governor Kotek and First Lady Aimee Kotek March in Portland Pride Parade**
* * *
**Governor Kotek Monitors Impacts of Trump Tariffs on Consumers, Small Businesses & Workers**
Tina is committed to ensuring that businesses across Oregon have the consistent and predicable conditions they need to succeed and serve their communities. Tariffs are hurting Oregon’s economy, and Tina is doing everything she can to find the truth.
[READ HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112059260/559281231/645054939?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDg1OTk2OS1iMjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHEqgqE4nP4IkJ6M0DhzJa38TWscm3gv0E7GwZqRxPs=&emci=7bd1f128-6766-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d4859969-b268-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729)
---
* * *
**Gov. Kotek launches new agency to fast-track housing construction**
We have to find bold, new solutions to tackle our housing crisis in order to meet the goal that we’ve set to get 36,000 new homes built each year. The Housing Accountability and Production Office will act as a liaison between developers, local governments, and state agencies to streamline funding for affordable housing.

name: Team Lizzie
subject: The fight for fair maps in Texas is on!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
This is about more than just drawing new lines on a map. It’s a test. Republican leaders want to see if they can get away with rigging Texas’ congressional districts to serve their own interests. And if they succeed here, they’ll try to use the same playbook across the country.
https://www.mobilize.us/txaflcio/event/817184/ [https://www.mobilize.us/txaflcio/event/817184/]
We cannot let that happen. Please make a contribution so we can make sure every Texan knows what’s at stake. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250724?refcode=lpfe250724_act_non]
These Republicans are willing to trample the Voting Rights Act and twist the law to justify this power grab. Rather than using the special legislative session to address the real needs of Texans, Texas Republicans are rubber-stamping a plan from President Trump and national Republican operatives to redraw congressional districts to consolidate as much power as possible. While they scheme to protect their House majority, Texans are paying the price—stripped of fair representation and silenced at the ballot box.
Not on our watch. We’re fighting back by telling the truth, battling misinformation, and making sure we have the resources to run strong campaigns and elect candidates who will defend our democracy.
Will you chip in today to help us stand up to these attacks on our democracy and defend every Texan’s right to vote? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250724?refcode=lpfe250724_act_non]
Thanks,
Team Lizzie

Republican leaders want to see if they can get away with rigging Texas’ congressional districts to serve their own interests. And if they succeed here, they’ll try to use the same playbook across the country. [] We cannot let that happen. Please make a contribution so we can make sure every Texan knows what’s at stake. [] These Republicans are willing to trample the Voting Rights Act and twist the law to justify this power grab. Rather than using the special legislative session to address the real needs of Texans, Texas Republicans are rubber-stamping a plan from President Trump and national Republican operatives to redraw congressional districts to consolidate as much power as possible. While they scheme to protect their House majority, Texans are paying the price—stripped of fair representation and silenced at the ballot box. Not on our watch. We’re fighting back by telling the truth, battling misinformation, and making sure we have the resources to run strong campaigns and elect candidates who will defend our democracy. Will you chip in today to help us stand up to these attacks on our democracy and defend every Texan’s right to vote? [] Thanks, Team Lizzie DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

Peter, This evening we will have our latest stop on our People’s Town Hall Tour across Indiana. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250724-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250724-email]
Peter –
Donald Trump and his allies just took their war on the environment, and our Colorado way of life, to a terrifying new level.
According to a bombshell report from The New York Times , Trump’s team is planning to rescind the EPA’s “endangerment finding” — the principle that recognizes greenhouse gases endanger human life.
This isn’t just bureaucratic red tape. It’s a direct attack on our climate, our health, and our future.
As Colorado’s Attorney General, Jena Griswold will be on the front lines — fighting back against Trump’s dangerous agenda and protecting Colorado’s right to clean air, safe water, and a livable future.
We can’t afford to sit back while extremists try to erase climate protections that scientists and communities fought for over decades.
Chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can now to help elect Jena and defend our environment from Trump’s attacks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250724-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Jena has always stood up to Donald Trump — from protecting our elections from MAGA extremists to standing against anti-choice attacks on reproductive freedom. Now, she’s ready to lead the fight for environmental justice, hold polluters accountable, and protect the Colorado way of life.
But she can’t do it without your support.
We’re building a campaign ready to defend Coloradans from Trump’s extreme agenda — and we need your help to do it.
Donate now to power Jena’s campaign for Attorney General. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250724-email]
Thank you for standing with us.
— Team Jena

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: we need to respond to this NOW, Peter!!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070925_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070925_4]
Trump has declared war on ActBlue — and on all of us. This is how authoritarians tighten their grip. We need to fight back right now. Chip in ANY amount you can right away >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070925_4]
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=070925_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=070925_4&amount=5]

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

Peter,

Republicans in battleground districts are outraising our Democratic candidates — and with the end of the month just days away, we cannot afford to fall further behind.

If we’re going to flip the House and stop Trump’s dangerous agenda, we have to close this gap.

As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m doing everything I can to help Democrats compete in some of the most competitive districts in the country. We have a long road ahead of us to take back the House, and we have to keep up the momentum.

This moment is a test of our strength. We must show we have what it takes to win.

name: Tony Evers
subject: A love letter from me to Kathy and my family—and to you, Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
I promised you when I ran for this office that I’d always work to do the right thing, that I’d always give it to you straight, and that I’d always try to be a governor for all of Wisconsin. And I work every day to keep those promises. That’ll never change.
| | Derek,

I was a scrawny kid with glasses who grew up scraping mold off of cheese. I never dreamed that I’d end up governor of Wisconsin. But here I am.

For the last six years, you’ve welcomed me into your churches, your businesses, your classrooms, your barns, hospitals, and communities. I cherish every moment—every tour, visit, high five, question and selfie. It has been the honor of my life to be able to give back to the state that raised me.

I promised you when I ran for this office that I’d always work to do the right thing, that I’d always give it to you straight, and that I’d always try to be a governor for all of Wisconsin. And I work every day to keep those promises. That’ll never change.

**I’ve spent 50 years in public service, and I’m damn proud I’ve devoted my career and most of my life to working for you, Wisconsin. But the truth is that the only thing I love more than your governor is being a husband, a dad, and a grandpa—and it’s time for me to focus on the things I enjoy and love doing with my family. So today, I’m announcing that I will not be running for a third term.**

I’m so humbled to be your governor—this is the best job I have ever had. And folks, we are not done yet. There is, as always, much work to do, and I’ll be working just as hard as I have been for the last six years to keep doing the right thing and deliver for you for the rest of my term.

Wisconsin’s future is bright, but we can’t stop fighting for progress. We need to do everything we can to make sure our next governor is able to build on what we’ve accomplished, along with Democratic legislature who believes in putting people first. I hope you’ll stay in this fight with me as we continue to support Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026.

Forward, for you and for Wisconsin always.

Tony Evers
---

| Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
---

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=7183%2E1827488%2Ehq-gyJ)
---

subject: Spineless.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
MSNBC: Speaker Johnson reverses course on Epstein transparency, realigns with Trump **_MSNBC:_ Speaker Johnson reverses course on Epstein transparency, realigns with Trump**

_"Remember last week when the House speaker pushed for transparency on Jeffrey Epstein materials? Six days later, he appears to have reversed course."_ Peter,

Speaker Mike Johnson just made one thing very clear: **He'll throw law and order out the window if that’s what it takes to keep Donald Trump happy.**

At first, Speaker Johnson said he wanted the Epstein files released in the name of transparency, but now, he's suddenly changed course and abruptly cut off a vote he himself had once supported — _all to protect Trump._

Time and again, we’ve watched House Republicans ignore the facts, undermine the rule of law, and dismantle the institutions they swore to uphold, all to protect one man. They’re not interested in doing their jobs, they’re not interested in justice, they're only interested in protecting Donald Trump, even if it's at the expense of the American people.

This is not complicated, _it's obstruction, plain and simple._

Republicans have told us clearly they will sell out our democracy before they ever turn on Trump. Whether it's helping him ram through his Big, Ugly Bill, or shielding him from the consequences of his own actions, Speaker Johnson and his GOP colleagues refuse to stand up for us. Instead, they'll bulldoze right over anyone who disagrees with them or Trump to clear a path for their extremist agenda.

But Peter, in the courtroom and now in Congress, Wesley has spent his career standing up for accountability and justice. **He knows that if our leaders are too afraid to pursue the truth because it might upset Donald Trump, they have no business holding power.**

clean_body: MSNBC: Speaker Johnson reverses course on Epstein transparency, realigns with Trump MSNBC: Speaker Johnson reverses course on Epstein transparency, realigns with Trump "Remember last week when the House speaker pushed for transparency on Jeffrey Epstein materials? Six days later, he appears to have reversed course." Peter, Speaker Mike Johnson just made one thing very clear: He'll throw law and order out the window if that’s what it takes to keep Donald Trump happy. At first, Speaker Johnson said he wanted the Epstein files released in the name of transparency, but now, he's suddenly changed course and abruptly cut off a vote he himself had once supported — all to protect Trump. Time and again, we’ve watched House Republicans ignore the facts, undermine the rule of law, and dismantle the institutions they swore to uphold, all to protect one man. They’re not interested in doing their jobs, they’re not interested in justice, they're only interested in protecting Donald Trump, even if it's at the expense of the American people. This is not complicated, it's obstruction, plain and simple. Republicans have told us clearly they will sell out our democracy before they ever turn on Trump. Whether it's helping him ram through his Big, Ugly Bill, or shielding him from the consequences of his own actions, Speaker Johnson and his GOP colleagues refuse to stand up for us. Instead, they'll bulldoze right over anyone who disagrees with them or Trump to clear a path for their extremist agenda. But Peter, in the courtroom and now in Congress, Wesley has spent his career standing up for accountability and justice. He knows that if our leaders are too afraid to pursue the truth because it might upset Donald Trump, they have no business holding power. = | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO BOX 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Wow, throwback to our first TV ad!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act]
Hi team, it’s Michael.
My team and I were recently going through some of our old campaign footage and came across this gem–my first-ever TV ad, when I first ran for the Senate.
While my girls have grown up, one thing hasn’t changed: I’m still fighting for Colorado.
You can check out our first-ever ad here, and then please consider chipping in whatever you can today to help power my campaign for Governor of Colorado. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act]
When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, I ran to clean up Washington and deliver results for working Coloradans—and in my nearly 16 years in the Senate, we’ve done quite a bit of housekeeping.
From passing the Affordable Care Act, expanding the Child Tax Credit, and protecting Colorado’s iconic public lands, to investing in clean energy and public infrastructure (just to name a few at the top of the list), we’ve been able to deliver real accomplishments for our state and our country.
But I’m certainly not done yet.
With President Trump and Congressional Republicans passing laws that actively hurt working families here in Colorado, I’m on the front lines fighting back.
It’s why I’m running for governor. I know the most effective way we can continue fighting back against this administration and improving the lives of Coloradans is by working together right here at home.
Here in Colorado, we can build more housing, lower the cost of healthcare, and revitalize our education system so that all our kids can thrive. We can protect our public lands from those who want to sell them off for development. We can build an economy that works for all of us, not just the wealthy few. I know in Colorado, we can forge a better politics than what we see in Washington and drive a stake through Trumpism.
Folks, it’s a tall order, but I wouldn’t be in this race if I didn’t think we could accomplish these goals. I know we can get it done, but we’ll need to do it together. Are you with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3_throwback?express_lane=true&refcode=X_250724_throwbackad_act]
Thank you,
— Michael

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Petition your local election officials: Defend the midterm elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=lcTBnpq+/hCxeqSJPHrpcD9uEUmxfCkWlmRbVFnMATaI6WEriRuWfqTzLik5lnAE6MNHefZ5z8BEk2O14ZclGx2iIQYWCncl8qvCBGaXcAs=]
Folks,
Donald Trump and the MAGA movement are already plotting to rig the 2026 elections, and Trump’s using his Justice Department takeover to do it.
Trump’s DOJ is demanding that states and counties hand over sensitive voter rolls, voting histories, private data, and even physical access to voting machines.
They claim it’s about security. It’s not. It’s about seizing control of our election systems and setting the stage to challenge or even overturn results he doesn’t like.
Tell election officials in all 50 states: Defend our democracy against Trump’s scheme to steal the midterms. Block all attempts to gain access to private election data and voting machines without a court order >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
We’ve seen this before. In 2020, Trump tried to bully his way to victory by spreading lies about voter fraud. Now he’s at it again, laying the groundwork for chaos and manipulation long before a single vote is cast.
This is a test of our democracy. If state officials give in, they open the door to a federal takeover of local elections and a flood of political interference. But if they stand firm, they can block Trump’s power grab before it gains ground.
We have the power to stop this. Public outcry can give state leaders the courage to resist. But we must act fast—before the pressure campaign succeeds.
Tell your state election officials: Say NO to Trump’s demands. Keep voter data secure. Protect the 2026 elections from political sabotage! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.everyaction.com%2F9bivrSvjFEim0QMMvgcQrA2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=lcTBnpq+/hCxeqSJPHrpcD9uEUmxfCkWlmRbVFnMATaI6WEriRuWfqTzLik5lnAE6MNHefZ5z8BEk2O14ZclGx2iIQYWCncl8qvCBGaXcAs= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=lcTBnpq+/hCxeqSJPHrpcD9uEUmxfCkWlmRbVFnMATaI6WEriRuWfqTzLik5lnAE6MNHefZ5z8BEk2O14ZclGx2iIQYWCncl8qvCBGaXcAs=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=lcTBnpq+/hCxeqSJPHrpcD9uEUmxfCkWlmRbVFnMATaI6WEriRuWfqTzLik5lnAE6MNHefZ5z8BEk2O14ZclGx2iIQYWCncl8qvCBGaXcAs=]

name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: Join our team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
As a mom, engineer, and community leader, I’ve seen the challenges that people are facing in this district. Prices at the grocery store and gas station keep going up, and good-paying jobs are getting harder to come by.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112062104/559291848/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-07-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOTBjYzQtYjg2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x_Fh3ugjvfJWUVLcNnYSGlAlnAOyoGhVctd75fTEn8k=)
---
| Peter, I immigrated to the United States with my family when I was just three years old. We faced language barriers, financial hardships, and made many sacrifices to achieve our American Dream.

Now, I’ve lived in the Lehigh Valley for over two decades. I built my career here, raised a family here, made a home here.

[_**I love this community, and I’m ready to fight for it in Congress. # THURSDAY, July 24, 2025

**Good Afternoon!** Being smart with your money doesn't always mean playing it safe, it means staying informed, spotting opportunity, and preparing before the crowd catches on. [One of our partners produced a great resource that breaks down a bold theory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb2O3CAUhZ8Gdx5hsMfewsVKjqUUu1KSIqXFwMEm4meEr2eVt4_YnYwipV3KT-devgM_X5YX5byL66sKGMmmxcA4rQhmiXjbPYiQF2VdVFE75TN2kE6HN6u74bIILrqa97Vol_nwfnpMN5UZLSAgK4xN30k58Hboq23kLQbTcTTdWVyeGsONbp8khG06q2xnKjeWrbwXbTPwgXcn2XMAnZCN7s9CXVjLYRylfPqVXKQN1v9ON-STTqHy40Z03Zl8ZmJmYk7WIu8nFZCdVnFTmWzKZk3elDwTM4Jy_m-SidlmoF4PZ8DETHVJ1u-9y0I5eyizpyNrMDl9-Zg9HxSWB8Q_MMC4IzA53R3vOKqA_yAhl2RpLro70ykSIjE5URFZ7iIfF1qtwlW5NTI59bx5vfFyvu3b_uPr8_cqj-b65rx3-7lnLV-L1vsb0Sd_9W0UfwIAAP__jO3Hrg): that we're approaching a once-in-a-generation financial reset--one that could open the door to serious upside for everyday Americans. If you're someone who likes to think ahead and position yourself early, this is worth a look. Details below. -- Cole, _CEO_

[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb2O3CAUhZ8Gdx5hsMfewsVKjqUUu1KSIqXFwMEm4meEr2eVt4_YnYwipV3KT-devgM_X5YX5byL66sKGMmmxcA4rQhmiXjbPYiQF2VdVFE75TN2kE6HN6u74bIILrqa97Vol_nwfnpMN5UZLSAgK4xN30k58Hboq23kLQbTcTTdWVyeGsONbp8khG06q2xnKjeWrbwXbTPwgXcn2XMAnZCN7s9CXVjLYRylfPqVXKQN1v9ON-STTqHy40Z03Zl8ZmJmYk7WIu8nFZCdVnFTmWzKZk3elDwTM4Jy_m-SidlmoF4PZ8DETHVJ1u-9y0I5eyizpyNrMDl9-Zg9HxSWB8Q_MMC4IzA53R3vOKqA_yAhl2RpLro70ykSIjE5URFZ7iIfF1qtwlW5NTI59bx5vfFyvu3b_uPr8_cqj-b65rx3-7lnLV-L1vsb0Sd_9W0UfwIAAP__jO3Hrg) **A Financial Reset Could Give Birth to America 's Greatest Era Yet**
_A 90-year cycle may end soon, creating real wealth for early adopters_ **In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate.** Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard-earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen. **Now, 92 years later,** the current administration has focused its energy on making things right. This next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. **A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price.** That's a 72x increase! **If activated, it could:** * Reinforce America's financial dominance * Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again * Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understands their choices And the best part... **Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor.** However, only those who download a copy of this [2025 Wealth Protection Guide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyskb2O3CAUhZ8Gdx5hsMfewsVKjqUUu1KSIqXFwMEm4meEr2eVt4_YnYwipV3KT-devgM_X5YX5byL66sKGMmmxcA4rQhmiXjbPYiQF2VdVFE75TN2kE6HN6u74bIILrqa97Vol_nwfnpMN5UZLSAgK4xN30k58Hboq23kLQbTcTTdWVyeGsONbp8khG06q2xnKjeWrbwXbTPwgXcn2XMAnZCN7s9CXVjLYRylfPqVXKQN1v9ON-STTqHy40Z03Zl8ZmJmYk7WIu8nFZCdVnFTmWzKZk3elDwTM4Jy_m-SidlmoF4PZ8DETHVJ1u-9y0I5eyizpyNrMDl9-Zg9HxSWB8Q_MMC4IzA53R3vOKqA_yAhl2RpLro70ykSIjE5URFZ7iIfF1qtwlW5NTI59bx5vfFyvu3b_uPr8_cqj-b65rx3-7lnLV-L1vsb0Sd_9W0UfwIAAP__jO3Hrg) will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset. Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation. | | | | | | THURSDAY, July 24, 2025 ---|--- Good Afternoon! Being smart with your money doesn't always mean playing it safe, it means staying informed, spotting opportunity, and preparing before the crowd catches on. : that we're approaching a once-in-a-generation financial reset--one that could open the door to serious upside for everyday Americans. If you're someone who likes to think ahead and position yourself early, this is worth a look. Details below. -- Cole, CEO A Financial Reset Could Give Birth to America 's Greatest Era Yet A 90-year cycle may end soon, creating real wealth for early adopters In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate. Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard-earned wealth at the stroke of FDR's pen. Now, 92 years later, the current administration has focused its energy on making things right. This next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America 's gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today's market price. That's a 72x increase! If activated, it could: Reinforce America's financial dominance Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understands their choices And the best part... Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor. However, only those who download a copy of this will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T473ed277-2fd0-4a56-b73e-26d13b47c4ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: We need to send national Republicans a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Friend, Republicans in Congress just passed one of the most awful pieces of legislation introduced in my lifetime. They hiked our energy costs. They set up more than four hundred thousand New Jerseyans to lose their health care. They reinstated the SALT cap on New Jerseyans. They added trillions of dollars to our national debt. They gave billionaires a massive tax break. **And my Republican opponent wants to bring that very same agenda to New Jersey. The people who support this disastrous piece of legislation and who are harming New Jerseyans need to pay for it at the ballot box, friend.** This election, right here in New Jersey, will be our very first opportunity to show Donald Trump, Jack Ciattarelli and their fellow right-wing Republicans that the American people reject their backwards agenda. **And we can’t afford to lose, friend. Not for the people of New Jersey, who would then be led by a MAGA governor whose first loyalty is to Trump. And not for our fellow Americans who will find it harder to access basic necessities because congressional Republicans betrayed them.** [**I’m determined to win this race and put national Republicans on notice, friend, that their actions have consequences. If you’re with me in this fight, I could really use your help. | Letter from the Chair
---
Time to Refocus
Time flies when you're busy, and it's been four months since I was elected Chairman of the NEGOP. We've come a long way, and quite a bit has been accomplished during the transition. I immersed myself in learning the finances, making appointments to leadership, forming and filling committees, and adding staff where needed. Our Political Director and I continued the execution of the political plan and have been meeting with potential candidates and campaign managers. During the transition, Republicans did not fare as well as we would have hoped in the Lincoln or Omaha city races. Lessons have been learned.
Along the way, I've enjoyed the opportunities to talk to previous Chairmen and Executive Directors about their tenures in office. They've been generous in sharing their time and offering their advice. Each story told to me completes a piece of the puzzle of the history of Nebraska politics. Each faced challenges unique to the time and the circumstances, and I am not alone.
The future is bright for the Nebraska Republican Party. We will refocus our efforts and look forward to building relationships and communicating the values of the Republican Party that work to protect life, strengthen families, grow the economy, expand energy sources, and build the good life for all Nebraskans. If you have considered running for office, and would like to talk about it, please call or email. There are open seats at all levels of government, and we're determined that they be filled by Republicans. Let us all join in refocusing our efforts on that goal.

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
---
| |
---
---
| |
# What's Happening...
---
Hello Nebraska Republicans,
With the 2026 primary filing deadline less than a year away, the Nebraska Republican Party is charging full speed ahead, recruiting candidates for more than 450 offices across the state. From federal and statewide races to legislative and multi-county seats, the mission is clear: flip all 101 Democrat-held seats and build a stronger, redder Nebraska. [See the full list](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l2C-VnlPFuaQWii1fSGZVoJGzlKTyJkblWp55-96Wo6DyZ4qQLsNWJ6BZFzhmZ4Z7dVV0TkYaxslBDaMhxRkKPhQC1MDNslnEPRbtSOKM4QkHsxmDueHTAiB8XQ-wG63UqbXwN_N_-Jo1Zi4ayS-JZje98W8Xqgmz7huujSfEqJIJnFbG7H_OsFOCcZnKZ4A3LJ3t4wO3OkLnB7jXRHX3Oadr2wPedPZuPiWlYPx9VI=&c=IZkIIn4rUZ34TUckfXaMEzjZwTQ9dL732e480tmFh0GZRRbZg60omA==&ch=nP-0hKlnVUKJVyz6nrG6hIimnqKZ4mPD1CatWrVtAYFEz8A2Kv-tSQ==) of federal, statewide, legislative, and multi-county offices up for election in 2026, along with their districts, current officeholders, and their registered political party.
The NEGOP Candidate Recruitment Committee is hitting the ground running! We've begun reaching out to every Republican incumbent--federal, statewide, legislative, and multi-county--to confirm who's in for re-election. Once that's complete, we're moving full speed ahead to recruit strong Republican candidates for every open seat and every Democrat-held district.
If you or someone you know is interested in running for office or would be an exceptional candidate for one of these positions, please reach out to me at political@ne.gop. I'd love to connect and discuss this opportunity.
To empower our candidates, the NEGOP is hosting its second Campaign and Candidate School of the 2026 cycle on July 26, 2025, in Lincoln, Nebraska, from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Partnering with the Republican National Committee (RNC), this training will equip candidates, campaign staff, volunteers, and grassroots leaders with the tools, strategies, and knowledge to run winning campaigns.
Register now for the Campaign and Candidate School: [https://secure.anedot.com/negop/campaignschool2025](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l2C-VnlPFuaQWii1fSGZVoJGzlKTyJkblWp55-96Wo6DyZ4qQLsNWLgQWcZr35q50jM3Jc8k0wOJN551OOxvqkSxH-Z9_UcM4yi5TmpEnWAIfD6Rpz3FU01dLfEj-ezce3qOPHNxDma8IV_CW5pkdpmutn7PZTEnPycWyDnBFMLg5LZITHZuVTuoXYItzuzT&c=IZkIIn4rUZ34TUckfXaMEzjZwTQ9dL732e480tmFh0GZRRbZg60omA==&ch=nP-0hKlnVUKJVyz6nrG6hIimnqKZ4mPD1CatWrVtAYFEz8A2Kv-tSQ==)
Together, we can build a stronger Nebraska. Join us in this critical effort to shape our state's future! Best,
Joe Hagerty Political Director political@ne.gop

name: Team Winsome
subject: Dems Drop $5 million to DEFEAT Winsome Earle-Sears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Peter -
We just got word that national Democrats have dropped a whopping $5 MILLION into Abigail Spanberger's campaign. $5 MILLION!
That's right, folks - they're so desperate to stop Winsome from becoming the next Governor of Virginia that they're willing to spend millions. **
** But here's the thing: this isn't just about Winsome. It's about the conservative values we hold dear, the principles of limited government, personal responsibility, and freedom that we're fighting for. **
** National Democrats think they can just buy this election and silence our voices. But we've got news for them: we won't be silenced. We won't be intimidated. And we won't be defeated.

It's about the conservative values we hold dear, the principles of limited government, personal responsibility, and freedom that we're fighting for. National Democrats think they can just buy this election and silence our voices. But we've got news for them: we won't be silenced. We won't be intimidated. And we won't be defeated. name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: President Trump needs your help
body:
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

* * *
|
Dear Fellow Taxpayer,

I am going to share with you Washington DC's dirtiest secret.

Federal union bosses have seized control of the federal workforce and declared President Trump and Elon Musk ENEMY #1 and #2 for fighting to "Drain the Swamp" and save hundreds of billions of tax dollars by downsizing and reforming the bloated DC bureaucracy!

You see, union control of government is a CANCER killing the U.S. taxpayer -- impoverishing America's workers and entrepreneurs with red tape, wasteful spending and soaring inflation.

Using tens of millions of dollars seized from workers' paychecks, Big Labor's federal union bosses are orchestrating virtually every howl of outrage, protest and lawsuit against Donald Trump's and Elon Musk's cutbacks and reforms. . .

. . .paying for the lawyers, the plaintiffs, the lawsuits and the activists you see on TV marching and screaming into bullhorns. That's why I hope you will _STAND UP TODAY FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP'S CRUSADE to slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon guarding "the Swamp" in Washington_.

Please agree to sign your PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT to President Trump, Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency and your U.S. Senators and Congressman. I'll give you a link to your petition in a moment, but I want to be sure you understand how serious this is.

_President Trump is fighting valiantly to tame the out-of-control federal bureaucracy. And he needs to know he has YOUR FULL SUPPORT to stand firm_ when the Swamp Rats in Washington lash out.

And perhaps even more importantly, please _sign your petitions DEMANDING your U.S. Senators and Congressman support President Trump's crusade_ with every vote they cast!

The fact is government union bosses are the real puppet-masters pulling the strings behind the curtain in the "DC Swamp."

That's why you and I must PROVE to President Trump (and my colleagues here in the Senate and House) that _the American people OVERWHELMINGLY support his reforms and will not tolerate any more obstructionism, excuses or gridlock_!

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (popularly known as DOGE) are exposing the scandals and corruption government union officials have been hiding for decades:
---
$$$ Did you know that _only 6% of federal bureaucrats show up_ in person for a full work week? (And that figure drops to 1% if you take out janitors, security guards, and maintenance personnel!)
$$$ Can you believe that _government union big shots are PAID with YOUR tax dollars to conduct so-called "official union business" -- COSTING TAXPAYERS NEARLY A QUARTER OF A BILLION TAX DOLLARS A YEAR_?
$$$ Were you aware that federal office buildings cost $15.7 BILLION annually just to keep the doors open? And that _only 12% of federal office space is even occupied_?
$$$ Are you outraged to learn federal law effectively bars open shop, non-union contractors from bidding on federal public works projects -- _soaking American taxpayers for an estimated $21.7 billion a year in inflated construction costs_?
$$$ Did you know that if a conscientious public servant does a good job and their supervisor awards them a merit-pay bonus (or tries to fire or discipline an incompetent bureaucrat) without "going through the union" that would be a VIOLATION OF FEDERAL LABOR RULES?!?
$$$ Are you angry that in 2021, JOE BIDEN BESTOWED $130 BILLION UPON TEACHER UNION RADICALS who are brainwashing our kids!
The fact is _government union czars are the single biggest obstacle President Trump must overcome_ to cut out-of-control government spending and flagrant waste, fraud and abuse.

**[That's why I hope you will CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT TODAY](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=az13rvtvr3m1pekelkkrof8y10lfs0vjkyw28dlck8g0o5n0f20dbnjugnhtckerbjasfm71ruztbak4p9c42e12vkedh0iiwmbxlirrt6r0is7yifedwr42u5fbdpve3r971kc9841j4sajliea635z7kizyn4slqs35aksf2b611xe0ca0eku25envn2qalvepiup800pxrz1o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx22i&__onlt=h)**!

As soon as their handpicked political cronies lost the elections, GOVERNMENT UNION OFFICIALS IMMEDIATELY VOWED TO BLOCK TRUMP'S REFORMS.

You see, President Trump is not only standing up to the liberal media and the radical Democrats, he's taking on the _unelected czars who secretly rule our government from within_.

Union officials I bet you've never even heard of -- like Everett Kelly.

He's not a Member of Congress. Not a Governor nor a Senator. No voter has ever cast a ballot for him.

And yet he rules Washington DC with an iron fist from his throne atop the largest government union, the American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE).

_The AFGE chieftain rules an empire of nearly a million government workers paid an average of $118,260 per year, costing taxpayers an estimated $97.4 BILLION ANNUALLY_.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency are exposing outrage after outrage committed by federal union bosses like AFGE President Everett Kelly:
\--- AFGE Council 220 President Witold Skwierczynski _COLLECTED A PAYCHECK FROM THE SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION FOR 34 YEARS WITHOUT WORKING A SINGLE HOUR_!

He couldn't have gone to work if he'd tried because _he was banned from Social Security offices nationwide after sending A PHOTO OF HIS PENIS_ to a fellow employee at 2 o'clock in the morning! He only quit because Trump's executive order required him and other union officials to (in his words) go "back to our desks to process claims."

Now, he's collecting a full pension "close to equal to my salary."
\--- The Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service played "the heavy" to force workers and employers to knuckle under to union-boss demands. The agency reportedly was "_RIFE WITH CORRUPTION" whose staffers "LIVED LIKE KINGS_." Despite having only 60 employees (many of whose offices had ENSUITE BATHROOMS WITH PRIVATE SHOWERS!), the FMCS occupied a _nine-story office tower_ on DC's posh K Street.
According to the Daily Wire, for years the agency's Director _billed the taxpayer for his meals and living expenses, claiming to be on a "years-long business trip" to DC_.
\--- Corrupt union officials are notorious for treating worker pension funds like their own lavish piggybanks. MANY union pension plans are teetering on the verge of insolvency. So JOE BIDEN BILKED THE TAXPAYER FOR $32 BILLION TO BAIL-OUT A SINGLE TEAMSTER UNION PENSION FUND.

That's bad enough. But instead of placing the pension into receivership under government oversight, _he left the foxes in charge of the henhouse_!

_Most government bureaucrats figured out long ago that THEY DON'T REALLY WORK FOR THE TAXPAYER, NOR EVEN THE PRESIDENT... THEY WORK FOR THE UNION BOSSES_. Plain and simple.

President Trump knows he can't "Drain the Swamp" until we support his efforts to "Slay the Union-Boss DC Dragon."

The Union-Boss Dragon should be stripped bare:
\--- NO Monopoly Bargaining power over any federal employee.
\--- NO money deducted from any federal worker's or contractor's paycheck.
\--- NO authority to negotiate salaries, wages, job rules, promotion, firing or hiring.
\--- NO privileged status in winning multiple-billion dollar federal contracts.
\--- NO payment for work except for the US taxpayer, not a union.

But government union chiefs are so powerful and so entrenched, _I will need more than your petitions to slay the union bigwigs' DC Dragon_.

That's why I've joined forces with the National Right to Work Committee. When it comes to fighting AND BEATING corrupt union officials, they are the experts.

And that's why I hope you'll not only sign your petition but also make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 today to help the National Right to Work Committee EXPAND their nationwide campaign to prove to my colleagues in Washington, DC that politicians should fear "We, The People" more than "inside the Beltway" union politicos.

I don't know what you can afford to give today. Maybe for you a contribution of $25 or $50 is a stretch. I know for others $500 or $1000 will not be too much.

After you sign your petition, I ask you to be as generous as you can.

_You see, this Petition Drive is just the first step of a nationwide grassroots lobbying program_ to focus public pressure like a laser-beam on key Senators and Congressmen to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT!

The National Right to Work Committee needs your financial support today to:
1\. GATHER THREE MILLION PETITIONS SUPPORTING DONALD TRUMP AND ELON MUSK'S DOGE and urging lawmakers to END UNION BOSS CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT and end it NOW!
2\. Launch a publicity and media campaign with news conferences, editorial board meetings, and op-eds by respected commentators and opinion leaders.
3\. Mail, text, use social media and email millions of taxpayers to turn up the heat on wavering politicians to get off the fence and do their jobs to curb and corral the out-of-control government workforce.
4\. And funds permitting, air costly hard-hitting TV, radio and Internet ads (especially on Fox News and Fox Radio, and local conservative talk!) to generate MILLIONS of letters, phone calls and texts to Capitol Hill demanding Big Labor's monopoly bargaining powers over the federal workforce be repealed.

Federal spending will continue to skyrocket. And so will the CRUSHING $36 TRILLION (and growing!) NATIONAL DEBT our grandchildren will wear like millstones around their necks.

_ALL SO PRIVILEGED UNION BULLIES CAN PAD THEIR WALLETS WITH OUR HARD-EARNED DOLLARS AND PAY OFF THEIR FAR-LEFT POLITICAL PALS_!

In order to "drain the swamp," you and I must unite together TODAY to help President Trump slay the DC Union-Boss Dragon.

FOR LIBERTY,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul

P.S. JOIN WITH ME TODAY IN SUPPORT OF PRESIDENT TRUMP and Elon Musk's crusade to slay Big Labor's DC Swamp Dragon. **[CLICK HERE TO SIGN YOUR PETITION TO END UNION CONTROL OF GOVERNMENT](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=az13rvtvr3m1pekelkkrof8y10lfs0vjkyw28dlck8g0o5n0f20dbnjugnhtckerbjasfm71ruztbak4p9c42e12vkedh0iiwmbxlirrt6r0is7yifedwr42u5fbdpve3r971kc9841j4sajliea635z7kizyn4slqs35aksf2b611xe0ca0eku25envn2qalvepiup800pxrz1o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx22i&__onlt=h)**.

Federal union bosses are funding virtually every lawsuit, protester and organized opposition to Donald Trump's efforts to Make America Great Again! And they are doing it with YOUR TAXDOLLARS!!!

AND PLEASE _make the most generous contribution you can afford to mobilize MORE TAXPAYERS_ to turn up the heat on my colleagues in the Senate and the House to support the President's spending reforms with each and every vote they cast.
