name: Jeff Merkley
subject: I’ve made my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act]
Peter,
I grew up in a blue-collar family in Oregon, first in the small town of Myrtle Creek, then Roseburg, and, ultimately, East Multnomah County — towns where families worked hard and looked out for each other. My dad worked as a union millwright at the local timber mill, and, thanks to union wages and public schools, I became the first in my family to graduate from college.
My story is supposed to be the American story: that with hard work and community support, every child has a chance to succeed.
But today, far too many families are working harder than ever and falling further behind — not because they’ve changed but because America has.
Billionaires and giant corporations have rigged the rules to benefit themselves, dodging taxes and driving up costs while working families struggle to keep up. And Donald Trump? He’s making it worse: more tax breaks for billionaires, handouts to corporate polluters, and dangerous authoritarian policies that undermine our “We the People” republic.
It doesn’t have to be this way. We can build an America where families thrive and billionaires finally pay their fair share, where opportunity is real, and the future doesn’t just belong to those at the top.
We've got a LOT of work to do to get there, and I’m ready to keep up the fight.
That’s why I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate.
Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Dr. Maxine Dexter today to power our campaigns? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act]
Every family should have the opportunity to thrive.
That means continuing the fight to expand access to affordable health care and housing, lower the cost of essentials like child care and prescription drugs, protect our planet for the next generation, take on a rigged system that favors billionaires and corporate insiders, and defend our democracy from Donald Trump’s strongman authoritarianism.
We need bold, honest, and unafraid leadership focused on delivering for working people — not billionaires and the well-connected. But I need you on my team. Our campaign doesn’t take corporate PAC money — we rely entirely on grassroots support from folks like you.
Will you split a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can between my campaign and Dr. Maxine Dexter to help launch this campaign and build a future where every family can thrive? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jeff Merkley and Maxine Dexter will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act]
Onward!
Jeff
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-spl_jam?refcode=x_250724_reelection_spl_JAM_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

My story is supposed to be the American story: that with hard work and community support, every child has a chance to succeed. But today, far too many families are working harder than ever and falling further behind — not because they’ve changed but because America has. Billionaires and giant corporations have rigged the rules to benefit themselves, dodging taxes and driving up costs while working families struggle to keep up. And Donald Trump? He’s making it worse: more tax breaks for billionaires, handouts to corporate polluters, and dangerous authoritarian policies that undermine our “We the People” republic. It doesn’t have to be this way. We can build an America where families thrive and billionaires finally pay their fair share, where opportunity is real, and the future doesn’t just belong to those at the top. We've got a LOT of work to do to get there, and I’m ready to keep up the fight. That’s why I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Dr. Maxine Dexter today to power our campaigns? [] Every family should have the opportunity to thrive. That means continuing the fight to expand access to affordable health care and housing, lower the cost of essentials like child care and prescription drugs, protect our planet for the next generation, take on a rigged system that favors billionaires and corporate insiders, and defend our democracy from Donald Trump’s strongman authoritarianism. We need bold, honest, and unafraid leadership focused on delivering for working people — not billionaires and the well-connected. But I need you on my team. Our campaign doesn’t take corporate PAC money — we rely entirely on grassroots support from folks like you. Will you split a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can between my campaign and Dr. Maxine Dexter to help launch this campaign and build a future where every family can thrive? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jeff Merkley and Maxine Dexter will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] Onward! Jeff [] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients. Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare. To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [] . DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] [] Maxine Dexter for Oregon PO Box 12209 Portland, OR 97212 United States Paid for by Maxine for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: My thoughts on the GOP’s “dream candidate”
body:
I’m worried.

Hey Peter,
We just got the news — The GOP’s “dream candidate” Kevin Lincoln is officially running against me again.
Last year, he came within just 4 points of flipping this seat red, and now he has Trump’s Super PAC and the entire GOP machine behind him.

clean_body: I’ll continue to fight, but I need to know you’re by my side. | Peter, I've been honored to receive the full support from some of our country's strongest leaders. From President Donald Trump to U.S. Senator Tim Scott and countless others, conservatives in South Carolina and beyond are rallying their support around my re-election campaign. I'm incredibly grateful for their support. But, Peter, I'm missing a very important supporter from my list: YOU! It's no secret that I've been one of President Trump's strongest supporters. I've been one of the leading voices of the conservative agenda, helping President Trump sign the 'Big, Beautiful Bill' into law. I will always stand up to protect the unborn. I will always work to keep our country and borders secure. I will continue to work with our president to rebuild our military and serve the men and women who serve our country with honor. I'm the conservative the Left desperately wants out of their way. Big money liberal groups are already lining my Democrat opponent's campaign with millions. Peter, I'll continue to fight, but I need to know you're by my side. Will you please endorse my re-election campaign today? Your endorsement sends a strong, clear message that conservatives are standing with me and are ready for the 2026 mid-terms. Thank you, Lindsey Graham | In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

USO Supporter,
This is Trace Adkins. Every day, America's service members sacrifice so much -- their time, safety and precious moments with loved ones -- all to protect our freedoms. And as grateful Americans, the least we can do is show them we've got their backs.
I've seen their courage and commitment up close -- I've been honored to join the USO on 12 tours since 2002, performing for more than 65,000 service members around the world. From Iraq to Okinawa, from Afghanistan to Germany, I've witnessed just how much the USO means to the men and women in uniform. It's more than entertainment -- it's a reminder that home hasn't forgotten them.
That's why I'm reaching out today: Will you join me in showing your support for the members of our military by claiming your USO T-shirt now? **[Please, time is running out to get your 2025 USO T-shirt and have the value of your gift DOUBLED.*](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/4NKwHK2Adxh~/Z3UzMEIvdTBLcDJ2dzJWL3E5NWVqNE95V0YwTE9HRHRBQlRaVXZBVE44Vi9pWlRzNXprcDZQaldFWk43VUZQUWtjU2o2Z1ZLMU4zV3FoM2lsRmVPZHNmMm1JSUd1MEpmdTdBMFl3UDJNdWc9S0/c0JrbjFRdWR3ZEJmMitTdm9pb2xDTnZPbnJoNEM3cWlKZWdoZTFlNUF3Mk5YTndSVFFpTGxEY1p2cmlIby96bzJ6WFNCZCt3Wno5dTZvVjNWSlVLZmxBQnY0TDhKVC83S0)**
[GET YOUR T-SHIRT](https://links.e.uso.)

Wearing your USO T-shirt is a powerful way to show your military support. It truly means so much to those who risk their lives to keep us safe and free.
**[So please, don't miss this exclusive chance to get your T-shirt today and have your gift MATCHED to show your support for those who serve. **[$29 DOUBLES to $58=ONE T-SHIRT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/LaXVHgA_LqQ2/Z3UzMEIvdTBLcDJ2dzJWL3E5NWVqNE95V0YwTE9HRHRBQlRaVXZBVE44Vi9pWlRzNXprcDZQaldFWk43VUZQUWtjU2o2Z1ZLMU4zV3FoM2lsRmVPZHNmMm1JSUd1MEpmdTdBMFl3UDJNdWc9S0/c0JrbjFRdWR3ZEJmMitTdm9pb2xDTnZPbnJoNEM3cWlKZWdoZTFlNUF3Mk5YTndSVFFpTGxEY1p2cmlIby96bzJ6WFNCZCt3Wno5dTZvVjNWSlVLZmxBQnY0TDhKVC83S0)**

name: Laura Friedman
subject: A contract that needs answers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064080/559299190/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ2ODAwZGQtYmQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UU4FSYsJZ-1lkiFEDnpgfUZyjx_tdEnNEajtqLO9SmM=) Friend, Thanks to Elon Musk, his artificial intelligence program Grok turned into a Nazi – or MechaHitler, as it called itself. That should be enough to make us question the guardrails around this powerful AI tool; but just days later the Trump administration took steps to turn it loose in our military. This is unacceptable and incredibly alarming. At a time when antisemitism is reported to be on the rise, and with the heightened fear felt by our Jewish community, this cannot be treated as a standard contract. **That’s why I’ve led nine of my colleagues to demand accountability from the Trump Administration over their $200 million contract to deploy “Grok for Government.”** **[You can read more about our fight to curb Grok’s antisemitic AI here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064081/559299191/-1284849897?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ2ODAwZGQtYmQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UU4FSYsJZ-1lkiFEDnpgfUZyjx_tdEnNEajtqLO9SmM=&emci=2538fcd6-bd68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bd6800dd-bd68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8447100)** | ****[Read More](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064082/559299192/-1284849897?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ2ODAwZGQtYmQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UU4FSYsJZ-1lkiFEDnpgfUZyjx_tdEnNEajtqLO9SmM=&emci=2538fcd6-bd68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bd6800dd-bd68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8447100)****
---
**This cannot be the new normal for AI.** It’s also a warning that AI can carry the biases of its creators, and should be used carefully and within a regulated framework.
Without clear guardrails, there is no reason to believe the behavior of 'Grok for Government' will be any less bigoted than the tool open to the public. And combined with the Department of Defense’s recent failures to curb antisemitism, this entire agreement needs to have full transparency.
**As Representative for one of the most diverse districts in the country, I will not tolerate any amount of scapegoating or targeting of any of our communities – by Silicon Valley, by right-wing groups, and certainly not by our federal government.**
And I will fight tooth and nail to ensure untested and potentially discriminatory technology is never allowed inside federal systems, especially when our national security is at risk.
Laura

That should be enough to make us question the guardrails around this powerful AI tool; but just days later the Trump administration took steps to turn it loose in our military. This is unacceptable and incredibly alarming. At a time when antisemitism is reported to be on the rise, and with the heightened fear felt by our Jewish community, this cannot be treated as a standard contract. That’s why I’ve led nine of my colleagues to demand accountability from the Trump Administration over their $200 million contract to deploy “Grok for Government.” | ** This cannot be the new normal for AI. It’s also a warning that AI can carry the biases of its creators, and should be used carefully and within a regulated framework. Without clear guardrails, there is no reason to believe the behavior of 'Grok for Government' will be any less bigoted than the tool open to the public. And combined with the Department of Defense’s recent failures to curb antisemitism, this entire agreement needs to have full transparency. As Representative for one of the most diverse districts in the country, I will not tolerate any amount of scapegoating or targeting of any of our communities – by Silicon Valley, by right-wing groups, and certainly not by our federal government. And I will fight tooth and nail to ensure untested and potentially discriminatory technology is never allowed inside federal systems, especially when our national security is at risk. Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Codifying Dangerous Cuts

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Last week, in the dead of night, Congressional Republicans voted to codify some of the worst of DOGE’s cuts. The total rescissions package included $9 billion in congressionally appropriated funding that will no longer be spent to benefit the American people.
These cuts include the gutting of international aid programs like USAID, which provides support for tens of millions of people worldwide; it includes cuts to civilian funding for Ukrainians living in an active war zone. But these cuts also strike close to home, with $1.1 billion in cuts to public broadcasting, like PBS and NPR.
With these cuts, Congressional Republicans are going after not just the education of America’s children, but public safety. Cuts to CPB threaten public safety, with public television and radio acting as a critical reinforcement when other systems fail.
I was proud to vote no when this package came through the House, because I will not rubber stamp cuts which threaten the safety of American families, and the lives of millions more abroad. I will not cede the powers of the Legislative Branch over to the Executive.
In 2026, we need to elect a Congress that will put people first and restore funding to these organizations. To get there, will you chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-07-24]

clean_body: Conservative leaders are checking the list, but your name’s not on it. | Not interested? . Peter, Things are unraveling fast on the Left. One top Democrat insider just came clean and said the quiet part out loud: Yikes. But don’t let that fool you into thinking we can sit back. When the Democrats start to panic, they throw every wild idea they’ve got at the wall just to see what sticks. Meanwhile, over here? The deadline to verify your voter profile is TONIGHT, Tim Scott, Tom Cotton, Ted Cruz, Kellyanne Conway have already contacted you to sound the alarm—and they are wondering why you haven’t checked in yet. This isn’t just a formality. It’s how we make sure our team is ready to show up, stand strong and win. Let’s finish what we started — and show the Left we mean business. – Senate Republican Voter Verification Committee | |

name: Jamie Long
subject: I’m only asking for $5
disclaimer_text: paid for by the
body:
Hi there,
Today I’m only asking for $5.
Here’s why: $5 adds up quickly when Minnesotans from across the state chip in. Based on the last update I heard, if everyone who opens this email gave just $5 we’d blow past our fundraising goal. Can you chip in $5 now and help us reach that goal by end of the month? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-july25-email?refcode=072325_FR_JulyGoal-EOM2_JL]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: We need to take a stand for LGBTQ+ youth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
it’s a dark time for the LGBTQ community as Donald Trump unveils cruel attacks on their freedom and safety at an unprecedented pace.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064584/559300908/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODkxODlhYS1iZjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-gDfNjwIsf_RmI6lGq-vDkoSoCwjKvG6gR7cCc9jHE=) Team, it’s a dark time for the LGBTQ+ community as Donald Trump unveils cruel attacks on their freedom and safety at an unprecedented pace. _And now this:_ **_NBC: Trump administration shuts down LGBTQ youth suicide hotline_** **Just last week, the Trump administration shut down the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline’s (988) specialized services for LGBTQ+ youth.[And I refuse to sit by and watch as Trump puts children’s lives in danger. Please, sign my petition calling on the federal government to restore the crisis line for LGBTQ+ youth NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064586/559300910/-2087327599?refcode=email_072325_988&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODkxODlhYS1iZjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-gDfNjwIsf_RmI6lGq-vDkoSoCwjKvG6gR7cCc9jHE=&emci=27b64832-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b89189aa-bf68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)** | | **[SIGN ON →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064589/559300912/-2087327599?refcode=email_072325_988&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODkxODlhYS1iZjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-gDfNjwIsf_RmI6lGq-vDkoSoCwjKvG6gR7cCc9jHE=&emci=27b64832-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b89189aa-bf68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)**
---
For many young people, this crisis line was the only place they could turn when they couldn’t seek support at home or in their community.
**Since its creation, the specialized 988 crisis line has answered almost 1.5 MILLION calls for help from LGBTQ+ youth.** The qualified, trained professionals on the other end could speak directly to their needs — _and have saved countless lives through their work._ By shutting it all down, Donald Trump is directly threatening the lives of countless LGBTQ+ kids across the United States.
**Mental health services shouldn’t be a partisan issue — _especially when children’s lives are at stake._** And this issue is far too important to let Donald Trump have the last word.
That’s why I’m fighting in Congress to secure the funding we need to expand access to affordable specialty mental health care, and to train behavioral health professionals who have the cultural experience to adequately care for LGBTQ+ youth.
**[And it’s why I’m asking every member of this grassroots team _(including you!)_ to help me sound the alarm on Trump’s cruel attacks on the most vulnerable among us. Please, if you’re with me, sign my petition calling on the federal government to restore the 988’s suicide hotline for LGBTQ+ youth NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064591/559300915/-2087327599?refcode=email_072325_988&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODkxODlhYS1iZjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-gDfNjwIsf_RmI6lGq-vDkoSoCwjKvG6gR7cCc9jHE=&emci=27b64832-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b89189aa-bf68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)**
| **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064592/559300917/-2087327599?refcode=email_072325_988&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODkxODlhYS1iZjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-gDfNjwIsf_RmI6lGq-vDkoSoCwjKvG6gR7cCc9jHE=&emci=27b64832-dc67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b89189aa-bf68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5643047)**
---
And if you or anyone you know needs to access the crisis hotline for LGBTQ+ youth, you can contact the Trevor Project online or over the phone at 1-866-488-7386.
Thank you,

clean_body: it’s a dark time for the LGBTQ community as Donald Trump unveils cruel attacks on their freedom and safety at an unprecedented pace. = Team, it’s a dark time for the LGBTQ+ community as Donald Trump unveils cruel attacks on their freedom and safety at an unprecedented pace. And now this: NBC: Trump administration shuts down LGBTQ youth suicide hotline Just last week, the Trump administration shut down the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline’s (988) specialized services for LGBTQ+ youth. | | For many young people, this crisis line was the only place they could turn when they couldn’t seek support at home or in their community. Since its creation, the specialized 988 crisis line has answered almost 1.5 MILLION calls for help from LGBTQ+ youth. The qualified, trained professionals on the other end could speak directly to their needs — and have saved countless lives through their work. By shutting it all down, Donald Trump is directly threatening the lives of countless LGBTQ+ kids across the United States. Mental health services shouldn’t be a partisan issue — especially when children’s lives are at stake. And this issue is far too important to let Donald Trump have the last word. That’s why I’m fighting in Congress to secure the funding we need to expand access to affordable specialty mental health care, and to train behavioral health professionals who have the cultural experience to adequately care for LGBTQ+ youth. | And if you or anyone you know needs to access the crisis hotline for LGBTQ+ youth, you can contact the Trevor Project online or over the phone at 1-866-488-7386. Thank you, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: Taking a Break for God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
Some things matter more than politics. [ ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/D0jwnOLbpoyGE9cwJaHFesFYFGrLCSMslaoiGPD5PrGU8shhMMJXiNqkCwqkVvAM8RCo2LiAfvSfMbikxm31vJjnStYOAhNTLrF7fCAVxvGZKRTl-0_5aJ7XxpFGaLP2erJuE6jcYSLWuRyxVZJOG4BgNY6_HEJA1uo7txZdpiTc-zRVOggr-Z7xYFrL5OUe7_eZ1b05MzidkY4TBA757mJ8k3x7b1qafiFO2jnJnQLmI3CiJ11ITZ8fhLRVF4bHXtFVDRgLsCM4wI7skDe3XY_KAORdbBlW7yaJ9iKOrX_QVKXa0_z4hDH-gzsg-X-xqQhF11MGDUEt0J1DNUg_O_EBgbv34fuXFMY-b9WCFvlxHi6fNbHyNSQo2jDLXmtoEH14IUscaN94ZxI016i6cWOGLVug0vfg7Ga1Ql_CqSccOM3XqXO4dbo0TvQScCSfwHY6A3VBNbHgBVnibabVepfgoCf78KdgfA94lSiQ-_ipXHAxMf8WZYFl-G7JLjtbi0zJ0i-OQFIol0oHZ6VM/vZFcsXu9ifycx6x35NWPnSVBOtWs2OUa/11)
---
Friends — it’s hard for me to stop working. Between being the chief law enforcement officer in Riverside County and running for Governor of California, there’s always more to do.

But this past weekend, I took a break. On Saturday, Denise and I left Redding early in the morning to get to Anaheim for the 35th annual Harvest Crusade.

The worship and community energized our souls for the fight ahead.

We needed the God time!

I’m reminded that as we criss-cross the state and fight for our children and grandchildren’s future, I must set aside time every day and every week for our Creator.

That’s ultimately who I work for.

God Bless,
Chad

| PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095

---

name: Tim Walz
subject: When I was in Ohio…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064678/559301234/-1217808311?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Walz_250724_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzcwOTAzOC1jMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76bOBIkni8h63pUmNvekoYelaHOlODGJoi-ZouxPcoM=) Team,

When Donald Trump took office in January, it was only a matter of hours before he began wreaking havoc on the federal government—attacking Social Security, gutting critical programs, stripping away our fundamental rights, and imposing reckless tariffs that are driving up costs for families and small businesses.

And Republicans in Congress doing Trump’s dirty work? They’re nowhere to be found. Take Ohio for example, where I held town halls with the Ohio Democratic Party, and where this weekend, Connecticut Senator Chris Murphy and Florida Representative Maxwell Frost are joining this fight and doing the same. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064679/559301235/-1217808311?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Walz_250724_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzcwOTAzOC1jMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76bOBIkni8h63pUmNvekoYelaHOlODGJoi-ZouxPcoM=)
Reports reveal that Ohioans have been unable to reach their GOP senators. Calls are going unanswered. Voicemail boxes are full. **Republicans think that if they hide from their constituents, they can’t be held accountable for the damage they’re doing to our nation.**

So when I was there, elevating Ohioans whose voices are being ignored, every single seat in the main room and the overflow space was packed— _two nights in a row._

The message from Ohioans was heard loud and clear: **they’re fed up with Republican politicians who work for billionaires while leaving their own constituents behind.**

**They’re tired of being ignored and wondering if anyone in power actually cares.**

Look, I know it can feel impossible to find a silver lining these days. Yet, our sold-out town halls in Ohio are proof that we are not powerless. When we show up, listen, and fight, we can push back against Trump and stand up for the values we share.

[**_That’s why today, I’m asking if you can chip in to support the Ohio Democratic Party. Because after packing those rooms with folks tired of the Trump status-quo, Ohio Dems are jumping right back into their fight to give Democrats the resources they need to win next year so they can take back control of Congress and stand up against the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda. Can I count on you to donate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112064680/559301236/-1217808311?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Walz_250724_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzcwOTAzOC1jMDY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76bOBIkni8h63pUmNvekoYelaHOlODGJoi-ZouxPcoM=) name: Leah Johnson
subject: 3 reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
If we don’t close our fundraising gap, we’ll have to make serious cuts to our plans.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)
Hi, Leah here. I'm Deb's Finance Director.
I’m writing to you because we’re facing a major deadline next Thursday — that’s when we’ll close the books on our fundraising for this month.
**As of this morning, we still need to raise $60,000 from emails just like this one before midnight on July 31st.[Can you rush a $5 donation to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250724_1_eomlaunch?amount=5&refcode=em20250724-3368&refcode2=3368_400544_eT1PLZ&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)**
As one of our most dedicated supporters, I want to explain why falling short of our goal is not an option:
→ We are facing a **competitive and expensive race** here in New Mexico, where MAGA forces are going to try to flip our state.
→ **The far-right is already smearing Deb** with all kinds of bogus attacks, and we need the resources to fight back against their narratives.
→ Now rumors are swirling that **a self-funded millionaire GOP opponent could jump into this race at any moment.**
Deb’s record as a champion for the land and working people speaks for itself. With enough resources, we can continue to share that message with voters across the state and counter any smears that come our way.
**But if we don’t close our fundraising gap, we’ll have to make serious cuts to our plans.**
**[Can Deb count on you to be one of the people who step up right now? Make a $5 contribution to help us reach our goal and win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250724_1_eomlaunch?amount=5&refcode=em20250724-3368&refcode2=3368_400544_eT1PLZ&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250724_1_eomlaunch?amount=5&refcode=em20250724-3368&refcode2=3368_400544_eT1PLZ&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)**
Thank you so much for being part of our Fierce Fam. This grassroots campaign is only possible with your continued support.
Leah Johnson
Finance Director
Deb for New Mexico
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250724-1&t=2&refcode2=3368_400544_eT1PLZ&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3368%2E400544%2EeT1PLZ)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

Friend – I need to tell you something personal - because it’s not just about me anymore.
**A former federal employee from Voice of America was just indicted after spending over a year making violent threats against me, my family, and my staff.**
_At one point, he told me directly:_
**_“We’re coming after you and your staff, and we are locked and loaded._** **_We’re going to take you all out. You’re going to get one between the eyes.”_**
I have faced countless threats from extremist Democrats and radical activists before, but nothing like this...
This man terrorized me for 15 months. And now that he’s been arrested, we’ve learned **he had ties to federally funded agencies** and access to resources that made these threats even more chilling.
This is exactly how dangerous the rhetoric from the Left has become. For years, they’ve demonized conservatives, calling us “extremists,” and encouraging their allies to “make us pay...”
**_And now their words are becoming violent actions._**
As a rank-and-file member of Congress, **_[I don’t have the luxury of government security details](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckl9v2yAUxT8NfiOywTHkwQ9rvVRTtVZ72dq-WBiuHVb-uIATJZ9-suNm056Q7j2c39EBYUej-3ON2B0i5KBVRIQg-gUR8sBfz1WvPh7u8MsbYGie8su8JPer8khuWifFj-9P33xIbzGA0fzj8vVY3NTpPMJNuyI3YIU285Q1mao564XqM6gLtqWUU855dqiLipW9UnJXFryjcsuromfljnc7wXcd3Wa6JjnZ5oyUxS4vy2ojmSyU6igVwIRggMp8AW2GAOCglN4NAWLcSG8zUx9SGuOSa4_IPoKcAmxO2gVQswKRvRXhtw8acBJn4wO--uCIR_CjAeyPEPDojU5aauEilvOlNLTKu9aKk_Stm2Qr0jsWqQXbfgZGdB9mXtBuQLRJYQJEqinZ1oLSk0W0WStahtFPQQKijZOmXTtcV1LYUejBIdpcrfHKF0n_G8LAFFuRkpDvn8dC-Btp9fMugUtXFv4l78Xj6-PPU4dI1TqjFaLNf8Pl49DmAs8yfymes1Cr8aSN0bFiqMyH5QXmxo81-RMAAP__eRrMKQ)_...**
**_I pay for protection out of my own campaign funds or my personal savings._**
Democrats know that when they force me to drain my campaign funds paying for security, they make it easier to beat me at the ballot box.
**_[So I’m asking you for you to chip in whatever you can manage to help keep me safe and fighting for our country](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckkGPmzAQhX-NuTkCm2A4cGhKs-qhu-ot3Qua2ANx19jENomSX19B2LTqydLM8_ueng3DaHR3q4nYEcZOWgXCGOFfCGMv5a9b0anzy44e3pFi85re5yX7uiov7Km1En7-eP3ufHwPHo0uz_dvl-ypjrcRn9oVucEBtJmnoklUXYoOVJdgnYkt5yUvyzI51XyLx7JSVZFtEbZFVSBIWYkOj0UpxbFMdM1Stk0Fy7MqzfNiI4XMlDpyDigABJI8XUCb3iNazKWzvccQNtINialPMY5hybUnbB9QTh43V209qllB2H4A_9t5jTTCzThPHz400BHdaJC6C3o6OqOjlhpsoHK-FPtWOdsOcJWutZNsIX5QiC0O7Wdgwvd-5nlte8Kb6CckrJji0A6o9DQQ3qwVLcPgJi-R8MZK064drisJwwi6t4Q3D2u68iHqf0MYnEILMYL8-DwWwt9Iq5-zEW18sOjxsDtXO396nQgrWmu0Irz5b7h8HN7c8U2mh-wt8bUar9oYHQpB8rRfXmBu_FKzPwEAAP__1j7NAQ)_****.**
[CHIP IN](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcks1u2zAQhJ-GutGQSFlSDzo0VW30kATtKc2FWJMrmQ1_FJKyaz99IVlxi54I7A7nGwwJdjS6v7SkfiCMHbWKhDHCPxPG9s3PS9Wr9_0DfXlFit1Tfp2X7MuqPLG71kn4_vj0zYf0GgMa3bxfv56KuzpdRrxrV-QGLWgzT-suU21T96D6DNui3nLe8KZpsmPbHNSBKSzzUuaS94AAxVYVeaWaantQkOmW5Wyb16wsPuVlWW1kLQulDpwD1gA1kjJfQJshIDospXdDwBg30tvMtMeUxrjk2hG2iyingJuzdgHVrCBsZyH88kEjTXAxPtCbD410RD8apP6EgY7e6KSlBhepnC-lQSjvhIWz9MJNUkB6o5AEWvERmPBdmHlBu4HwLoUJCaumZIVFpSdLeLdWtAyjn4JEwjsnjVg7XFcS7Ah6cIR3N2u68iHpf0MYnKKAlEC-fRwL4W-k1c-7hC7dWPTH-Xd43FfVnhFWCWe0Irz7b7h8HN5d8VnmL8VzFlo1nrUxOlY1KfNheYG58VPL_gQAAP__SpbMpA)
Thank you. Truly.
_In Liberty,_

**Marjorie Taylor Greene**

clean_body: | Hey Peter, If we told you that just $5 could help support Mazie’s work and fuel her fight to flip the Senate, would you believe us? Well, it’s true! We know that $5 doesn’t sound like all that much, especially when the same billionaires that Republicans just handed a massive tax break to are ready to repay the favor. But when thousands of people like you join together and chip in $5 or more at a time, it adds up — fast. Unlike Republicans, Mazie isn’t selling out working families to give even more to the richest people in the country. She’s fighting to deliver real results for everyday people, protect our rights and freedoms, and elect more Democrats to the Senate who will work alongside her to protect folks in Hawaii and across the country from Trump’s harmful agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — Team Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

Hi Peter, My team and I sent around a quick Summer Priorities Survey last week, and I’m glad that hundreds of supporters have already taken the time to respond! **Getting input from as many folks as possible helps give us the best sense of what issues are the most important among our supporters right now.** We’re extending our deadline by another few days, so if you haven’t yet taken just a few minutes to respond to our questions, I hope you’ll do so soon. Here’s that survey link again 👉 **[https://secure.ngpvan.com/zqcRryvY5kiwMkInleCz3w2?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112065748/559304738/-1751357542?refcode=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDllN2YxNi1jMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN26xTI08_7Unk13NElEbWrwEZQQztikmRUn_KOB_RI=&emci=19b0aaee-9c68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1049176)** Thanks so much, Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112065749/559304739/-1751357542?refcode=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDllN2YxNi1jMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN26xTI08_7Unk13NElEbWrwEZQQztikmRUn_KOB_RI=&emci=19b0aaee-9c68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1049176)
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_** You’ve seen the news, Peter. Tariffs that are on one day but off the next causing widespread economic turmoil. Supreme Court rulings that may affect you and your family. Funding cuts to programs like SNAP and Medicaid that keep families fed and healthy. The end of clean air and water requirements that ensure our safety. All this and more can have a very real impact on our lives, and we’d like to check in with you about what’s at the top of your mind. **[Could you share some thoughts with us about the issues facing us right now, and where your priorities lie?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112065750/559304740/-1751357542?refcode=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDllN2YxNi1jMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN26xTI08_7Unk13NElEbWrwEZQQztikmRUn_KOB_RI=&emci=19b0aaee-9c68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1049176)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112065751/559304741/-1751357542?refcode=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDllN2YxNi1jMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN26xTI08_7Unk13NElEbWrwEZQQztikmRUn_KOB_RI=&emci=19b0aaee-9c68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=e09e7f16-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1049176)

At a time when there’s so much uncertainty and confusion about what may lie ahead, it’s important for us to stay united. Sharing your thoughts with us today helps all of us who want this country to be one where everyone can thrive.
We deeply appreciate your time and input,
Team Cooper

* **TOP NEWS**

**" 2 still missing in Texas floods after body of woman found in Kerrville, Greg Abbott says," **Houston Chronicle's **Jarrod Wardwell** -- "The body of a woman who was missing in the [devastating July 4 floods](https://substack.com/redirect/4607ab18-9ae1-4474-963e-cb34b82aacac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has been found, according to Gov. **Greg Abbott**.

Abbott said Task Force 1 -- one of the search teams deployed in response -- recovered the body in the Kerrville area. He [announced the discovery](https://substack.com/redirect/024a51eb-28ef-4c38-aa03-e2a87cce074e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a post on X at 10:10 p.m. Tuesday.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/eff730f8-81ab-4bdc-a2e0-77691450828a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Three people [remained missing after the flood,](https://substack.com/redirect/232ee6c2-f600-4e0c-b812-765ba4ad0f56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leading up to Tuesday night, according to Kerr County officials. The recent finding would presumably lower that number to two.

A man and a little girl from Camp Mystic were still missing, Abbott said. He last said the death toll stood at 135.

"Our search continues," he wrote.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/eff730f8-81ab-4bdc-a2e0-77691450828a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Floodwaters had surged in the early morning hours of July 4 after rainfall [overloaded the Guadalupe River](https://substack.com/redirect/1cded19c-f915-4ac0-b4f6-ea0e444408e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and inundated parts of the Texas Hill Country. The Guadaulupe River rose[ 20 feet in about 95 minutes](https://substack.com/redirect/c67cf906-08b2-4865-8486-a31e9020c5f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and topped the streambed by 40 feet in some places, leaving little time for those sleeping nearby to escape.

The ensuing flood wiped out riverside camps, RV parks and homes. The most lives were lost in Kerr County, where at least 37 children and 70 adults died in the flooding.

Kerr County was home to summer camps like Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls that has been [described as heaven on earth](https://substack.com/redirect/f00f2b4f-92d1-457a-8b65-a875734b2f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The camp has [confirmed 27 campers and counselors were killed](https://substack.com/redirect/53803f50-b885-47ab-b2c8-3a629797ffc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the flooding, and one child there remains missing. The camp's owner [died trying to save the young campers](https://substack.com/redirect/f00f2b4f-92d1-457a-8b65-a875734b2f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from tragedy.

As of Wednesday morning, state and county officials had yet to issue updates about the flood victims who remain missing." [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/011957b5-e7c7-4002-bb91-dd2768dd75a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS " 2 still missing in Texas floods after body of woman found in Kerrville, Greg Abbott says," Houston Chronicle's Jarrod Wardwell -- "The body of a woman who was missing in the has been found, according to Gov. Greg Abbott. Abbott said Task Force 1 -- one of the search teams deployed in response -- recovered the body in the Kerrville area. He in a post on X at 10:10 p.m. Tuesday. Three people leading up to Tuesday night, according to Kerr County officials. The recent finding would presumably lower that number to two. A man and a little girl from Camp Mystic were still missing, Abbott said. He last said the death toll stood at 135. "Our search continues," he wrote. Floodwaters had surged in the early morning hours of July 4 after rainfall and inundated parts of the Texas Hill Country. The Guadaulupe River rose and topped the streambed by 40 feet in some places, leaving little time for those sleeping nearby to escape. The ensuing flood wiped out riverside camps, RV parks and homes. The most lives were lost in Kerr County, where at least 37 children and 70 adults died in the flooding. Kerr County was home to summer camps like Camp Mystic, a Christian summer camp for girls that has been . The camp has in the flooding, and one child there remains missing. The camp's owner from tragedy. As of Wednesday morning, state and county officials had yet to issue updates about the flood victims who remain missing." name: Claudia, United We Dream
subject: What do llama bingo rodeos, beach days, and yoga sessions all have in common?
body:
Discover the many ways young people are building community power this summer. | | | Hey Peter, What do llama bingo rodeos, beach days, and yoga sessions all have in common? 🦙🧘♀️✨ They’re some of the many ways young people are bringing their communities together this summer. In a moment of escalating attacks against everyday working people, we need spaces where we can be ourselves. Where we can rest and recharge. Where immigrants, allies, neighbors, and friends can take collective action and bring to life a world that puts us first. **☀️ That’s exactly what our Summer Of Dreams is all about!** **All summer, young people across the country have been coming together to host spaces where their communities can feel safe to resist, build, and dream together.** Now, with our latest “Building Community Power” Guide, you can get the tools to host a space where your friends, co-workers, and neighbors can come together to dialogue and fight for our collective future: **[Check Out Our Guide Today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dCqW_4Pl4NoYOoRHgV6MhzboP9FI3246SfEiJedR2SSt664YWjpCb1FDFn1rWZ27C7SCg061xMnxRKhkm6RblpYZDZoDAUTORMsCGmMkPnYZGKZGPRPCp9Vs7w-cZArNP8FP--QUVKsr6IWCCpk09BBL_iuNdicfBQ73bZRj_kbjnBGOuLiTOovrAX-aFf8utBSc8H-Mb-F1GIpnb9HfWkU8y6j8J-f1wtZ61QuDhDAMRVWd1KlS71yCG3dXJd-Ng71TSms_BUpZYi7WF-igtcjb0tp5IABKKJt2kNFZbq6KB6ck_c7MHlaGHg2idjpYVI/4ig/Dy-mkJ4uTNaAfoyA_W55eA/h0/h001.ArIxkMbjImxrIS2g2aOXatAzToADLzL-d7Ih-Q7t6l4)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dCqW_4Pl4NoYOoRHgV6MhzboP9FI3246SfEiJedR2SSt664YWjpCb1FDFn1rWZ27C7SCg061xMnxRKhkm6RblpY7P3yfdMtDbFhkHayeULC2r3yQF2D9TY3nhCr9M6IWNH3Osut4H_dIXUyJQfJ35VuGi3a3ybn206KzLmXnu9x32fZ9hma1wv-Va26663IfiZbTnFm_-dopDXdo_zc5iZ5CbXHt8C3IAi1Q_q4vrplPHQd4ibc6femuxYZ0v4L0ukMYITF_dDBSmzvwAifmRB6Y3yjHuNiG00ei2124aZu6Xxrs4FmOGDXeEm2J7gVFS8/4ig/Dy-mkJ4uTNaAfoyA_W55eA/h1/h001.UIm49SHSwvVc-dpIxAE8WHXyF56eJREfJHIpPwXGbqg)** This moment is calling us ALL to show up as one to protect our collective future. So, whether you’re taking your loved ones out to connect with nature (and pet cute llamas) or hosting a paint night where you and your friends can have meaningful discussions, you can take the first step to build community power in Lorton by reading our guide today! [👉 **Get resources on how to bring your community together and activities you can do with your friends and neighbors!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dCqW_4Pl4NoYOoRHgV6MhzboP9FI3246SfEiJedR2SSt664YWjpCb1FDFn1rWZ27C7SCg061xMnxRKhkm6RblpY9v0kMamjFW-jWXA4mgPA9XRA21Q0yJ5Xwno_0msIRgB6G9AfKFLm7_R0761HgyblPAxrWnv6LIyw_W-r0pjXI-j3Qg29YbqAbf2LRPBg4MX0lWk9LnNxaiyYKs4vZKvElZIzglO4X10GhF57MpK-W-LXSko6sIE-ia9tRVSh_oenLeYjWClgn-6ZvttK-pjUj9bIV3IHJ9ahnKlQ9qfNKJ3g0PHd9vcU_sJT2DPa3BY/4ig/Dy-mkJ4uTNaAfoyA_W55eA/h2/h001.Z1fpgfILAoKHLXzy_VM0PafU_dSfx2KEym8OTpMnPmA) In power, Claudia and the UWD team

name: Heinrich HQ
subject: NEWS: The economic impact of Trump's tariffs on New Mexico
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112066005/559305607/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmJlMDllZC1jMTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDXEXNjsuCVH0WFSffcl_5e0_K2CfU5aKzQzQGjKqSc=&emci=b1be09ed-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b6be09ed-c168-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=252045)
---
**We've got crucial news, team:** Trump’s tariffs are back in full swing, and they’re going to hit working families and small businesses across New Mexico hard. Prices will skyrocket. Local jobs will be at risk. MAGA Republicans shamelessly tout these tariffs as a political win, but we know the true costs. And we know we need to replace them with leaders who prioritize economic common sense over chaos. Martin is working hard for smart, sustainable economic policies that uplift our families and communities, and he’s supporting Democratic candidates who will do the same nationwide. Flipping the Senate **blue** is the best way to achieve economic policies that work for everyone — not just a select few. name: HOUSE GOP EMERGENCY ALERT
subject: ARREST WARRANT FOR BARACK OBAMA?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206ph4k3ll9dk4cxe4bn24mjac6e511i4w7l5otqyw2y9nj8wnek7z0xfrman6oan3p2t4lym7041kh4ape&__stmp=szx4i4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1r79wm6fidhjxvvjl5q6wyvazt5jvaqee6kpplpfdkoysx8i7u91xpviklpusnh2y61a0zmn9u9eg8kndy7mmi3d0nhl6ks4dqyn0dfku0bgd2b7xa6prbsxg36ttvo8j4c190bdt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1r79wm6fidhjxvvjl5q6wyvazt5jvaqee6kpplpfdkoysx8i7u91xpviklpusnh2y61a0zmn9u9eg8kndy7mmi3d0nhl6ks4dqyn0dfku0bgd2b7xa6prbsxg36ttvo8j4c190bdt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szx4i4&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Josh Weil 4 SEN.
subject: What Does this Mean to YOU?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I may not be a career politician, but I know what this flag is supposed to represent.
Friend, It’s not about party lines or personal gain. It’s about our shared commitment to one another as Americans.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/342B59797531664F305847704E42724C784934726A33706F6B376C57486C346E53373474436D50524E72324A30536D554544464344447542684C7651756C7A34/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-23%20at%201.15.40%E2%80%AFPM.png]
Right now, we’ve got leaders in Washington and Tallahassee treating government like a game, while families across Florida struggle to afford rent, insulin, or a trip to the grocery store.
I believe public service means putting people first. Not just donors, not just your base, everyone. Ashley Moody and the MAGA-heads want you to believe in them, but we need a Senator that believes in the people.
That’s what I’ll do as your next U.S. Senator.
If you believe we need fewer talking heads and more folks ready to roll up their sleeves, I hope you’ll chip in today.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/24/2025
body:
Polis Push for Legacy Bridge Meets Overwhelming Public Backlash
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** AG Phil Weiser is [suing a Mesa County deputy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for allegedly helping ICE arrest visa violators, fueling debate over Colorado’s sanctuary stance. In a win for rural towns, Rep. Boebert’s [ZIP code accuracy bill passed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with bipartisan support. Meanwhile, backlash is mounting over [Gov. Polis’ legacy bridge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), UCHealth is delaying surgeries due to [sterilization staffing problems](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and ICE arrested a repeat offender with [21 convictions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Boulder.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** President Trump is weighing a plan to [eliminate capital gains taxes on home sales](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to revive the housing market amid high interest rates. And despite Democrat outrage, Medicaid reforms in Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill don’t cut coverage—they simply [slow runaway spending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Three columns this week expose the widening gap between elite agendas and everyday Coloradans. Cory Gaines shows how Denver’s far-left policies are [driving residents out](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Scott James slams the “just transition” as a [betrayal of rural towns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) like Craig. And Christy Anderson warns that teachers unions are now [fighting for power—not students](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, July 24, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Polis Push for Legacy Bridge Meets Overwhelming Public Backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A proposed pedestrian bridge that would have connected Civic Center Park to the base of the Colorado Capitol building in celebration of Colorado’s 150th anniversary will not be built after the governor’s office received overwhelming results in a survey.
According to the Colorado Governor’s Office, almost 94% of respondents (over 82,000 votes) were against the initiative. The results showed that over 3,000 voters (3.8%) were in favor of the project, while another 2,043 people (2.3%) voted “maybe” on the bridge.
The survey was open through midnight Monday. The project has drawn criticism from numerous groups, including veterans who said their monuments and memorials where the bridge would be located would be “desecrated” by the project.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Anderson: The Union Isn’t Fighting for Kids Anymore—It’s Fighting for Control](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Mesa County teacher Christy Anderson argues that the local teachers union (MVEA) is prioritizing political control over student success, using fear tactics and media spin now that it no longer dominates the school board.
* She contends the union’s national affiliations fund partisan activism rather than focus on classroom needs like discipline, rigorous curriculum, and academic recovery.
* Anderson left the union after realizing its national and local leaders were more invested in political power than in actually helping students or representing teachers.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Boebert Delivers Big for Small Colorado Towns with ZIP Code Bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Rep. Lauren Boebert’s bill to assign unique ZIP codes to small towns passed the U.S. House with strong bipartisan support, including all eight Colorado representatives.
* The bill addresses concerns from towns like Severance, where shared ZIP codes have led to lost tax revenue and emergency response delays.
* If signed into law, the bill would grant new ZIP codes to 15 Colorado communities, improving services and local revenue tracking.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Trailblazers among us: Meet the RMV award winners changing Colorado from the ground up](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | JULY 23** _At the Mountain Majesty Gala last month, the room was on its feet. Eric Trump had just wrapped his keynote, a message aimed straight at the grassroots: Colorado is yearning to be red. But the loud applause that night wasn’t reserved only for the headliner._
__
**[Hunter: The Prince of Darkness and the Light of the World](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 23** _They called him the Prince of Darkness, a man whose voice shook stadiums and whose image terrified a generation of churchgoers. Ozzy Osbourne was never the poster child for purity. He bit bats, howled at moons, and lived through headlines that left even the tabloids gasping. And yet, strangely enough, it was Ozzy—not a pastor or prophet—who helped spark a light in my soul._
__
**[DiGirolamo: Teen sexting—What every parent needs to know](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JOHN DIGIROLAMO | COMMENTARY | JULY 22** _Taylor Swift wrote that when you’re fifteen, and someone tells you they love you, you’re going to believe them. Almost twenty years later, a teen’s definition of love and what’s fun and flirty now includes sending nude images._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**⚔️ DID YOU KNOW?** **Armadillo shells can deflect bullets.** Now that’s tough armor! In one bizarre incident, a Texas man ended up in the hospital after a bullet he fired at an armadillo bounced off its shell—only to hit him in the jaw. You can’t make this stuff up.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "No power on earth has a right to take our property from us without our consent." – John Jay
|
---

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A billion-dollar blow to independent media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4888%2E35263%2E19iRBb)
Peter, Senate Republicans are coming after public broadcasting at Donald Trump’s orders. I introduced an amendment to protect public broadcasting and unbiased reporting from far-right attacks. To no surprise, Republicans blocked it — and proceeded to rip over a _billion dollars away_ from local television and radio stations like NPR and PBS. Why? To silence reporters, dismantle independent media, and weaken our democracy. Trump and his administration have an ongoing track record of attacking anyone who criticizes their actions — protestors, reporters, college students, and now public broadcasting. As these cuts stand, local television and radio stations that provide potentially _lifesaving_ weather alerts will shut down, and rural stations will be the first to close.**It’s not an exaggeration to say this will have disastrous consequences.** In pursuit of silencing dissent, Trump and extreme Republicans have taken their cruelty to new heights, severing lifelines for rural communities and small towns. To my Republican colleagues, I ask:_What are we doing here?_ **[I’m supporting Democratic candidates who will defend these vital lifelines and push back against Trump’s dangerous agenda. If you can join me, please chip in $5 or any amount today:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2256?c0=stb-em-july25.-CujOw&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250724_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4888%2E35263%2E19iRBb)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-july25.nz2gsq&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250724_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4888%2E35263%2E19iRBb)

clean_body: | Peter, Senate Republicans are coming after public broadcasting at Donald Trump’s orders. I introduced an amendment to protect public broadcasting and unbiased reporting from far-right attacks. To no surprise, Republicans blocked it — and proceeded to rip over a billion dollars away from local television and radio stations like NPR and PBS. Why? To silence reporters, dismantle independent media, and weaken our democracy. Trump and his administration have an ongoing track record of attacking anyone who criticizes their actions — protestors, reporters, college students, and now public broadcasting. As these cuts stand, local television and radio stations that provide potentially lifesaving weather alerts will shut down, and rural stations will be the first to close.It’s not an exaggeration to say this will have disastrous consequences. In pursuit of silencing dissent, Trump and extreme Republicans have taken their cruelty to new heights, severing lifelines for rural communities and small towns. To my Republican colleagues, I ask:What are we doing here? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you. — Tammy P.O. Rep. Kevin Kiley cannot be trusted to act in our best interests. Time after time he has let our district down and voted, twice, for Donald Trump's budget bill to throw thousands in our district off of Medicaid and steal food from their tables just to give tax breaks to billionaires .
Heidi is running to end the toxic D.C. politics that encourage this extremism that puts corporations over people and leaves communities like ours behind.
We need someone who will be uncompromising in their fight to protect our environment, increase affordability, and tackle corruption in Washington—and this poll shows that our district agrees.
Friend, spreading Heidi's message is crucial to flipping this seat, and we're going to need your help. Can you please chip in what you can to help us gather the resources we need to reach out to people digitally and on the ground? We can win this! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250724_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20250724_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG_]

In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250724_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250724_em_fr_b1_THH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.

Sent from my iPhone

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. clean_body: In case you didn’t hear: Democrats raised over $800 MILLION on ActBlue in the first half of 2025. | Fellow American, I just received this notification: In case you didn’t hear: Democrats raised over $800 MILLION on ActBlue in the first half of 2025. This is our first chance since the news broke to show Democrats we’re in a position to not only defend Montana’s MUST-WIN Senate seat, but go on the offensive and expand our Majority. The only way I can make this notification go away is by hitting our July fundraising target. And right now I’m only $5,300 short of our objective. Thank you -- Steve P.S. The battle for the Senate Majority is a TOSS-UP. We have no margin for error. Falling short of our July fundraising target is not an option. name: Derek Tran
subject: This is what folks hate about politics.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112068669/559314612/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhlYWM1MmQtY2E2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_O5va9DD0coNR01zuixo6gLnuH3ZASMgNuM0g3FcdVU=)
Let’s cut through the noise: Republicans had the chance to do the right thing – to release the Epstein files and expose the powerful abusers who’ve gotten away with far too much. Instead? Every single Republican on the House Rules Committee voted to block them. **The fallout was so damning, they scrapped their own legislative agenda for the entire summer – effectively closing down Congress until September.** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112068671/559314614/1527952032?refcode=em-7.24.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhlYWM1MmQtY2E2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_O5va9DD0coNR01zuixo6gLnuH3ZASMgNuM0g3FcdVU=)
**Epstein crisis forces House GOP to scrap votes**

While they torched their own bills just to avoid taking a vote, these same Republicans are proudly voting to rip health care away from children and slash food assistance for families in districts like mine.
It’s disgusting. It’s exactly what people hate about politics – and even Trump’s own base is raising questions about a potential cover up.
I didn’t run for Congress to cover for the powerful. I ran to fight for working people and that means standing up to corruption, no matter who it implicates.
**[No one should be above the law – not billionaires, not Trump, and _sure as hell_ not abusers. I ran to fight for working people and that means standing up to corruption, no matter who it implicates. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e1a9608df527448d95b73080f006dbd9&_e=m8jpQjE6YXo2aVzSS4hfbFNz1HT8ivhyECLcKkQeuMg9xp8oziq2F3dgHHnGaYLx0FsoDe3nh68sTFWNjXhCfw8JosdE8Tw8r7M0iGijpL7hQX2NUV-PKEaQZd_K3zSJYyg_Tow0r9BZEaY-iRu3hfz17axoyjMks0Aw_N8iQQFos47kIRB9_uzx8dpHFpUSYJPkidbTv29QGusWJGTCwct1Widt9ve_ECjQbzmFQQXFfpjFAYLD2GWhhFIwoeCverPhxFTMi8EqEy8HeJiA4B-pRRthrEEEsNNb7NkeFEk8aFMrej9qeCNjBvSo1dBioV_OZQodd7G7yRzgqPxx0prBUb-sUeO-1JmpgWR6byrreMl5tO12HZTyEjWF5mF4_9qhuPHGwr7uYZRvcilJ4i1dZOw2nFRdaABLOnAaMUhQ4l3wZtGNlaWP9BQ176BmqhO7INyBuuUjV5AOCNm8gA5lagC4fjfmcfWs7RSOgJDvGNesoJX-nts47bgKze5-nCxpg7MgtM9rJCeRLLSITTGqkPidOT3iEcsJ-lbzXqNDiTcrlNDXVWqCXmmcjsfzbady6Xq0p5I8BS1wPf1TBt8N4fxErcbIrs4t0bp__mfK29t9ypZ_Y794P_kE9IsNYxFLP2nMVMmj9dric6a1kdDp0N0NNY2o0KABMS57zwwMfLPff-ZsxCTA4MYOVXu8djT5cGlM49Mo8yswVrpdGIpATWpk-6A-aK5x6lV2Ikx9Jc9nyjN6uJu4XqgqocEVgj3dy9QQfNXbLlJAtSOdYbADZFIRxkD_8EHWclAAP2T39KpnRdw9HHPqgntb6OiZ)

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
