name: Bo Mitchell
subject: I’m running for Congress because Tennessee deserves better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Mitchell for Congress
body:
This seat is vacant. Let’s make sure it doesn’t end up back in Republican hands.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072061/559325569/1330170104?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_welcome_250724_TNHouseC_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE4M2QzZGYtZDQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr4OVv7DsVVdAbIRQyU6NwjWqSv-Cu_P1bOWUsaUYqM=)

| | Peter,

Big news: **I’m running for Congress in Tennessee’s vacant 7th congressional seat.**

I’d like to take a minute to tell you why I’m running in this special election to represent Tennessee in the House of Representatives—and why I’m asking you to[ **_make a grassroots donation today to help us kick off this campaign strong and prove that we’re ready for change._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072062/559325570/112797647?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_welcome_250724_TNHouseC_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE4M2QzZGYtZDQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr4OVv7DsVVdAbIRQyU6NwjWqSv-Cu_P1bOWUsaUYqM=)

I’ve spent my career fighting for working families across Tennessee, as a public servant and in the state legislature. And I’ve seen firsthand what happens when politicians in power forget who they’re supposed to serve.

While Tennesseans struggle with the rising cost of living, broken health care systems, and underfunded schools, Republicans in Congress have used their majority to cut Medicaid—expected to kick 290,000 Tennesseans off of their health care and close rural hospitals—and food assistance, making more kids across the state go hungry, all for the sake of massive tax breaks for billionaires. That’s not just wrong—it’s dangerous.

Politicians in Washington, DC have shown that they don’t have our interests at heart. We need a leader who will fight for affordable health care for everyone, clean air and water, reproductive freedom, and real economic opportunity—not one who will sell us out.

This is our moment to stand up and change direction, and I know we have a real shot to flip this seat and put working Tennesseeans first. But I need you with me from day one.

[**_Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can today to build the grassroots campaign it will take to flip Tennessee’s 7th district blue in this special election?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072063/559325571/112797647?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_welcome_250724_TNHouseC_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE4M2QzZGYtZDQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr4OVv7DsVVdAbIRQyU6NwjWqSv-Cu_P1bOWUsaUYqM=)

Thank you,

Bo Mitchell ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072064/559325572/112797647?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_welcome_250724_TNHouseC_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE4M2QzZGYtZDQ2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gr4OVv7DsVVdAbIRQyU6NwjWqSv-Cu_P1bOWUsaUYqM=)**** ****

* * *

name: Rep. Troy Downing
subject: Unleashing American Energy – FOR REAL:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
America’s got a treasure trove of hidden energy.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTc1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcyNF9GWi1CUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzQ5MjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MjRfRlotQlIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjc0OTI4LTI4OTkifQ/caCHwuoGduB1nc_uDn_vsw)Peter,
I'm launching a bold initiative to reverse the Biden administration's disastrous war on American energy. My legislation will repeal the draconian law that's locked millions of acres of federal land and mineral estate, crippling our nation's coal production.
As the Representative of Montana's 2nd District, I know firsthand the devastating impact of these restrictions. The affected region holds nearly 30% of America's coal reserves, and it's imperative we take action to unlock these resources.
**That's why my legislation is so critical. By overturning these restrictions, we'll:**
** Unlock the Powder River Basin in Montana, allowing for future coal leasing and development.** Inject $15 million in new federal revenue to support American taxpayers** Ensure access to 37.8 billion short tons of coal, meeting America's coal demand for almost a century.
America runs on energy. And when we restrict our own supply, we surrender our future—to China, to OPEC, to global bureaucrats who don’t have our best interests at heart.
We must reverse course. We must fuel American strength.
[Will you help me fight back against Biden’s reckless anti-energy agenda? Every dollar helps us push the America First energy agenda forward:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTc1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDcyNF9GWi1CUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NzQ5MjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA3MjRfRlotQlIuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjc0OTI4LTI4OTkifQ/JfZ6dtG-Rkt_kJUSytbZuQ)[FUEL TROY’S FIGHT

clean_body: America’s got a treasure trove of hidden energy. , I'm launching a bold initiative to reverse the Biden administration's disastrous war on American energy. My legislation will repeal the draconian law that's locked millions of acres of federal land and mineral estate, crippling our nation's coal production. As the Representative of Montana's 2nd District, I know firsthand the devastating impact of these restrictions. The affected region holds nearly 30% of America's coal reserves, and it's imperative we take action to unlock these resources. That's why my legislation is so critical. By overturning these restrictions, we'll: Unlock the Powder River Basin in Montana, allowing for future coal leasing and development. Inject $15 million in new federal revenue to support American taxpayers** Ensure access to 37.8 billion short tons of coal, meeting America's coal demand for almost a century. America runs on energy. And when we restrict our own supply, we surrender our future—to China, to OPEC, to global bureaucrats who don’t have our best interests at heart. We must reverse course. We must fuel American strength. , Rep. Downing (MT-2)| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. subject: Tom Homan Addresses Death Threats
body:
Did you read his powerful response?
| Friend,
---
This is sickening.
---
President Trump’s border czar Tom Homan has received **_death threats_** simply for enforcing our country’s immigration laws.
---
The Left is hoping these threats will break Homan into submission and force him to call off the deportations.
---
But Homan didn’t flinch. Here’s his response to these despicable threats:
---
**“I’M NOT GOING ANYWHERE.”** [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fe7f4c4f54754167964e77ded2534630&_e=sI0UZ0rdOArU1aq828js3U1LC92z4ST6IuCIBvUyHf4BOt2c43AZwlw9cmfmDIkSPJFfUVTFWLzKFgeKvjmVlx2jDAmt2HsEnjxHyW-tDPP8P6ccyC77u0QDHaZDG4ZYYLZKZ4Rg86OqH3RaxA9KQUIC0ocJDvJfAGPOZWh3e3bUiqZsZv9bYuXrnaxmsmCY8cfPw4uktLieudzVIWr_rAegzkUHO9CpMXDyGRN-prZTmUBmLtY_PPxg0PgcUkEMlfc9Kxd8hsViJvm2QXJdT5yfxdujNID2kE-lqGwtdXYPGlZB9KXtvVu6nVUFk1GhjSDBeDfHSfJxmrRX345j3cXysFCHjlJoCiDsV8izf0yjVnAIUUN8cuI34s1ZXT9d2qy0mNHSaRzPMNPq3BhamgHjvFj7AHMTQk7bHdLX1PpVjEwNn5hRbCmWerd4xpqlHEW2lr4snDCTzw7dfsm6Hb06nL13wBQgaoE5JS8sZQLI6yfEs7YR0XrNir8R2tpG2NA4HYn6E9e8i-8FVuFF4EzulsbzIZue5Y-npAgR3ZwfHCyTy0i1LrECNgS7fO9wq46HJpiOAj0KzLtZiFGn7aYiBHtOuXGOMGEfHRihftI%3D)
---
That’s the spine of steel America needs to start WINNING again. Thank God President Trump has put a true patriot in charge of securing the border and making America safe again.
---
**_Tom Homan isn’t backing down. Instead, he’s DOUBLING down!_**
---
_That’s why – until every last illegal is deported, Homan wants to be sure that absolutely _NONE_ of them are counted in the next United States Census._
---
**_“I think [the Biden] administration thought these millions of people were going to be future Democratic voters. But one of the things Biden also did, in addition to destroying all the programs we put in place to give us the most secure border, he overturned the Trump Census rule, which means _millions of people they release in sanctuary cities will be counted in the next Census_ , which is going to result in what? More seats in the House for the Dems.”_**
---
Simply put, this is a dire moment for our country...
---
**Because of the Democrats' schemes to infiltrate the next Census – _and our elections_ – now more than ever, we need to _VERIFY_ every last voter profile!**
---
_And that’s where _YOU_ come in._

I raised Ritchie all by myself in Throggs Neck Houses – a public housing project in the Bronx – on jobs that barely paid the minimum wage (just over $4!).

**His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. He doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.**

Most members of Congress spend their days doing “call time” – aka hours on the phone each day, hoping they’ll score large donations. _**But not my Ritchie.**_

Call time isn’t on his agenda. He would rather spend his time legislating and connecting with his constituents, _like he was elected to do!_

**That means every time people like you chip in — no matter how much — you’re fueling Ritchie in his fight to flip the House. You, Peter, hold the power to keep this grassroots movement strong!**

Sorry to be so blunt with you, but with a little over a year until the midterms, it’s critical that we start building up our resources to support Janelle’s re-election campaign right now. Here’s why:
* **National Republicans are already mapping out their targets for 2026.** And they have their sights set on flipping OR-05. They’ve already started airing ads to discredit Janelle for standing up to Trump and his disastrous policies — and there are likely more to come.

* **Democrats only need to flip three seats to take back control of the House.** But that won’t happen if we don’t keep OR-05 blue. So our ability to stand up to Trump, defend Medicaid, and lower costs for hard working people could come down to this seat.

* **There are 26 Democrats who face the toughest road to re-election next year — _and Janelle’s one of them._** That means if we want to protect this seat from the GOP and ensure Janelle can keep up her fight for working families, we need to stand together and ensure we have the resources for the tough race ahead.

**[So it really is important that we build up our resources _right now_ to defend this swing seat — but we can’t do that without your support. Will you chip in $5 (or whatever you can) to help protect OR-05 and keep Janelle fighting for Oregonians in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072351/559326750/-629675555?refcode=email_072425_teamFR&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM3M2U3ZTQtZDU2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6-LYFWzZZKC_e-dPZS9XROUbk7D4cwbkWSGF0MsT8N8=)**

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Split a contribution to help train the next generation of Democratic leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Make an investment in our future → |
#
---
Team, I know firsthand that no one wins an election alone. When I ran for governor, I had a team behind me — mentors, volunteers, and supporters like you who believed in what we could accomplish together. Now, it’s our turn to invest in the next generation of Democratic leaders. If we want to fight for working families, deliver on the kitchen-table issues, and protect our fundamental freedoms, we can’t just focus on today’s elections. We have to make sure there’s a strong bench of prepared, passionate, and diverse candidates ready to lead in the years ahead. **That’s exactly what organizations like the National Democratic Training Committee are doing every single day.** They have built an entire network of tough, dedicated candidates who are ready to make real change throughout the country. And they rely on grassroots support to do it. **[So, I’m asking you to make an investment in our future today. Chip in any amount to split a contribution between the National Democratic Training Committee and Fight Like Hell PAC — and help us elect the next generation of Democratic leadership.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072361/559326872/-2019578133?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMyY2Y1ZWEtZDU2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WcKn_HLO24nyczcwWBs1X4ldlVRFufuFwPRMZMxoWF8=)** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112072362/559326873/-2019578133?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250724_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMyY2Y1ZWEtZDU2OC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WcKn_HLO24nyczcwWBs1X4ldlVRFufuFwPRMZMxoWF8=)

including cutting a program that predicts floods before they strike.

name: Grassroots @ MarieForCongress.com
subject: Leading by example
body:
# [#]Peter, Marie is making headlines with her people-first, local-first approach to her work in Congress – take a look:
Front Porch Republic
The Localist at the Capitol: A Conversation with Marie Gluesenkamp Perez:
“We need a balance between chasing the most pressing symptoms, and a longer and proportional focus on the underlying, the root causes of those symptoms. So maybe instead of talking about ‘economic’ versus ‘cultural’ issues, you talk more about root causes versus symptoms.”
The Nation
If Democrats Want to Appeal to Rural America, They Need to Talk Like a Neighbor:
“Polls and focus groups are useful but no substitute for people who live and breathe un-rarefied air every day of the week...[Voters] appreciate that these politicians...like Marie Gluesenkamp Perez...are genuinely ‘for’ something.”
Compact Magazine:
“Ever since Gluesenkamp Perez’s 2022 upset, national outlets have leaned on familiar labels to characterize her—’moderate,’ ‘centrist’... But Gluesenkamp Perez isn’t splitting the difference between two poles so much as she is working from a different starting point, centered on repair, ownership, and trade work.”
(On her amendment to establish a cognitive acuity standard for Members of Congress)
KGW
“There’s a real appetite for transparency and good governance.”
Axios
“Real respect for our communities and the body here is [being] willing to have these honest, candid and difficult conversations...It’s clear people want systemic reform. They want accountability.”
The New York Times
These Younger Democrats Are Sick of Their Party’s Status Quo
“A number of prominent younger Democrats with records of winning tough races are forming a new group with big ambitions to remake their party’s image, recruit a new wave of candidates and challenge political orthodoxies they say are holding the party back...[pushing the Democratic Party to] better address the issues that feel most urgent in voters’ lives...Members include Marie Gluesenkamp Perez of Washington.”

Marie is upholding her promise to listen and bring all of our voices to the table, even when that means making tough decisions.

But, that fierce independence and loyalty to community has made her a target for far-right extremists who want to replace her with someone who puts politics above people.

clean_body: [#]Peter, Marie is making headlines with her people-first, local-first approach to her work in Congress – take a look: Front Porch Republic The Localist at the Capitol: A Conversation with Marie Gluesenkamp Perez: “We need a balance between chasing the most pressing symptoms, and a longer and proportional focus on the underlying, the root causes of those symptoms. So maybe instead of talking about ‘economic’ versus ‘cultural’ issues, you talk more about root causes versus symptoms.” The Nation If Democrats Want to Appeal to Rural America, They Need to Talk Like a Neighbor: “Polls and focus groups are useful but no substitute for people who live and breathe un-rarefied air every day of the week...[Voters] appreciate that these politicians...like Marie Gluesenkamp Perez...are genuinely ‘for’ something.” Compact Magazine: “Ever since Gluesenkamp Perez’s 2022 upset, national outlets have leaned on familiar labels to characterize her—’moderate,’ ‘centrist’... But Gluesenkamp Perez isn’t splitting the difference between two poles so much as she is working from a different starting point, centered on repair, ownership, and trade work.” (On her amendment to establish a cognitive acuity standard for Members of Congress) KGW “There’s a real appetite for transparency and good governance.” Axios “Real respect for our communities and the body here is [being] willing to have these honest, candid and difficult conversations...It’s clear people want systemic reform. They want accountability.” The New York Times These Younger Democrats Are Sick of Their Party’s Status Quo “A number of prominent younger Democrats with records of winning tough races are forming a new group with big ambitions to remake their party’s image, recruit a new wave of candidates and challenge political orthodoxies they say are holding the party back...[pushing the Democratic Party to] better address the issues that feel most urgent in voters’ lives...Members include Marie Gluesenkamp Perez of Washington.” Marie is upholding her promise to listen and bring all of our voices to the table, even when that means making tough decisions. body:
There are no ‘off-years’ for the DLCC. We’re aggressively pursuing opportunities to build a strong Democratic firewall to put an end to the terror that Trump and his far-right allies are causing. | | |
---

Given the chaos in Washington, state legislatures are more critical than ever. After Democrats notched two incredible victories in deep-red state legislative districts in Pennsylvania and Iowa earlier this year, we’re turning our attention to Georgia. **On August 26th, voters in Georgia will go to the polls in a special election to fill an open seat that Democrats are hoping to flip. A victory in this deep-red district would deal a devastating blow to Trump and slow down his Project 2025 agenda.** [When you make a donation, you’re powering our mission to defeat MAGA Republicans in states like Georgia nationwide. That’s why next month’s special election in Georgia is so important. Democrats have a phenomenal candidate in Debra Shigley – a small business owner and mother of five who is deeply embedded in her community. _Debra has what it takes to stand up against GOP extremism._
Alongside Democrats nationwide, Debra is running to increase public school funding, expand access to affordable health care, and lower the cost of living for working families. **We’re determined to help elect candidates just like her across the country, but we need your support.**
[Before it’s too late, can you chip in $7 (becomes $21!) to help reach our end-of-month goal and FLIP seats blue in places like Georgia nationwide? We’re determined to help elect candidates just like her across the country, but we need your support. name: AOC
subject: Completely uninsured
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
I ran for office completely uninsured.
At the time — while I was fighting for healthcare for others — I felt embarrassed to share this publicly.
I felt that people would think that I was not qualified to run for office if I didn’t have healthcare, or if I was struggling to pay my rent.
But the fact was, **I understood what people were going through precisely _because_ of what I had been enduring**.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250724-video.cXuNEQ&refcode=em20250724-9384-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)
Pa’lante,
Alexandria
Working people are coming together to fight for the future of our democracy.
We’re hoping to hold more town halls soon but it takes major resources to put on events of this size across different states.
[ Will you make a $5 contribution today to help us add more stops soon? Every dollar helps us organize and reach working people in red, blue, and purple districts around the country.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250724-video.cXuNEQ&refcode=em20250724-9384-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250724-video.cXuNEQ&refcode=em20250724-9384-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250724-video?refcode=em20250724-9384-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=22&refcode2=9384_2526796_rk5k_0&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250724-9384-P_FND_EGR_CTR&t=23&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=9384%2E2526796%2Erk5k_0)

**Riverbend Ranch**
Riverbend Ranch has been around for 35 years, selecting cattle that have higher marbling and tenderness than any other beef. You cannot get this beef in your grocery store. Riverbend Ranch ages their beef for 21 days and you'll find it more tender and flavorful than even the finest restaurants. So, if you're ready to have the best steak of your life, head to https://www.riverbendranch.com. Use promo code: SEAN to get $20 of your first order.
**Firecracker Farms**
Everything's better with HOT SALT. Firecracker Farms hot salt is hand crafted on their family farm with Carolina Reaper, Ghost and Trinidad Scorpion peppers. This is a balanced, deep flavor pairs perfect with your favorite foods. Whether it's eggs, steaks veggies or even your favorite beverage, Firecracker Farms hot salt is what you've been missing. Just head to https://firecracker.farm/ use code word: SEAN for a discount. Unlock the flavor in your food now!
In case you missed it yesterday, John Solomon accurately predicted the Department of Justice launching a strikeforce against the Russia hoax conspirators. The 'grand conspiracy' created by Kash Patel and the FBI can potentially tie Hillary Clinton from 2016 to the raid of Mar a Lago in 2024, which evades the statute of limitations and a better chance of prosecution in a Florida court. The Department of Justice is also meeting with Ghislaine Maxwell today to see if she has credible evidence that can be released to the public. While these massive investigations sucked up most of the oxygen, President Trump's trade deal with Japan, Indonesia and the Philippines is absolutely historic. These are the kind of deals that set bright and beautiful futures for young Americans and more fair deals are expected to come before the August deadline. Another rescissions package is also to be expected with cuts to the Department of Education. Another Biden administration aide pleads the 5th Amendment, which begs the question, will anyone not plead the 5th? Our epic panel is here to unpack all there issues plus this week's winners and losers.

subject: Impeach Trump? Jamie Raskin says the choice is clear.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Take action now, Peter >>

|
---
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112073397/559330142/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250724_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5ZjA5Yjg4LWQ5NjgtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y6azfX8plHMOfcEQhWrxDvjdZHREDQ7gB2WQdp27880=&emci=0499afdf-be68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=19f09b88-d968-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)****Peter, Rep. Jamie Raskin just gave you TWO options:**

**Option 1:** Let Donald Trump seize unchecked power and dismantle American democracy.

**OPTION #2 (the only real choice):** Demand full accountability for Trump’s abuses of power and defend the Constitution before it’s too late.

**We know where Jamie Raskin and House Democrats stand. The only question is:_Will you stand with them?_ **

name: Stand with Sen. Warren (via VPP)
subject: Social Security is on the line?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump’s plans are almost complete...
| | **We’re trying not to freak out... but frankly, it’s hard not to.** **FIRST:** Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans made plans to get rid of Social Security for _millions of Americans._

**THEN:** Trump and DOGE fired Social Security workers to line the pockets of wealthy billionaires, including _Elon Musk!_

**NOW:** Democrats like Elizabeth Warren are _CALLING OUT_ Trump’s disastrous MAGA policies! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92395?t=6&akid=20707%2E878179%2EgrlYr2) **If we don’t respond and stand up to Trump, we risk LOSING our Social Security FOR GOOD!**

[That’s why we’re calling on 204 Democrats from your state to join our Social Security Task Force TODAY. Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and other Democrats are leading the charge to protect our benefits — but we need YOU to support our movement! Join the Social Security Task Force NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92395?t=7&akid=20707%2E878179%2EgrlYr2) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92395?t=8&akid=20707%2E878179%2EgrlYr2) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92396?t=9&akid=20707%2E878179%2EgrlYr2)

Thank you!

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20707%2E878179%2EgrlYr2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20707%2E878179%2EgrlYr2).**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Two of the last four governors
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=352%2E1086043%2EVj2n8R ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=352%2E1086043%2EVj2n8R ]Wes Moore for Governor

Hey Peter,

People say that Maryland is a “blue state.” But I’ll be the first to tell
you: for Governors, that is a myth.

Two of the last four governors were Republicans. And just three years ago
Maryland had a Republican governor.

[ Wes ]Wes gif

We can’t lose this seat to a Republican next year and lose all of the
progress we’ve gained including:

💪 Pathways to work, wages, and wealth for all.

🦺 Real progress on public safety in our communities.

🏫 Historic investments to make Maryland’s public schools the best in the
nation.

It’s all at risk.

I need your help right now,
Peter. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250724-1?refcode=em-20250724-1&refcode2=352_1086043_Vj2n8R&akid=352%2E1086043%2EVj2n8R ]Will you chip in
$5 or any amount today to make sure we have a governor who
will always stand with the people?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250724-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250724-1&refcode2=352_1086043_Vj2n8R&akid=352%2E1086043%2EVj2n8R ]Donate $5 ››

Your grassroots support is what keeps us in this fight. Together, we're
building a Maryland that leaves no one behind.

Thank you,

Wes

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: State Rep. Leigh Finke
subject: Minnesota needs your help
body:
We all need to work together |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112073651/559331148/-5170562?refcode=WUEFH755_20250724_MNDFLSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056653&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3N2YwMC1kYTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-GqKp3MXoGGcux904nIK9e-pUTlghETmqjHlChAcKE=) Peter,

It's been just over a month since House DFLers lost Melissa Hortman, our Speaker and our friend, and the state of Minnesota was changed forever.

This change has affected all of us. We are all grieving, even as we recognize that we must continue the work of protecting Minnesota's freedoms.

It is painfully clear that some will go to extreme lengths to prevent us from exercising all of our freedoms, especially the right to determine our own destinies.

That's why our partner, EMILYs List, asked me to write you this email. As we move into this new era, we need your financial support. **We must win back a majority in the Minnesota House to defend reproductive freedom in our state and keep making life better and safer**. To do so, we need to meet our financial goals now.

**Our goal is to raise $50,000 by the end of July, so we can kickstart our campaign to retake a House majority in the strongest possible way. We need to hire canvassers, run ads, train new candidates, and keep the lights on at the office. Can you contribute an amount that's right for your family? It will be split between EMILYs List and our state Democratic House Caucus.** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112073652/559331149/-5170562?refcode=WUEFH755_20250724_MNDFLSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056653&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3N2YwMC1kYTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-GqKp3MXoGGcux904nIK9e-pUTlghETmqjHlChAcKE=)
---
There will be more ways to work together in the future. There are thousands of doors to knock and voters to meet before Election Day 2026. All of that work starts now, and the best way to support the Minnesota House DFL today is by making a donation of any amount that's right for you.

[**Remember, our goal is to raise $50,000 by the end of July. With EMILYs List's help and yours, I believe we can do it! Can you contribute an amount that's right for your family? It will be split between EMILYs List and the Minnesota DFL House Caucus.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112073653/559331177/-5170562?refcode=WUEFH755_20250724_MNDFLSplit_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056653&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Njk3N2YwMC1kYTY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-GqKp3MXoGGcux904nIK9e-pUTlghETmqjHlChAcKE=)

clean_body: We all need to work together | = Peter, It's been just over a month since House DFLers lost Melissa Hortman, our Speaker and our friend, and the state of Minnesota was changed forever. This change has affected all of us. We are all grieving, even as we recognize that we must continue the work of protecting Minnesota's freedoms. It is painfully clear that some will go to extreme lengths to prevent us from exercising all of our freedoms, especially the right to determine our own destinies. That's why our partner, EMILYs List, asked me to write you this email. As we move into this new era, we need your financial support. We must win back a majority in the Minnesota House to defend reproductive freedom in our state and keep making life better and safer. To do so, we need to meet our financial goals now. Our goal is to raise $50,000 by the end of July, so we can kickstart our campaign to retake a House majority in the strongest possible way. We need to hire canvassers, run ads, train new candidates, and keep the lights on at the office. Can you contribute an amount that's right for your family? It will be split between EMILYs List and our state Democratic House Caucus. | = There will be more ways to work together in the future. There are thousands of doors to knock and voters to meet before Election Day 2026. All of that work starts now, and the best way to support the Minnesota House DFL today is by making a donation of any amount that's right for you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for picking up the torch with us. We'll keep going together. Onward, Rep. Leigh Finke = Reproductive Freedom Caucus Chair Minnesota House of Representatives = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Pou for Congress Finance Team
subject: It’s not a want, it’s a need.
body:
Can we count on you?

| |
---
Team, We’re launching our end-of-month fundraising push early, and we need you to be a part of it! Summer is notorious for fundraising slumps. People travel, unplug, and tune out from politics for a few weeks. But we can’t afford to slow down. Not in one of the most competitive House districts in the entire country. If we want to take back the House, we have to protect what we have and start here. That means we need to fight back against MAGA outside spending, keep building our team, and hit every single one of our goals between now and next November. **[We’re not waiting until the last day of the month to get serious about this. We’re getting serious now. name: Team Summer Lee
subject: Summer Lee just forced the DOJ to release the Epstein files
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This is HUGE: Yesterday, Justice Democrats’ Rep. Summer Lee PASSED a
motion in the House Oversight Subcommittee she leads to subpoena the full,
unredacted Jeffrey Epstein files from the Department of Justice.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250724-sl?refcode=em20250724-36872&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36872_1203867_uJBveT&akid=36872%2E1203867%2EuJBveT ]Tweet by Summer Lee: My motion to subpoena the Epstein files passed our
Oversight Subcommittee, now DOJ has to release them. If elected don’t
fulfill our most basic role to hold the wealthy & powerful accountable for
atrocities they commit against the most vulnerable then we shouldn’t be in
office.

That means that the DOJ is legally required to turn these documents over
to her subcommittee in Congress.

This moment didn’t come easy. It happened because Summer had the guts to
step up and lead the charge. Now, we are one step closer to tearing
through one of the most powerful cover-ups in modern history.

As a result, she’s facing the full weight of pushback from powerful forces
who want to keep these files buried.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250724-sl?refcode=em20250724-36872&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36872_1203867_uJBveT&akid=36872%2E1203867%2EuJBveT ]Will you click here and split $15, $25, or even $100 to help power
Justice Democrats and Summer’s fight for truth and justice?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250724-sl?refcode=em20250724-36872&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36872_1203867_uJBveT&akid=36872%2E1203867%2EuJBveT ]Contribute $5

Summer introduced this motion during a hearing on child safety — calling
out the hypocrisy of politicians who claim to care about trafficking while
shielding one of the worst sex traffickers in U.S. history and those who
helped him.

And guess what? She broke through the noise. She got the votes. She is
making the DOJ answer to Congress.

This is what happens when Summer Lee is in the room.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250724-sl?refcode=em20250724-36872&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36872_1203867_uJBveT&akid=36872%2E1203867%2EuJBveT ]Now more than ever, Summer needs your support to keep holding the
wealthy and powerful accountable. Can you split a $10, $25, or even $100
donation to her campaign and Justice Democrats today?

Thanks for being in this fight with us!

In solidarity,

Team Summer

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250724-36872-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36872_1203867_uJBveT&akid=36872%2E1203867%2EuJBveT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36872%2E1203867%2EuJBveT

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Immigrants who have followed the law, built their lives, raised their children, and contributed to our economy deserve due process and should not have their protections suddenly taken away. And nobody should ever be violently kidnapped by masked agents who refuse to identify themselves.
But right now, President Donald Trump is working overtime to end protections for immigrants while ramping up mass deportations. His cruel anti-immigrant agenda is tearing families, communities, and our country apart.
That’s why I just helped introduce a plan to stop federal agents from hiding their identities during immigration enforcement. This is just one of the steps I am taking to ensure Nevada continues to be welcoming and inclusive for the diverse, working-class immigrants who call our state home.

clean_body: Please respond to my urgent poll before midnight: | | | Friend, I am the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants who escaped cruelty and injustice to come to America. Now, I am fighting in the Senate to protect immigrants from the Trump Administration’s cruelty and injustice in America – and I need to know you’re with me. Please, friend, tell me now: Do you think our country should be a safe place for immigrants? | | | | Immigrants who have followed the law, built their lives, raised their children, and contributed to our economy deserve due process and should not have their protections suddenly taken away. And nobody should ever be violently kidnapped by masked agents who refuse to identify themselves. But right now, President Donald Trump is working overtime to end protections for immigrants while ramping up mass deportations. His cruel anti-immigrant agenda is tearing families, communities, and our country apart. That’s why I just helped introduce a plan to stop federal agents from hiding their identities during immigration enforcement. This is just one of the steps I am taking to ensure Nevada continues to be welcoming and inclusive for the diverse, working-class immigrants who call our state home. Before midnight, I need 27 more supporters like you from 37087 to confirm you support my efforts to keep our immigrants safe. Do you think our country should be a safe place for immigrants? | | | | Thank you for speaking up. Jacky | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada P.O. Box 46110 LAS VEGAS, NV 89114 United States |

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/483a0530-dcc8-46d7-8d31-3d8dda698cc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Friends,
You ever watch a man with a gold-plated Bible get thrashed with it on national TV?
That's what John Fugelsang did with a righteous ass-kicking of Mitch McConnell piss-boy, Scott Jennings, on CNN. Fugelsang, raised by a former nun and Franciscan Friar, is the guy Republicans fear in a debate. He [exposes their thespianism to cover for a lack of theocratic knowledge ](https://substack.com/redirect/b8a7681a-1085-4c03-86f7-0156badb2c80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the very dingos advocating that [we become a theocracy](https://substack.com/redirect/4d44718b-f5ec-4bcc-99ea-115cff201168?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
When John points out what actually is in the New Testament, it doesn't go well for MAGAs. John uses the New Testament as intended; a guide for justice, compassion, and humility. He speaks out with its true message--not just for Christians, but Jews, Hindus, atheists, Muslims..all of us.
It must make Scott Jennings puke all over his newest pair of chinos and yacht slippers.
As for fake religious twerps like Mike Johnson? T[his isn't the prop he thinks it is](https://substack.com/redirect/8823e650-62bf-438b-bf1d-1e522b99f2ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to threaten women outside abortion clinics (Jesus never mentioned abortion), [cut funding for healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/74be92d4-1d95-446c-8d19-2080918421df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ("Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye have done _it_ unto one of the least of these my brethren, ye have done _it_ unto me") or justify jailing immigrants (they should check out the "Parable of the Stranger") .
Weird how t[here is no Gestapo ICE agents](https://substack.com/redirect/9505fdfc-a9cc-4c14-9f23-c014cae0040d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), just honesty, compassion and dignity, which Mike Johnson couldn't find if he had the sun to use as a flashlight.
But John Fugelsang sure could find these traits when he joined the show!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d84affcc-89a6-42e0-a65f-3020e26f7ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As John intelligently, patiently (and humorously) explained on "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter," Jesus sure ain't MAGA. If you've read the Sermon on the Mount--or as Fox would call it, to quote John, "Woke Virtue Signaling on the Mount"--you know Jesus wouldn't recognize these mooks identifying as Christians. He'd take one look and know he'd have to turn the other cheek right quick.
**Fugelsang just dropped a new book, "**_**Separation of Church and Hate**_ ," and it's the manual we've needed for years. Not a theological slog. A street-level guide for anyone--believer, agnostic, or atheist--sick of watching Jesus get co-opted by the cruelest slugs in our political class and right-wing media entertainment complex.
💥 He explains why _Matthew 25_ is the real Christian litmus test--take care of the poor, the sick, the imprisoned, and the stranger.
💥 He burns down Leviticus-based bigotry with the actual teachings of Christ.
💥 He exposes how Rome hijacked love-and-service Christianity and turned it into an empire of power, war, and profit--hey, [that sounds exactly like today's GOP](https://substack.com/redirect/cc78c724-1001-4fb4-b780-5dc33107e638?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
Then came the fireworks...
🎯 South Park just nuked Donald Trump from orbit--[and at the perfect moment](https://substack.com/redirect/4a1e42b2-3637-4b22-a3b9-3fa4cebc23ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We're talking about the boldest 22 minutes of televised protest since _The Day After_. A billion-dollar Comedy Central production with a fat, flabby, fascist Trump, who literally gets talked down to--by Jesus.
[Their Paramount, ownership, i.e. the CHUDs who just fired Stephen Colbert](https://substack.com/redirect/4a1e42b2-3637-4b22-a3b9-3fa4cebc23ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), makes this some serious bold badassery. Paramount can't touch the South Park boys as they just got--via lawsuit--a mega-deal with them. And everyone knows it.
You can feel the Streisand Effect coming like a Trump subpoena. Because this wasn't just satire. It was a political body blow, and Trump's orbit is spiraling, [even as Tulsi Gabbard continues to toss out slanderous cringe attacks](https://substack.com/redirect/da824f50-4366-4803-8d2b-3900eec70c7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on former President Obama to try to change the subject (Hint: It ain't workin', Kremlinite).
And why now?
Because the oligarchs got what they came for. Tax cuts. Deregulation. Crypto loopholes. Now they're done with him. The billionaires are ghosting the orange clown. And if you're wondering [why the Epstein files are suddenly the hottest ticket in town](https://substack.com/redirect/da824f50-4366-4803-8d2b-3900eec70c7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it's because the people who own this country are handing out backstage passes.
Even the [MAGA cult is blinking](https://substack.com/redirect/65a87c2e-5443-4200-b2fd-b92ce2df4a05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Three GOPers just joined Dems to subpoena the Epstein records--against Trump's wishes. Let me say that again: _[Republicans are voting to expose Epstein's secrets while Trump screams "HOAX!"](https://substack.com/redirect/65a87c2e-5443-4200-b2fd-b92ce2df4a05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Truth Social._
Why? Because the moral rot is leaking into their pews. They can't weaponize "pedo panic" for years and then hide when the files drop and _their guy,_ for once, is an A-Lister.
Folks, this isn't just about Trump. It's about the scam of monopoly media, the hijacking of religion [and a political movement that confuses cruelty for conviction](https://substack.com/redirect/8823e650-62bf-438b-bf1d-1e522b99f2ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But now, between Fugelsang's scalpel-sharp Bible-beating and South Park's animated obliteration, this feels like a moment the tide could be turning. America's finally getting the receipts--spiritual, moral, and financial. These [white nationalists (aka Nazis)](https://substack.com/redirect/621f0b21-4c07-4064-952c-70ba25b63304?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are being exposed.
So next time some blow-dried moral majority wannabe waves a Bible in your face, ask them one question:
**What actual teaching of Jesus does your party fight for?**
Just one.
Because if they can't answer that--and they can't--they're not Christians.
They're just cosplaying tyrants.

body:
President Donald J.

| |
---|---|---
|
# TRUMP BROKE THE SYSTEM
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jul 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
President Donald J. Trump has done what others lacked the courage to do--stand up for truth, fairness, and biological reality in the face of an increasingly delusional culture. With a single executive order, President Trump put an end to the madness of allowing biological males to compete in female sports. And now, the U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee has complied.

_**Let that sink in: President Trump stood his ground --and the Olympic Committee blinked.**_
[Click Here To Finish Reading:](https://substack.com/redirect/102d8866-4aa9-431e-bf10-134358a5dc7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Peter,
“You are at the right place at the right time, with the right skills and the right talent to do the right thing.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250724_m4fvideo_act]
Our founder, Cori Bush, said it best. And she’s right. If you’re reading this, you are exactly where you’re supposed to be.
This is the time. Not for silence. Not for waiting. But for action.
Though the midterm elections are in a little over a year—candidates are running for local offices, state offices, and even Congress right now . That means every day we waste not building is a day Republicans are winning.
Watch Cori’s powerful message here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250724_m4fvideo_act]

In our newest campaign, Movement for Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home] , we’re working to help communities organize their neighbors, push policy, pressure elected officials, and build a movement that keeps us heard and represented, because we do not have the option to stand idly by while systems continue to fail our people.
It’s not just a campaign. It’s a political awakening.
It’s training the next generation of leaders.
It’s about meeting people where they are.
It’s uniting communities to push back against harmful policies and actions to build something grounded in justice, solidarity, and truth.
Our goal is to give you the tools to turn your voice into action while uplifting your community. Because your voice matters, and this is the moment to use it.
If you believe this work matters, support it. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250724_m4fvideo_act]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: 56 years ago this week America put a man on the moon
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Science is why we have the biggest economy in the world. Science is how we, the United States of America, solve the hardest problems.
#

In 1969, on July 20th, as many as 650 million people around the world watched Neil Armstrong step on the moon.
Me and my brother Scott watched it, too... and I fell asleep. But that moon landing was a big reason we became astronauts, and it’s a great example of what our country can do when we work together.
If NASA faced those challenges during the space race, we’d have lost.
We’re in a new space race with China right now, and what the Trump Administration is doing has weakened our hand considerably. They have drastically cut funding for scientific research, and they’re forcing an entire generation of up and coming scientists to reconsider whether there’s a place for them in the United States.
Science is why we have the biggest economy in the world. Science is how we, the United States of America, solve the hardest problems. Science has allowed us to create new industries that create good jobs. And right now, we are handing our edge in science over to our competitors.
I’m doing everything I can to fight these cuts because America’s future depends on science and innovation. We have to lead on this — or our children and grandchildren will pay for our mistakes.
I’m ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please:
I hope you’ll stay in the fight. And if you’re willing, please: [**Consider making a donation to help me push back on Trump’s war on science.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250724-1-f&t=1&akid=6131%2E6688874%2ENMrFu5)

subject: Half Baked Policy. Full Blown Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Let’s talk about what happens when the people in power cut corners and ignore the consequences, Friend.
Alligator Alcatraz is already making headlines for inhumane conditions, environmental damage, and a total lack of oversight. It’s cruel, it’s chaotic, and it’s costing taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4874503471466C30375335584432324953444459566D55533978354D4B437544703043573054396831564B50523843426E776A46534476744A4F616E52586949/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-24%20at%2010.57.11%E2%80%AFAM.png]
And here’s the thing: this isn’t an isolated, inhumane failure. It’s a pattern.
From healthcare to housing to hurricane response, this state focuses on making headlines instead of coming up with real solutions. Immigrants aren’t the issue , it’s poor leadership.
Meanwhile, working families are drowning under the cost of living.
💰 Rent is up.
🩺 Insurance premiums are through the roof.
🍼 Child care is nearly unaffordable.
But the same officials who can’t pass a sensible bill? They’re the ones telling you everything is fine. It’s not fine. And I’m done pretending it is.
We need bold, thoughtful policy, not half-measures, not press stunts, not billion-dollar failures.
That’s why I’m running for Senate, because families deserve better than losing a loved one to this horrorshow.

name: Team McBride
subject: The nursing shortage is already here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Nurses are performing life-saving work under impossible strain, and it’s set to get worse.
#
In Delaware and across the country, nurses are performing life-saving work under impossible strain, and it’s set to get worse.
The United States is projected to face a _10%_ shortage in registered nurses by 2027.
On top of that, reports indicate that Trump is gearing up to slash federal funding for critical nursing programs, including the primary funding for nursing education.
That’s why Sarah joined a bipartisan coalition to introduce the **National Nursing Workforce Center Act** — legislation that will combat the growing nursing shortage, reduce burnout, and support the backbone of our health care system: our nurses.
We cannot let Trump-era cuts threaten patient care, and nurses need our support more than ever before.
[**Will you sign Sarah’s petition urging Congress to pass the National Nursing Workforce and act immediately to address the nursing shortage crisis?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/sign/ms_em_20250724_nursingshortage/?source=em20250724-2209&akid=2209%2E21716%2ELifsMh)

Greg Gutfeld went off on Jessica Tarlov in **[an epic monologue](https://substack.com/redirect/576747bb-075d-47d2-93d5-beffa3d9da3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she tried to minimize the administration's recent bombshell alleging Barack Obama was involved in creating a false narratives about Trump/Russia collusion.
Greg lost his mind at her! Watch the clip below:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/576747bb-075d-47d2-93d5-beffa3d9da3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"I understand this Epstein situation is very tricky for the administration...but they are pulling out all of the greatest hits!" Tarlov said. "It's preposterous we're talking about Hillary's emails again in 2025."
Gutfeld couldn't stand it for one minute, firing back at her immediately, "They amplified a false conclusion that Trump colluded with Russia in 2016,... We're actually getting an investigation and you're saying 'No, you know what? You guys should just move on'...**[You say the same f--ing thing about Biden's brain!!](https://substack.com/redirect/576747bb-075d-47d2-93d5-beffa3d9da3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**"
"Democrats didn't care about Epstein until they saw a political motivation! # Wrestling legend Hulk Hogan passes away at 71
**[WWE legend Hulk Hogan,](https://substack.com/redirect/7d7219f1-859d-45c7-996b-85fbdda5e11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** one of the most iconic figures in professional wrestling history, died Thursday at age 71, the WWE confirmed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d7219f1-859d-45c7-996b-85fbdda5e11e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Medics were dispatched to Hogan 's Clearwater, Florida home** following a cardiac arrest call, according to TMZ. "WWE is saddened to learn WWE Hall of Famer Hulk Hogan has passed away," WWE confirmed on X.
* **Hogan, born Terry Bollea, rose to global stardom in the 1980s** with his "Hulkamania" persona and became the face of the WWF (now WWE), helping launch WrestleMania and imbuing wrestling into mainstream culture. Known for his ripped shirts, "24-inch python" arms and catchphrase "What'cha gonna do when Hulkamania runs wild on you?!", Hogan headlined multiple WrestleManias and famously bodyslammed Andre the Giant in front of 78,000 fans in 1987.
* **Beyond the ring, Hogan became a pop culture staple** through roles in films like _Rocky III_ , TV shows including _The A-Team_ , and his own VH1 reality series, _Hogan Knows Best_. His career spanned decades and included a run in the wrestle media of WCW, and eventually made the New World Order (nWo) group.
* **Rumors had swirled about Hogan 's health f**ollowing neck surgery in May, though his wife recently said he was recovering well. It remains unclear if the procedure played a role in his death. Hogan is survived by his wife Sky Daily and two children, Brooke and Nick. A press conference is expected later Thursday.

* * *
# Biden Admin DROPPED deportation of accused kidnapper and sex offender: report
Federal officials reported that the Biden Administration **[dropped the deportation case of a Honduran man](https://substack.com/redirect/2b038c3e-9859-4025-9fef-84936e785d24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** accused of kidnapping and sexual assault.
* **Jose Armando Carcamo-Perdomo** , who entered the U.S. illegally in 2020, was arrested July 14 in Harris County, Texas, after a woman was found trapped inside his home.
* **Authorities say the victim, a Chinese national,** was held captive for five days without food or water. According to the Harris County Sheriff's Office, Carcamo allegedly lured her to Texas under the false promise of a better-paying job. "She was kicking and screaming. He was carrying her. It just stood out to me," a neighbor who witnessed her attempted escape said.
* **Federal records show Carcamo 's deportation **proceedings were terminated in September 2023 after ICE filed a motion with an immigration judge. Assistant DHS Secretary Tricia McLaughlin shared her disgust on the issue: "This accused kidnapper and suspected sex trafficker was just one of the countless criminal illegal aliens who inexplicably had their removal proceedings terminated."
* **Investigators suspect the woman is one of several victims in a larger sex trafficking ring.** "We know there's other people involved, " Lt. John Klafka said. "Our message is clear: criminals are not welcome in the United States," McLaughlin added, crediting the Trump administration's efforts to detain suspects like Carcamo under the Laken Riley Act. The case remains under investigation.

* * *
# Trump's new AI bill marks "Golden Age" and rejects woke policies
President Trump signed three executive orders Wednesday aimed at reshaping the federal government's approach to artificial intelligence, including **[a ban on so-called"woke" AI models. ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a670316-bfe5-4bb6-bbf1-8a360a5c4049?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **" The American people do not want woke Marxist lunacy** in their AI models--and neither do other countries," Trump said before the signing in Washington, D.C.
* **One order prohibits federal agencies** from using generative AI tools that fail to demonstrate "truthfulness and ideological neutrality." Trump said the U.S. government would work only with AI that "pursues truth, fairness, and strict impartiality," including models that "do not manipulate responses in favor of ideological dogmas"
* **Another executive order** seeks to accelerate the buildout of data center infrastructure by rolling back Biden-era regulations. The directive provides grants, loans, and tax incentives for qualifying projects and empowers Cabinet officials to fast-track construction on federal lands by eliminating climate and DEI requirements.
* **A third order promotes the export of U.S. AI technologies** to allies. The White House said the measures are part of Trump's plan to usher in a "Golden Age for American technological dominance."

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112074383/559333659/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY5Yzg1Mi1kYzY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VVByi2RO1VVqracnijXKdrEYEHIGJjxlLNQ3FyPsMA=&emci=43664b02-bb68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8af9c852-dc68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7878003)

At this very moment, the number of Americans who have been deported could be as high as 70. In Congress, **Representative Eric Swalwell** is pushing back. He’s fighting to de-mask ICE agents, rein in their budget, and working with state attorneys general to prosecute agents when they cross the line. On the ground, **The Union** and its network of volunteers have traveled over 27,000 miles nationwide to host voter registration drives, community meet & greets, and townhalls since Donald Trump was elected. From Utah to New Jersey, they’re doing the work. They’re rebuilding our democracy one voter, and one volunteer, at a time. We’re not waiting until the midterms.
