body:
Here’s how we build power in the face of autocracy: |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112076916/559341256/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250723_T1_Autocracy_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjgxNmJkOS1lNjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UaS7K7HDRbp13h0IpVbsdIZztEwtYHTIp18Db6i-N0=&emci=39816bd9-e668-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=42816bd9-e668-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | This month, our team has done a lot of reflecting on what it means to confront the rise of autocracy under the Trump Regime. From ICE abductions and the terrorizing of immigrant communities to court rulings rooted in far-right extremism — every single day, we’re faced with efforts designed to make us feel powerless, afraid, and isolated. **But team, we cannot give up.** The truth is, we’re holding multiple realities at once. We feel grief, but we also feel fierce determination. We feel tired, but motivated. We especially feel heartbreak, but we never lose hope. And hope is what allows us to keep going. **Hope alone won’t protect our democracy. That’s why we are so intentional and thoughtful about our strategies to elect pro-voter Democracy Champions and win elections, to mobilize effectively, and to defend our allies in their fights to block harmful organizations and anti-voter efforts. ** [**That’s why we’re building up our resources to continue the fight for voting freedom. Will you chip in to power our pro-voter work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112076917/559341257/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250723_T1_Autocracy_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjgxNmJkOS1lNjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UaS7K7HDRbp13h0IpVbsdIZztEwtYHTIp18Db6i-N0=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112076918/559341258/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250723_T1_Autocracy_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjgxNmJkOS1lNjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UaS7K7HDRbp13h0IpVbsdIZztEwtYHTIp18Db6i-N0=)

Despite the challenges, we’ve made some remarkable progress:
* We elected voting rights champions across the South
* We recently launched Rights & Insights, our new and free Substack to share trusted, accessible information while the Trump Regime continuously spreads misinformation

Fair Fight is working day and night to combat the Trump Regime's persistent threat against democracy, and we’re adding value to these national fights by flexing our grassroots muscle and countering autocratic actions directly on the ground in our local communities.
**But we can’t do it alone. You are part of this moment. You are part of this local strategy. We need you to continue supporting us as we build power from the ground up.**
Every donation helps grow our movement — to defend the freedom to vote, expand access to early voting, elect voting rights champions, defeat anti-democracy extremists, build pro-voter political power across the South, and push back against voter suppression.
**No matter what the other side throws at us, we will never relent. And we will always fight back for free and fair elections.[If you also choose to fight back, make a donation to Fair Fight today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112076919/559341259/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250723_T1_Autocracy_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjgxNmJkOS1lNjY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UaS7K7HDRbp13h0IpVbsdIZztEwtYHTIp18Db6i-N0=)**

clean_body: Here’s how we build power in the face of autocracy: | | | This month, our team has done a lot of reflecting on what it means to confront the rise of autocracy under the Trump Regime. From ICE abductions and the terrorizing of immigrant communities to court rulings rooted in far-right extremism — every single day, we’re faced with efforts designed to make us feel powerless, afraid, and isolated. But team, we cannot give up. The truth is, we’re holding multiple realities at once. We feel grief, but we also feel fierce determination. We feel tired, but motivated. We especially feel heartbreak, but we never lose hope. And hope is what allows us to keep going. Hope alone won’t protect our democracy. That’s why we are so intentional and thoughtful about our strategies to elect pro-voter Democracy Champions and win elections, to mobilize effectively, and to defend our allies in their fights to block harmful organizations and anti-voter efforts. = | = Despite the challenges, we’ve made some remarkable progress: We elected voting rights champions across the South We recently launched Rights & Insights, our new and free Substack to share trusted, accessible information while the Trump Regime continuously spreads misinformation Fair Fight is working day and night to combat the Trump Regime's persistent threat against democracy, and we’re adding value to these national fights by flexing our grassroots muscle and countering autocratic actions directly on the ground in our local communities. But we can’t do it alone. You are part of this moment. You are part of this local strategy. We need you to continue supporting us as we build power from the ground up. Every donation helps grow our movement — to defend the freedom to vote, expand access to early voting, elect voting rights champions, defeat anti-democracy extremists, build pro-voter political power across the South, and push back against voter suppression. No matter what the other side throws at us, we will never relent. And we will always fight back for free and fair elections.= = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- This fight feels heavy, but we are not powerless. Thank you for everything you do, Lauren Groh-Wargo Fair Fight CEO = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Derek, we have a few quick questions for you this evening: If you knew that a $3 contribution to the DNC would help Democrats win back Congress next year, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you’ve spent this year? If you knew that $3 would go directly toward helping us defeat every single Republican who just voted to slash health care and food assistance for millions of people, wouldn’t it feel like the most gratifying donation you’ve ever made? And if we told you that your $3 donation would help us keep the pressure on every single Republican to do their job and ensure the full Epstein files are released to the public, wouldn’t you click the link below to give $3 _right now_? **These questions aren’t rooted in fictional scenarios — this is the work that we’re able to do with the support of grassroots supporters like you.** Your $3 donation helps us invest in organizing across the country, invest in all 50 state parties so they have the resources they need, and support electing Democrats who will fight for working families and communities in their states, districts, and communities to stop Trump and his allies from ripping our democracy to shreds. name: Hickenlooper HQ
subject: PETITION: Save public broadcasting!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Republicans in Congress just voted to rip federal funding from public broadcasters — and it’s going to have devastating effects on Colorado:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112077027/559341715/1435897075?refcode=email_072425_public-broadcast&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQwMTUzNy1lODY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xy712nacQRSCNNppx65AGcFGrAjfBP91l9o7YzAHUHw=&emci=8918679d-dc68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b9d01537-e868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Folks, Republicans in Congress just voted to rip federal funding from public broadcasters — and it’s going to have devastating effects on Colorado: _**CBS: Public radio stations in Colorado prepare to lose millions of dollars in federal funding**_ **Republicans voted to cut over $1 BILLION from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, the nonprofit organization that supports NPR, PBS, and over a thousand public TV and radio stations in local communities across the country.**

John fought tooth and nail to stop the GOP’s package of cuts from passing through the Senate, _but Republicans blocked amendment after amendment and rammed these cruel cuts through._ **[Now we’re calling on this grassroots team to help us sound the alarm and call on the Trump administration to reverse course NOW. Please, can we count on you to sign on to John’s petition and fight with us to restore funding for public TV and radio? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112077028/559341716/261350?refcode=email_072425_public-broadcast&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQwMTUzNy1lODY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xy712nacQRSCNNppx65AGcFGrAjfBP91l9o7YzAHUHw=&emci=8918679d-dc68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b9d01537-e868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112077029/559341717/261350?refcode=email_072425_public-broadcast&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQwMTUzNy1lODY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xy712nacQRSCNNppx65AGcFGrAjfBP91l9o7YzAHUHw=&emci=8918679d-dc68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b9d01537-e868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)
---
This is going to have disastrous effects on Americans’ access to free, timely, and accurate information — _but it’s potentially deadly for rural Coloradans._

Local radio and television stations carry emergency alerts for extreme weather and natural disasters — which are critical for Coloradans in remote locations without access to internet or cell service. Ripping away the resources that keep these stations running puts countless lives at risk.

Republicans aren’t making government more efficient — _they’re dismantling it piece by piece, and leaving the rural communities who rely on these critical services in the dust._

**[We have to make our voices heard. So please, sign your name next to John Hickenlooper’s right now and fight with us to restore funding for our public TV and radio stations. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112077030/559341718/261350?refcode=email_072425_public-broadcast&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQwMTUzNy1lODY4LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xy712nacQRSCNNppx65AGcFGrAjfBP91l9o7YzAHUHw=&emci=8918679d-dc68-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=b9d01537-e868-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)**
